en.tldr: Sessa is a decoder architecture that places attention inside a feedback path, enabling recurrent many-path aggregation within a layer, achieving strong performance on long-context benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing sequence models (e.g., Transformers and Mamba) have limitations in long-range dependency handling: attention influence decays as O(1/ℓ) when context is diffuse, while selective state-space models exhibit exponential decay in long-range sensitivity with lag.
en.method: Proposes the Sessa decoder that embeds attention mechanisms within a feedback path, supporting recurrent many-path information aggregation within a layer. Under stated assumptions, the architecture can achieve a power-law memory tail O(ℓ^{-β}) (0<β<1) in lag ℓ.
en.result: Under matched architectures and training budgets, Sessa achieves the strongest performance on long-context benchmarks while remaining competitive with Transformer and Mamba baselines on short-context language modeling.
en.help_to_user: Provides a novel architectural approach for handling long-sequence dependencies by combining advantages of attention and state-space models, enabling flexible selective retrieval and non-decaying memory profiles.

idea_spark.idea: Embed attention within state-space models to enable multi-path aggregation, breaking the limitation of single feedback chains
idea_spark.risk: Generalizability of theoretical assumptions to practical tasks requires further validation
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires exploration of hybrid architectures, such as combining attention with other recurrent components to optimize long-range information flow

papers.title: Target Parameterization in Diffusion Models for Nonlinear Spatiotemporal System Identification
papers.summary: Machine learning is becoming increasingly important for nonlinear system identification, including dynamical systems with spatially distributed outputs. However, classical identification and forecasting approaches become markedly less reliable in turbulent-flow regimes, where the dynamics are high-dimensional, strongly nonlinear, and highly sensitive to compounding rollout errors. Diffusion-based models have recently shown improved robustness in this setting and offer probabilistic inference capabilities, but many current implementations inherit target parameterizations from image generation, most commonly noise or velocity prediction. In this work, we revisit this design choice in the context of nonlinear spatiotemporal system identification. We consider a simple, self-contained patch-based transformer that operates directly on physical fields and use turbulent flow simulation as a representative testbed. Our results show that clean-state prediction consistently improves rollout stability and reduces long-horizon error relative to velocity- and noise-based objectives, with the advantage becoming more pronounced as the per-token dimensionality increases. These findings identify target parameterization as a key modeling choice in diffusion-based identification of nonlinear systems with spatial outputs in turbulent regimes.

ai.tldr: 本研究探讨了扩散模型中目标参数化对非线性时空系统辨识的影响，发现清洁状态预测比速度和噪声预测在湍流模拟中具有更好的长期稳定性和精度。
ai.motivation: 传统辨识和预测方法在高维、强非线性、对误差敏感的湍流体系中可靠性下降。扩散模型虽展现出鲁棒性，但其目标参数化多沿用图像生成领域的噪声或速度预测，在物理系统辨识中的适用性有待验证。
ai.method: 采用一个简单、自包含的基于补丁的Transformer，直接在物理场上操作，并以湍流模拟作为代表性测试平台，比较了清洁状态预测、速度预测和噪声预测三种目标参数化方法。
ai.result: 结果表明，清洁状态预测能持续提升推演稳定性并降低长期误差，且随着每个令牌维度的增加，其优势更加明显。
ai.help_to_user: 为在湍流等复杂非线性时空系统中使用扩散模型进行辨识提供了关键的设计指导：选择清洁状态作为预测目标优于传统的噪声或速度目标。

idea_spark.idea: 在物理系统建模中，探索除噪声/速度外的其他更符合系统动力学的目标变量（如清洁状态）作为扩散模型的预测目标。
idea_spark.risk: 结论可能依赖于特定的模型架构（补丁Transformer）和测试平台（湍流模拟），在其他系统或模型上的普适性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们重新思考生成模型在科学计算中的核心设计选择，目标参数应与底层物理规律对齐，而非简单套用其他领域的成功经验。

en.tldr: This study investigates the impact of target parameterization in diffusion models for nonlinear spatiotemporal system identification, finding that clean-state prediction outperforms velocity and noise prediction in turbulent flow simulation for long-term stability and accuracy.
en.motivation: Classical identification and forecasting methods become less reliable in turbulent regimes characterized by high-dimensionality, strong nonlinearity, and sensitivity to errors. While diffusion models show robustness, their target parameterizations (often noise or velocity prediction inherited from image generation) may not be optimal for physical system identification.
en.method: A simple, self-contained patch-based transformer operating directly on physical fields is used, with turbulent flow simulation as a testbed, to compare three target parameterizations: clean-state, velocity, and noise prediction.
en.result: Results show that clean-state prediction consistently improves rollout stability and reduces long-horizon error, with the advantage becoming more pronounced as per-token dimensionality increases.
en.help_to_user: Provides key design guidance for using diffusion models in complex nonlinear spatiotemporal systems like turbulent flows: choosing clean-state as the prediction target is superior to traditional noise or velocity targets.

idea_spark.idea: In physical system modeling, explore target variables other than noise/velocity (e.g., clean-state) that better align with system dynamics as the prediction objective for diffusion models.
idea_spark.risk: Conclusions may be specific to the chosen model architecture (patch-based transformer) and testbed (turbulent flow simulation); generalizability to other systems or models requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires rethinking core design choices of generative models in scientific computing: target parameterization should align with underlying physics, not merely copy successful practices from other domains.

papers.title: L1 Regularization Paths in Linear Models by Parametric Gaussian Message Passing
papers.summary: The paper considers the computation of L1 regularization paths in a state space setting, which includes L1 regularized Kalman smoothing, linear SVM, LASSO, and more. The paper proposes two new algorithms, which are duals of each other; the first algorithm applies to L1 regularization of independent variables while the second applies to L1 regularization of dependent variables. The heart of the proposed algorithms is parametric Gaussian message passing (i.e., Kalman-type forward-backward recursions) in the pertinent factor graphs. The proposed methods are broadly applicable, they (usually) require only matrix multiplications, and their complexity can be competitive with prior methods in some cases.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了两种基于参数化高斯消息传递的新算法，用于计算线性模型中L1正则化路径，适用于状态空间设置下的多种问题。
ai.motivation: 在状态空间设置中计算L1正则化路径（如L1正则化卡尔曼平滑、线性SVM、LASSO等）需要高效算法。现有方法在复杂度和适用性上存在局限，需要更通用且计算简单的解决方案。
ai.method: 提出了两种互为对偶的新算法：第一种适用于独立变量的L1正则化，第二种适用于相关变量的L1正则化。核心是在相关因子图中使用参数化高斯消息传递（即卡尔曼型前向-后向递归）。
ai.result: 所提方法具有广泛适用性，通常仅需矩阵乘法运算，在某些情况下其计算复杂度可与现有方法竞争。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了计算L1正则化路径的高效通用框架，特别适用于状态空间模型中的正则化问题，简化了实现复杂度。

idea_spark.idea: 将对偶性原理与消息传递结合，为不同类型变量的正则化提供统一计算视角。
idea_spark.risk: 算法性能可能依赖于问题具体结构，在某些高维场景下矩阵乘法仍可能成为计算瓶颈。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将消息传递算法扩展到更广泛的优化问题中，利用因子图表示简化复杂正则化路径的计算。

en.tldr: This paper proposes two new algorithms based on parametric Gaussian message passing for computing L1 regularization paths in linear models, applicable to various problems in state space settings.
en.motivation: Efficient algorithms are needed for computing L1 regularization paths in state space settings (e.g., L1 regularized Kalman smoothing, linear SVM, LASSO). Existing methods have limitations in complexity and applicability, requiring more general and computationally simple solutions.
en.method: Two new dual algorithms are proposed: the first applies to L1 regularization of independent variables, while the second applies to dependent variables. The core is parametric Gaussian message passing (i.e., Kalman-type forward-backward recursions) in pertinent factor graphs.
en.result: The proposed methods are broadly applicable, usually require only matrix multiplications, and their complexity can be competitive with prior methods in some cases.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient general framework for computing L1 regularization paths, particularly useful for regularization problems in state space models, simplifying implementation complexity.

idea_spark.idea: Combining duality principles with message passing offers a unified computational perspective for regularizing different types of variables.
idea_spark.risk: Algorithm performance may depend on specific problem structures, and matrix multiplications could still become computational bottlenecks in some high-dimensional scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires extending message passing algorithms to broader optimization problems, using factor graph representations to simplify computation of complex regularization paths.

papers.title: Fučik spectrum for the operator with rapidly increasing weight and applications
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the Fučik spectrum for the operator with rapidly increasing weight, which is defined as a set $Σ$ comprising those $(α, β) \in \mathbb{R}^2$ such that \begin{equation*} \left\{\begin{array}{l} L u:=-Δu-\frac{1}{2}(x \cdot \nabla u)=αu^{+}-βu^{-}, \text{in}\ \mathbb{R}^N,\\ u\in X, \end{array}\right. \end{equation*} has a non-trivial solution $u$, where, $N\geq1$, $u^{ \pm}=\max ( \pm u, 0)$, $u=u^{+}-u^{-}$. The existence of a first nontrivial curve $\mathcal{C}$   of this spectrum, along with some of its properties (e.g., Lipschitz continuity, strict decrease and asymptotic behavior) is investigated in this paper. Our difficulty is that the problem is defined on the whole space $\mathbb{R}^N$, and therefore certain estimates do not carry over from the Fučik problem on bounded domains. As an application, we establish the multiplicity of solutions to the following problem \begin{equation*} \left\{\begin{array}{l} -Δu-\frac{1}{2}(x \cdot \nabla u)=f(x,u), \text{in}\ \mathbb{R}^N,\\ u\in X, \end{array}\right. \end{equation*} where, $N\geq1$ and the nonlinearity $f$ is asymptotically linear at zero and at infinity.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了具有快速增加权重的算子的Fučik谱，证明了第一非平凡曲线的存在性及其性质，并应用于非线性项在零点和无穷远处渐近线性的方程解的多重性。
ai.motivation: Fučik谱是研究非线性椭圆边值问题解的存在性和多重性的重要工具。在无界区域上，由于缺乏紧性，有界域上的估计方法不再适用，这构成了主要困难。
ai.method: 研究定义在全空间ℝ^N上的算子L的Fučik谱Σ。通过分析谱集的结构，证明第一非平凡曲线C的存在性，并研究其Lipschitz连续性、严格递减性和渐近行为等性质。
ai.result: 成功构造了Fučik谱的第一非平凡曲线，并获得了其关键性质。作为应用，证明了当非线性项f在零点和无穷远处渐近线性时，对应方程存在多个非平凡解。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理全空间上具有非标准权重的非线性椭圆问题提供了谱理论框架和具体存在性结果。

idea_spark.idea: 利用第一非平凡曲线的性质来控制非线性项，从而获得解的多重性。
idea_spark.risk: 方法严重依赖于权重的具体形式（如x·∇u项），推广到更一般的权重可能面临技术困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Fučik谱理论从有界域系统性地扩展到无界域，为研究更广泛的渐近线性问题开辟了新途径。

idea_spark.risk: 方法严重依赖于权重的具体形式（如x·∇u项），推广到更一般的权重可能面临技术困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Fučik谱理论从有界域系统性地扩展到无界域，为研究更广泛的渐近线性问题开辟了新途径。

en.tldr: This paper studies the Fučik spectrum for an operator with rapidly increasing weight, proves the existence and properties of the first nontrivial curve, and applies it to establish multiplicity of solutions for equations with asymptotically linear nonlinearities at zero and infinity.
en.motivation: The Fučik spectrum is a crucial tool for studying the existence and multiplicity of solutions to nonlinear elliptic boundary value problems. On unbounded domains, the lack of compactness prevents standard estimates from bounded domains from carrying over, posing the main difficulty.
en.method: Investigates the Fučik spectrum Σ of the operator L defined on the whole space ℝ^N. By analyzing the structure of the spectral set, proves the existence of the first nontrivial curve C and studies its properties such as Lipschitz continuity, strict decrease, and asymptotic behavior.
en.result: Successfully constructs the first nontrivial curve of the Fučik spectrum and obtains its key properties. As an application, proves the existence of multiple nontrivial solutions for equations where the nonlinearity f is asymptotically linear at both zero and infinity.
en.help_to_user: Provides a spectral theory framework and concrete existence results for handling nonlinear elliptic problems with non-standard weights on whole space.

idea_spark.idea: Utilize the properties of the first nontrivial curve to control the nonlinearity and thereby obtain solution multiplicity.
idea_spark.risk: The approach heavily depends on the specific form of the weight (e.g., the x·∇u term); generalization to more general weights may face technical hurdles.
idea_spark.inspiration: Systematically extends Fučik spectrum theory from bounded to unbounded domains, opening new avenues for studying a broader class of asymptotically linear problems.

papers.title: SetFlow: Generating Structured Sets of Representations for Multiple Instance Learning
papers.summary: Data scarcity and weak supervision continue to limit the performance of machine learning models in many real-world applications, such as mammography, where Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) often offers the best formulation. While recent foundation models provide strong semantic representations out of the box, effective augmentation of such representations of MIL data remains limited, as existing methods operate at the instance level and fail to capture intra-bag dependencies. In this work, we introduce SetFlow, a generative architecture that models entire MIL bags (i.e., sets) directly in the representation space. Our approach leverages the flow matching paradigm combined with a Set Transformer-inspired design, enabling it to handle permutation-invariant inputs while capturing interactions between instances within each bag. The model is conditioned on both class labels and input scale, allowing it to generate coherent and semantically consistent sets of representations. We evaluate SetFlow on a large-scale mammography benchmark using a state-of-the-art MIL-PF classification pipeline. The generated samples are shown to closely match the original data distribution and even improve downstream performance when used for augmentation. Furthermore, training on synthetic data alone shows competitive results, demonstrating the effectiveness of representation-space generative modeling for data-scarce and privacy-sensitive tasks.

ai.tldr: SetFlow是一种直接在表示空间中生成整个MIL包（即集合）的生成架构，用于解决数据稀缺和弱监督问题，在乳腺X光检查基准测试中表现优异。
ai.motivation: 现实应用（如乳腺X光检查）中数据稀缺和弱监督限制了机器学习性能，现有方法在实例级别操作，无法捕捉包内依赖关系。
ai.method: 结合流匹配范式与Set Transformer设计，处理排列不变输入并捕捉实例间交互，以类别标签和输入规模为条件生成连贯的表示集合。
ai.result: 生成样本与原始数据分布高度匹配，用于数据增强时可提升下游性能，仅使用合成数据训练也能获得有竞争力的结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为数据稀缺和隐私敏感任务提供了一种有效的表示空间生成建模方法，可生成语义一致的MIL包表示。

idea_spark.risk: 生成质量高度依赖于基础表示模型的质量；对于非常复杂或高维的表示空间可能难以建模。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将生成模型应用于其他弱监督或集合结构化数据的场景，如分子集合生成或多实例检测。

en.tldr: SetFlow is a generative architecture that models entire MIL bags directly in representation space, addressing data scarcity and weak supervision, showing strong performance on a mammography benchmark.
en.motivation: Data scarcity and weak supervision limit ML performance in real-world applications like mammography; existing instance-level methods fail to capture intra-bag dependencies.
en.method: Leverages flow matching combined with a Set Transformer design to handle permutation-invariant inputs and capture instance interactions, conditioned on class labels and input scale.
en.result: Generated samples closely match original data distribution, improve downstream performance when used for augmentation, and training on synthetic data alone yields competitive results.
en.help_to_user: Provides an effective representation-space generative modeling approach for data-scarce and privacy-sensitive tasks, generating semantically coherent sets of representations.

idea_spark.idea: Generate entire bags (sets) directly in representation space rather than individual instances, preserving intra-bag dependencies.
idea_spark.risk: Generation quality heavily depends on the base representation model; may struggle with very complex or high-dimensional representation spaces.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires applying generative modeling to other weakly supervised or set-structured data scenarios, such as molecular set generation or multi-instance detection.

papers.title: Long-Time Behaviors of Branching-Diffusion Processes via Spectral Analysis
papers.summary:
We study long-time behaviors for branching-diffusion process corresponding to the drifted Schrödinger operator $\mathcal{L} =  rac{1}{2} Δ+ \langle 
abla V,
abla angle - K$, where $K$ represents the reduction rate of a population dynamics and $
abla V$ is a given drift term. In particular, we establish exponential convergence rates for the total mass of this process and characterize its quasi-stationary distribution. The proof is based on a novel transformation in spectral analysis, and heat kernel estimates for Schrödinger operators with unbounded potentials. The result is new even in the one-dimensional setting, which especially improves the recent work \cite{CMS}.

ai.tldr: 本文通过谱分析研究了与漂移薛定谔算子相关的分支扩散过程的长时间行为，建立了总质量的指数收敛速度并刻画了拟平稳分布。
ai.motivation: 研究由漂移薛定谔算子描述的分支扩散过程的长时间渐近行为，其中K表示种群动态的减少率，∇V是给定的漂移项。
ai.method: 基于谱分析中的一种新颖变换，以及对具有无界势的薛定谔算子的热核估计。
ai.result: 建立了该过程总质量的指数收敛速度，并刻画了其拟平稳分布。该结果即使在一维情形下也是新的，特别改进了近期工作。
ai.help_to_user: 为分析具有漂移和分支的随机过程的长时间行为提供了严格的数学框架和收敛速率结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将分支扩散过程的长时间行为问题转化为薛定谔算子的谱分析问题。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于特定的算子结构和势函数假设，推广到更一般的算子可能需要额外的技术处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将概率论中的收敛问题与算子理论的谱性质联系起来，可能应用于生物种群模型或物理系统的长时间模拟。

en.tldr: This paper studies the long-time behavior of branching-diffusion processes associated with a drifted Schrödinger operator via spectral analysis, establishing exponential convergence rates for the total mass and characterizing the quasi-stationary distribution.
en.motivation: To investigate the long-time asymptotic behavior of branching-diffusion processes described by a drifted Schrödinger operator, where K represents the reduction rate in population dynamics and ∇V is a given drift term.
en.method: Based on a novel transformation in spectral analysis and heat kernel estimates for Schrödinger operators with unbounded potentials.
en.result: Establishes exponential convergence rates for the total mass of the process and characterizes its quasi-stationary distribution. The result is new even in the one-dimensional setting, particularly improving recent work.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework and convergence rate results for analyzing the long-time behavior of stochastic processes with drift and branching.

idea_spark.idea: Transform the long-time behavior problem of branching-diffusion processes into a spectral analysis problem for Schrödinger operators.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on specific operator structures and potential assumptions; generalization to more general operators may require additional technical handling.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires linking convergence problems in probability theory with spectral properties of operator theory, potentially applicable to biological population models or long-time simulations of physical systems.

papers.title: Training-inference input alignment outweighs framework choice in longitudinal retinal image prediction
papers.summary: Quantitative prediction of future retinal appearance from longitudinal imaging would support clinical decisions in progressive macular disease that currently rely on qualitative comparison or scalar progression scores. Recent methods have moved toward increasing generative complexity, but whether this complexity is necessary for slowly progressing retinal disease is unclear. We tested this through a controlled comparison of five conditioning configurations sharing one architecture and training dataset, spanning standard conditional diffusion, inference-aligned stochastic training, and deterministic regression. In our evaluation, aligning the training and inference input distributions produced large gains (delta-SSIM +0.082, SSIM +0.086, both p < 0.001), while the choice among aligned frameworks did not significantly affect any primary metric. Task-entropy and posterior-concentration analyses, replicated on two fundus autofluorescence (FAF) platforms, provided a mechanistic account: the predictable component of inter-visit change is small relative to time-invariant acquisition variability, leaving stochastic sampling with little width to exploit. Guided by these findings, we developed TRU (Temporal Retinal U-Net), a deterministic direct-regression model with continuous time-delta conditioning and multi-scale history aggregation. We evaluated TRU on 28,902 eyes across three imaging platforms: a mixed-disease Optos FAF cohort (9,942 eyes), zero-shot transfer to Stargardt macular dystrophy on Optos (288 eyes) and Heidelberg Spectralis (125 eyes), and a boundary evaluation on Cirrus en-face fundus images from a glaucoma cohort (18,547 eyes). TRU matched or exceeded delta-SSIM, SSIM, and PSNR in every FAF cohort against three state-of-the-art benchmarks, and its advantage grew monotonically with available history length.

ai.tldr: 本研究通过对比五种条件配置发现，在纵向视网膜图像预测中，训练与推理输入分布的对齐比生成框架的选择更为重要。基于此开发了确定性回归模型TRU，在多个数据集上超越现有方法。
ai.motivation: 进行性黄斑疾病的临床决策依赖定性比较或标量进展评分，定量预测未来视网膜外观可提供更好支持。
ai.method: 对比了五种共享架构和训练数据集的条件配置，包括标准条件扩散、推理对齐随机训练和确定性回归。开发了TRU模型，采用连续时间差条件和多尺度历史聚合。
ai.result: 训练-推理输入对齐带来显著提升（Δ-SSIM +0.082，SSIM +0.086），而对齐框架间的选择无显著差异。TRU在三个成像平台的28,902只眼睛上评估，在所有FAF队列中匹配或超越了最先进基准。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了视网膜疾病进展预测的实用方法，强调了输入对齐的重要性而非模型复杂性，为临床影像分析提供了高效解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 在缓慢进展的疾病中，可预测的变化分量相对于时间不变的采集变异较小，因此随机采样的优势有限。
idea_spark.risk: 结论可能主要适用于缓慢进展的视网膜疾病，在变化更剧烈或更复杂的医学影像任务中可能需要不同的方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发重新评估生成模型复杂性在特定医学任务中的必要性，优先考虑数据对齐和任务适配性。

en.tldr: This study found that aligning training and inference input distributions is more important than the choice of generative framework for longitudinal retinal image prediction. Based on this, a deterministic regression model TRU was developed, outperforming existing methods across multiple datasets.
en.motivation: Clinical decisions in progressive macular disease rely on qualitative comparison or scalar progression scores; quantitative prediction of future retinal appearance would provide better support.
en.method: Compared five conditioning configurations sharing one architecture and training dataset, including standard conditional diffusion, inference-aligned stochastic training, and deterministic regression. Developed TRU model with continuous time-delta conditioning and multi-scale history aggregation.
en.result: Training-inference input alignment produced large gains (Δ-SSIM +0.082, SSIM +0.086), while choice among aligned frameworks did not significantly affect primary metrics. TRU evaluated on 28,902 eyes across three imaging platforms, matching or exceeding state-of-the-art benchmarks in every FAF cohort.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical approach for retinal disease progression prediction, emphasizing the importance of input alignment over model complexity, offering an efficient solution for clinical image analysis.

idea_spark.idea: In slowly progressing diseases, the predictable component of change is small relative to time-invariant acquisition variability, leaving stochastic sampling with little advantage.
idea_spark.risk: Conclusions may primarily apply to slowly progressing retinal diseases; different approaches may be needed for medical imaging tasks with more dramatic or complex changes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires re-evaluation of the necessity of generative model complexity for specific medical tasks, prioritizing data alignment and task suitability.

papers.title: On convergence rates of subgradient descent on semialgebraic functions
papers.summary: We analyze the constant step size subgradient method on nonsmooth, nonconvex functions. We identify geometric assumptions on the objective function under which i) its domain admits a partition (stratification) into smooth manifolds (strata) on which the function is smooth; ii) a global projection formula for Clarke subgradients holds; and iii) quantitative curvature bounds hold on each stratum. Under these conditions, we prove that the iterates of the subgradient method locally shadow a Riemannian gradient descent on nearby strata, which we use to measure stationarity. We introduce a selection rule for the active stratum and develop a mechanism that assembles local descent inequalities across successive strata into explicit convergence rates. These rates are expressed in terms of the number of dimensions present in the stratification, improve as the number of strata decreases, and recover, up to constants, the classical rates in the smooth case. We show that the stated assumptions follow from the existence of Lipschitz stratifications of semialgebraic sets, and are therefore automatically satisfied for semialgebraic functions and, more generally, for functions definable in polynomially bounded o-minimal structures, yielding the first known convergence rates in these settings. As intermediate results of independent interest, we establish tubular neighborhood estimates for Lipschitz stratifications and a global projection formula for Clarke subgradients. Finally, we show that our framework extends to decreasing step size and recovers, via an alternative argument, the recently announced result of Lai and Song on sequential convergence of the subgradient method with step sizes 1/k.

ai.tldr: 本文分析了非光滑非凸函数上的常步长次梯度方法，在满足特定几何假设（如函数定义域可分层为光滑流形）的条件下，证明了迭代点会局部跟随附近流形上的黎曼梯度下降，并推导出显式收敛速率。这些假设对半代数函数自动成立。
ai.motivation: 非光滑非凸优化问题（如半代数函数）的次梯度方法收敛性理论尚不完善，缺乏收敛速率分析。现有研究多关注光滑或凸情形，需要建立适用于更广泛函数类的收敛理论框架。
ai.method: 提出几何假设：定义域可分层为光滑流形，Clarke次梯度满足全局投影公式，各层曲率有界。在此基础上，证明迭代点局部跟随附近流形的黎曼梯度下降，引入活跃层选择规则，并将逐层下降不等式组装为整体收敛速率。
ai.result: 获得了以分层维数表示的显式收敛速率，速率随层数减少而改善，并在光滑情形下恢复经典速率。证明了半代数函数及更一般的多项式有界o-极小结构可定义函数自动满足假设，首次为这些设置提供了收敛速率。
ai.help_to_user: 为非光滑非凸优化（特别是半代数函数）的次梯度方法提供了首个收敛速率理论框架，将黎曼几何工具引入次梯度分析，建立了分层结构与收敛性的定量联系。

idea_spark.idea: 将复杂函数定义域分解为光滑流形层，在每层上利用光滑优化理论，再通过机制组装跨层结果。
idea_spark.risk: 几何假设（如Lipschitz分层存在性）的验证在非半代数函数中可能困难，实际应用受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将微分几何与优化理论结合，用流形结构刻画非光滑函数的局部行为，为复杂函数类的算法分析提供新视角。

en.tldr: This paper analyzes the constant step size subgradient method on nonsmooth, nonconvex functions. Under geometric assumptions (e.g., the domain admits a stratification into smooth manifolds), it proves that iterates locally shadow Riemannian gradient descent on nearby strata and derives explicit convergence rates. These assumptions hold automatically for semialgebraic functions.
en.motivation: Convergence theory for subgradient methods on nonsmooth nonconvex problems (e.g., semialgebraic functions) is incomplete, lacking rate analysis. Existing work focuses on smooth or convex cases, necessitating a framework for broader function classes.
en.method: Proposes geometric assumptions: domain stratifiable into smooth manifolds, global projection formula for Clarke subgradients, and curvature bounds on strata. Proves iterates locally shadow Riemannian gradient descent on nearby strata, introduces an active stratum selection rule, and assembles local descent inequalities across strata into global convergence rates.
en.result: Obtains explicit convergence rates expressed in terms of stratification dimension, improving as the number of strata decreases, and recovering classical smooth-case rates. Shows assumptions hold automatically for semialgebraic functions and more generally for polynomially bounded o-minimal structures, providing first known rates in these settings.
en.help_to_user: Provides the first convergence rate framework for subgradient methods on nonsmooth nonconvex optimization (especially semialgebraic functions), introducing Riemannian geometric tools into subgradient analysis and establishing quantitative links between stratification structure and convergence.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose complex function domains into smooth manifold strata, leverage smooth optimization theory on each stratum, and assemble results across strata via a mechanism.
idea_spark.risk: Verification of geometric assumptions (e.g., existence of Lipschitz stratifications) may be difficult for non-semialgebraic functions, limiting practical applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining differential geometry with optimization theory, using manifold structures to characterize local behavior of nonsmooth functions, offering new perspectives for analyzing algorithms on complex function classes.

papers.title: IDOBE: Infectious Disease Outbreak forecasting Benchmark Ecosystem
papers.summary: Epidemic forecasting has become an integral part of real-time infectious disease outbreak response. While collaborative ensembles composed of statistical and machine learning models have become the norm for real-time forecasting, standardized benchmark datasets for evaluating such methods are lacking. Further, there is limited understanding on performance of these methods for novel outbreaks with limited historical data. In this paper, we propose IDOBE, a curated collection of epidemiological time series focused on outbreak forecasting. IDOBE compiles from multiple data repositories spanning over a century of surveillance and across U.S. states and global locations. We perform derivative-based segmentation to generate over 10,000 outbreaks covering multiple outcomes such as cases and hospitalizations for 13 diseases. We consider a variety of information-theoretic and distributional measures to quantify the epidemiological diversity of the dataset. Finally, we perform multi-horizon short-term forecasting (1- to 4-week-ahead) through the progression of the outbreak using 11 baseline models and report on their performance. In addition to standard metrics such as NMSE and MAPE for point forecasts, we include probabilistic scoring rules such as Normalized Weighted Interval Score (NWIS) to quantify the performance. We find that MLP-based methods have the most robust performance, with statistical methods having a slight edge during the pre-peak phase. IDOBE dataset along with baselines are released publicly on https://github.com/NSSAC/IDOBE to enable standardized, reproducible benchmarking of outbreak forecasting methods.

ai.tldr: IDOBE是一个用于传染病暴发预测的标准化基准生态系统，包含超过一个世纪的流行病学时间序列数据、超过10,000次暴发事件，并评估了11种基线模型的性能。
ai.motivation: 实时传染病暴发预测已成为应对疫情的关键部分，但缺乏标准化的基准数据集来评估统计和机器学习模型，且对新发疫情的性能理解有限。
ai.method: 从多个数据仓库收集跨越一个多世纪的流行病学时间序列数据，使用基于导数的分割方法生成超过10,000次暴发事件，涵盖13种疾病的病例和住院情况。采用信息论和分布度量量化数据集的流行病学多样性，并使用11种基线模型进行多时间范围（1-4周）短期预测。
ai.result: MLP-based方法表现出最稳健的性能，统计方法在疫情峰值前阶段略有优势。数据集和基线模型已公开，以支持标准化、可重复的基准测试。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究人员提供了一个标准化的基准数据集和评估框架，用于开发和比较传染病暴发预测模型，促进可重复研究。

en.tldr: IDOBE is a standardized benchmark ecosystem for infectious disease outbreak forecasting, containing over a century of epidemiological time series data, over 10,000 outbreak events, and evaluating the performance of 11 baseline models.
en.motivation: Real-time infectious disease outbreak forecasting has become integral to outbreak response, but standardized benchmark datasets for evaluating statistical and machine learning models are lacking, and performance on novel outbreaks with limited historical data is poorly understood.
en.method: Compiled epidemiological time series from multiple data repositories spanning over a century. Used derivative-based segmentation to generate over 10,000 outbreaks covering 13 diseases. Quantified dataset diversity using information-theoretic and distributional measures. Conducted multi-horizon short-term forecasting (1- to 4-week-ahead) using 11 baseline models.
en.result: MLP-based methods demonstrated the most robust performance, with statistical methods having a slight edge during the pre-peak phase. The IDOBE dataset and baselines are publicly released to enable standardized, reproducible benchmarking.
en.help_to_user: Provides researchers with a standardized benchmark dataset and evaluation framework for developing and comparing outbreak forecasting models, promoting reproducible research.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the IDOBE benchmark framework to other types of public health event forecasting, such as substance abuse trends or chronic disease incidence.
idea_spark.risk: Historical data representativeness may not fully capture the unique transmission dynamics of future novel pathogens.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporate multi-source heterogeneous data (e.g., mobility, climate) to enhance the generalization capability of forecasting models.

papers.title: The Multi-Block DC Function Class: Theory, Algorithms, and Applications
papers.summary: We present the Multi-Block DC (BDC) class, a rich class of structured nonconvex functions that admit a DC ("difference-of-convex") decomposition across parameter blocks. This multi-block class not only subsumes the usual DC programming, but also turns out to be provably more powerful. Specifically, we demonstrate how standard models (e.g., polynomials and tensor factorization) must have DC decompositions of exponential size, while their BDC formulation is polynomial. This separation in complexity also underscores another key aspect: unlike DC formulations, obtaining BDC formulations for problems is vastly easier and constructive. We illustrate this aspect by presenting explicit BDC formulations for modern tasks such as deep ReLU networks, a result with no known equivalent in the DC class. Moreover, we complement the theory by developing algorithms with non-asymptotic convergence theory, including both batch and stochastic settings, and demonstrate the broad applicability of our method through several applications.

ai.tldr: 提出了多块DC函数类，一种具有跨参数块DC分解的结构化非凸函数类，比传统DC类更强大且易于构造，并开发了具有非渐近收敛理论的算法。
ai.motivation: 传统DC规划在处理某些标准模型（如多项式、张量分解）时需要指数规模的DC分解，限制了其实际应用。
ai.method: 定义多块DC函数类，证明其比传统DC类更强大且易于构造，为深度ReLU网络等现代任务提供显式构造，并开发批量与随机设置的收敛算法。
ai.result: 多块DC公式化具有多项式复杂度，而传统DC分解可能是指数级的；算法具有非渐近收敛理论；展示了在多个应用中的广泛适用性。
ai.help_to_user: 为结构化非凸优化问题提供了一个更强大且易于使用的理论框架与算法工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将DC分解从全局扩展到分块结构，以降低复杂度并提高可构造性。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中块结构的定义与识别可能具有挑战性；算法性能可能依赖于块的选择。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将复杂全局结构分解为局部可处理块的思想，用于设计更高效的优化框架。

zh.tldr: 提出了多块DC函数类，一种具有跨参数块DC分解的结构化非凸函数类，比传统DC类更强大且易于构造，并开发了具有非渐近收敛理论的算法。

idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中块结构的定义与识别可能具有挑战性；算法性能可能依赖于块的选择。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将复杂全局结构分解为局部可处理块的思想，用于设计更高效的优化框架。

en.tldr: Introduces the Multi-Block DC function class, a structured nonconvex function class admitting DC decomposition across parameter blocks, which is more powerful and easier to construct than traditional DC class, with algorithms having non-asymptotic convergence theory.
en.motivation: Standard DC programming may require exponential-size DC decompositions for models like polynomials and tensor factorization, limiting practical applicability.
en.method: Define the Multi-Block DC class, prove its superiority and ease of construction over traditional DC, provide explicit formulations for modern tasks like deep ReLU networks, and develop batch and stochastic algorithms with convergence guarantees.
en.result: Multi-Block DC formulations have polynomial complexity versus possible exponential for traditional DC; algorithms have non-asymptotic convergence theory; broad applicability demonstrated across several applications.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more powerful and tractable theoretical framework and algorithmic tools for structured nonconvex optimization problems.

idea_spark.idea: Extend DC decomposition from global to block-wise structure to reduce complexity and improve constructibility.
idea_spark.risk: Defining and identifying block structures in practice may be challenging; algorithm performance may depend on block choices.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the idea of decomposing complex global structures into locally manageable blocks for designing more efficient optimization frameworks.

papers.title: Exact Simulation from Tempered Stable Distributions with Infinite Variation ($α\ge1$)
papers.summary: We develop the first exact and computationally tractable method for simulating from tempered stable distributions in the infinite variation case, which corresponds to $α\in[1,2)$. A small simulation study shows that the approach works well.

ai.tldr: 提出了首个针对无限变差情况（α∈[1,2)）的调和稳定分布精确模拟方法，该方法计算可行。
ai.motivation: 无限变差情况下的调和稳定分布缺乏精确且计算可行的模拟方法。
ai.method: 开发了一种新的精确模拟算法，适用于α∈[1,2)的参数范围。
ai.result: 小型模拟研究表明该方法运行良好。
ai.help_to_user: 为在无限变差情况下模拟调和稳定分布提供了首个精确且实用的工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将精确模拟技术扩展到更广泛的参数范围（α≥1）。
idea_spark.risk: 算法在高维或更复杂分布中的计算效率未知。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可能启发其他复杂概率分布的精确模拟方案。

en.tldr: Proposes the first exact and computationally tractable simulation method for tempered stable distributions in the infinite variation case (α∈[1,2)).
en.motivation: Lack of exact and computationally feasible simulation methods for tempered stable distributions in the infinite variation case.
en.method: Develops a new exact simulation algorithm applicable for the parameter range α∈[1,2).
en.result: A small simulation study shows the approach works well.
en.help_to_user: Provides the first exact and practical tool for simulating tempered stable distributions in the infinite variation case.

idea_spark.idea: Extending exact simulation techniques to broader parameter ranges (α≥1).
idea_spark.risk: Computational efficiency in higher dimensions or more complex distributions is unknown.
idea_spark.inspiration: The method may inspire exact simulation schemes for other complex probability distributions.

papers.title: Back to Repair: A Minimal Denoising Network\ for Time Series Anomaly Detection
papers.summary: We introduce JuRe (Just Repair), a minimal denoising network for time series anomaly detection that exposes a central finding: architectural complexity is unnecessary when the training objective correctly implements the manifold-projection principle. JuRe consists of a single depthwise-separable convolutional residual block with hidden dimension 128, trained to repair corrupted time series windows and scored at inference by a fixed, parameter-free structural discrepancy function. Despite using no attention, no latent variable, and no adversarial component, JuRe ranks second on the TSB-AD multivariate benchmark (AUC-PR 0.404, 180 series, 17 datasets) and second on the UCR univariate archive by AUC-PR (0.198, 250 series), leading all neural baselines on AUC-PR and VUS-PR. Component ablation on TSB-AD identifies training-time corruption as the dominant factor ($Δ$AUC-PR $= 0.047$ on removal), confirming that the denoising objective, not network capacity, drives detection quality. Pairwise Wilcoxon signed-rank tests establish statistical significance against 21 of 25 baselines on TSB-AD. Code is available at the URL https://github.com/iis-esslingen/JuRe.

ai.tldr: JuRe是一个极简去噪网络，仅使用单个深度可分离卷积残差块，通过修复损坏时间序列实现异常检测，在TSB-AD和UCR基准上达到领先的神经网络性能。
ai.motivation: 现有时间序列异常检测模型架构复杂，但研究发现网络容量并非关键，正确的训练目标（流形投影原理）才是核心。
ai.method: 使用隐藏维度128的单层深度可分离卷积残差块，训练时修复损坏时间序列窗口，推理时通过无参数结构差异函数计算异常分数。
ai.result: 在TSB-AD多变量基准（AUC-PR 0.404）排名第二，在UCR单变量档案（AUC-PR 0.198）排名第二，在21/25基线对比中具有统计显著性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种极简高效的异常检测架构，证明复杂组件（注意力、潜变量、对抗训练）对检测质量非必需。

idea_spark.idea: 用极简网络验证训练目标比架构复杂度更重要，可指导其他领域模型设计。
idea_spark.risk: 极简架构可能对某些复杂异常模式表达能力有限，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发重新思考异常检测的本质，探索更多无参数评分函数与简单网络的组合。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发重新思考异常检测的本质，探索更多无参数评分函数与简单网络的组合。

en.tldr: JuRe is a minimal denoising network using a single depthwise-separable convolutional residual block to detect anomalies by repairing corrupted time series, achieving leading neural baseline performance on TSB-AD and UCR benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing time series anomaly detection models have complex architectures, but network capacity is not critical; the correct training objective (manifold-projection principle) is core.
en.method: A single depthwise-separable convolutional residual block with hidden dimension 128 is trained to repair corrupted time series windows, with inference scoring via a parameter-free structural discrepancy function.
en.result: Ranks second on TSB-AD multivariate benchmark (AUC-PR 0.404) and second on UCR univariate archive (AUC-PR 0.198), with statistical significance against 21/25 baselines.
en.help_to_user: Provides a minimal yet efficient anomaly detection architecture, demonstrating that complex components (attention, latent variables, adversarial training) are unnecessary for detection quality.

idea_spark.idea: Using minimal networks to validate that training objectives matter more than architectural complexity can guide model design in other domains.
idea_spark.risk: Extremely simple architectures may have limited expressive power for certain complex anomaly patterns, requiring generalization validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires rethinking the essence of anomaly detection and exploring more combinations of parameter-free scoring functions with simple networks.

papers.title: Forecasting Ionospheric Irregularities on GNSS Lines of Sight Using Dynamic Graphs with Ephemeris Conditioning
papers.summary: Most data-driven ionospheric forecasting models operate on gridded products, which do not preserve the time-varying sampling structure of satellite-based sensing. We instead model the ionosphere as a dynamic graph over ionospheric pierce points (IPPs), with connectivity that evolves as satellite positions change. Because satellite trajectories are predictable, the graph topology over the forecast horizon can be constructed in advance. We exploit this property to condition forecasts on the future graph structure, which we term ephemeris conditioning. This enables prediction on lines of sight that appear only in the forecast horizon. We evaluate our framework on multi-GNSS (Global Navigation Satellite System) data from a co-located receiver pair in Singapore spanning January 2023 through April 2025. The task is to forecast Rate of TEC Index (ROTI)-defined irregularities at 5-minute cadence up to 2 hours ahead as binary probabilistic classification per node. The resulting model, IonoDGNN, achieves a Brier Skill Score (BSS) of 0.49 and a precision-recall area under the curve (PR-AUC) of 0.75, improving over persistence by 35\% in BSS and 52\% in PR-AUC, with larger gains at longer lead times. Ablations confirm that graph structure and ephemeris conditioning each contribute meaningfully, with conditioning proving essential for satellites that rise during the forecast horizon (receiver operating characteristic AUC: 0.95 vs.\ 0.52 without). Under simulated coverage dropout, the model retains predictive skill on affected nodes through spatial message passing from observed neighbors. These results suggest that dynamic graph forecasting on evolving lines of sight is a viable alternative to grid-based representations for ionospheric irregularity forecasting. The model and evaluation code will be released upon publication.

ai.tldr: 本文提出IonoDGNN模型，通过动态图结构和星历条件化，预测GNSS视线上的电离层不规则性，相比传统网格方法性能显著提升。
ai.motivation: 大多数数据驱动的电离层预测模型使用网格化产品，未能保留卫星传感的时变采样结构。
ai.method: 将电离层建模为电离层穿刺点上的动态图，利用可预测的卫星轨迹预先构建预测时域内的图拓扑，实现星历条件化预测。
ai.result: 在2023年1月至2025年4月的新加坡共置接收机数据上，模型Brier技能评分达0.49，PR-AUC达0.75，比持续性预测分别提升35%和52%。
ai.help_to_user: 为电离层不规则性预测提供了基于动态图的新范式，特别适用于预测时域内新出现的卫星视线。

idea_spark.idea: 利用可预测的系统状态（如卫星轨迹）预先构建未来图结构，作为预测的条件输入。
idea_spark.risk: 模型性能可能依赖于准确的卫星轨道预测，轨道误差可能影响预测精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将物理系统的可预测运动模式转化为图结构的先验知识，可增强时空预测模型的泛化能力。

zh.result: 在2023年1月至2025年4月的新加坡共置接收机数据上，模型Brier技能评分达0.49，PR-AUC达0.75，比持续性预测分别提升35%和52%。
zh.help_to_user: 为电离层不规则性预测提供了基于动态图的新范式，特别适用于预测时域内新出现的卫星视线。

idea_spark.idea: 利用可预测的系统状态（如卫星轨迹）预先构建未来图结构，作为预测的条件输入。
idea_spark.risk: 模型性能可能依赖于准确的卫星轨道预测，轨道误差可能影响预测精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将物理系统的可预测运动模式转化为图结构的先验知识，可增强时空预测模型的泛化能力。

en.tldr: This paper proposes IonoDGNN, a model that forecasts ionospheric irregularities on GNSS lines of sight using dynamic graphs with ephemeris conditioning, achieving significant improvements over grid-based approaches.
en.motivation: Most data-driven ionospheric forecasting models operate on gridded products, which do not preserve the time-varying sampling structure of satellite-based sensing.
en.method: Model the ionosphere as a dynamic graph over ionospheric pierce points, exploiting predictable satellite trajectories to construct future graph topology in advance through ephemeris conditioning.
en.result: Evaluated on multi-GNSS data from Singapore (Jan 2023-Apr 2025), the model achieves a Brier Skill Score of 0.49 and PR-AUC of 0.75, improving over persistence by 35% and 52% respectively.
en.help_to_user: Provides a novel dynamic graph-based paradigm for ionospheric irregularity forecasting, particularly effective for lines of sight that appear only in the forecast horizon.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage predictable system states (e.g., satellite trajectories) to pre-construct future graph structures as conditional inputs for forecasting.
idea_spark.risk: Model performance may depend on accurate satellite orbit predictions; orbital errors could degrade forecasting accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Transforming predictable physical motion patterns into graph structure priors can enhance generalization in spatiotemporal prediction models.

papers.title: Existence theorems for nonlinear stationary Kolmogorov equations with partially degenerate diffusion matrices
papers.summary: We study nonlinear stationary Kolmogorov equations with degenerate diffusion matrices and discontinuous coefficients. The existence of a solution is proved. We propose a new approach based on an integral condition with Lyapunov functions and a regularity of projections of solutions in the partially degenerate case. Examples are given to illustrate the results.

ai.motivation: 处理具有部分退化扩散矩阵和不连续系数的非线性平稳Kolmogorov方程解的存在性问题，这类方程在数学物理中常见但分析困难。
ai.method: 提出了一种基于李雅普诺夫函数积分条件和部分退化情况下解投影正则性的新方法。
ai.result: 证明了方程解的存在性，并通过示例说明了结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为分析具有退化和不连续性的非线性平稳方程提供了新的存在性证明框架。

idea_spark.idea: 该方法可迁移至其他具有退化或奇异性的偏微分方程存在性研究中。

en.tldr: This paper studies nonlinear stationary Kolmogorov equations with degenerate diffusion matrices and discontinuous coefficients, proving the existence of solutions.
en.motivation: To address the existence problem for nonlinear stationary Kolmogorov equations with partially degenerate diffusion matrices and discontinuous coefficients, which are common in mathematical physics but analytically challenging.
en.method: A new approach based on an integral condition with Lyapunov functions and regularity of projections of solutions in the partially degenerate case.
en.result: Existence of a solution is proved, and examples are given to illustrate the results.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new existence proof framework for analyzing nonlinear stationary equations with degeneracy and discontinuities.

idea_spark.idea: This methodology could be transferred to existence studies of other PDEs with degeneracy or singularities.
idea_spark.risk: Requires lower regularity of coefficients but needs verification of projection regularity conditions in specific applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining functional analysis and dynamical systems tools to address theoretical problems in complex diffusion processes.

papers.title: Multi-domain spectral approach for Zakharov-Kuznetsov equations in 3D with cylindrical symmetry
papers.summary: We present a novel numerical framework for studying nonlinear dispersive equations in higher-dimensional settings, specifically designed for solutions featuring traveling waves along a preferred axis (or field-aligned traveling waves). Using the three-dimensional generalized Zakharov-Kuznetsov (gZK) equation as a model, we convert it into cylindrical coordinates and implement a domain decomposition strategy.   By partitioning the computational domain into distinct regions based on expected solution behavior, we significantly reduce computational complexity while maintaining the high resolution necessary for capturing small-scale dynamics. Another key innovation of our method is the ability to efficiently handle fractional nonlinearities, specifically, the critical power $p = 7/3$ in 3D, which typically introduces significant computational overhead and numerical instabilities that compromise simulation accuracy.   Using this framework, we are able to investigate the dynamics of solutions (with cylindrical symmetry) close to the ground state soliton and show that for the 3D critical ZK equation, the ground state serves as the sharp threshold for global vs. finite time existence of solutions. Our method successfully tracks the profiles of these singular solutions, providing new insights into the dynamics of wave collapse in three-dimensional magnetized media.

ai.tldr: 提出一种用于三维柱对称Zakharov-Kuznetsov方程的多域谱方法，通过域分解策略高效处理临界非线性并揭示基态孤子的动力学阈值。
ai.motivation: 高维非线性色散方程（如ZK方程）在磁化介质中具有重要物理意义，但传统数值方法难以高效处理临界非线性（p=7/3）和小尺度动力学。
ai.method: 将三维广义ZK方程转换为柱坐标，基于解的行为特征进行域分解，在不同区域采用谱方法，显著降低计算复杂度同时保持高分辨率。
ai.result: 成功追踪近基态孤子解的演化，证明基态是三维临界ZK方程解全局存在与有限时间存在的尖锐阈值，为波坍缩动力学提供新见解。
ai.help_to_user: 为高维非线性波方程提供可处理临界非线性和奇异解的高效数值框架，适用于磁化等离子体等物理系统的模拟。

idea_spark.idea: 将解的行为特征作为域分解依据，而非固定几何分区，可动态优化计算资源分配。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于解的对称性假设；临界非线性处理可能对初值条件敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将机器学习用于自适应域分解；可探索该方法在量子流体或天体物理模拟中的应用。

en.tldr: A multi-domain spectral approach for 3D cylindrically symmetric Zakharov-Kuznetsov equations, using domain decomposition to efficiently handle critical nonlinearities and reveal the ground state soliton as a sharp threshold for solution existence.
en.motivation: Higher-dimensional nonlinear dispersive equations like the ZK equation are physically significant in magnetized media, but conventional numerical methods struggle with critical nonlinearities (p=7/3) and small-scale dynamics.
en.method: Transform the 3D generalized ZK equation to cylindrical coordinates, implement domain decomposition based on expected solution behavior, and apply spectral methods in different regions to reduce computational complexity while maintaining high resolution.
en.result: Successfully track evolution of solutions near the ground state soliton, demonstrating it serves as the sharp threshold between global and finite-time existence for the 3D critical ZK equation, providing new insights into wave collapse dynamics.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient numerical framework for high-dimensional nonlinear wave equations capable of handling critical nonlinearities and singular solutions, applicable to simulations of magnetized plasmas and similar physical systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using solution behavior characteristics rather than fixed geometric partitions for domain decomposition could dynamically optimize computational resource allocation.
idea_spark.risk: Method relies on symmetry assumptions; critical nonlinearity handling may be sensitive to initial conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires using machine learning for adaptive domain decomposition; could explore applications in quantum fluid or astrophysical simulations.

papers.title: Zak-OTFS: A Predictable Physical Layer for Communications and Sensing
papers.summary: This tutorial derives the mathematical foundations of what it means for a carrier waveform to be predictable and non-selective. We focus on Zak-OTFS, where each carrier waveform is a pulse in the delay-Doppler (DD) domain, formally a quasi-periodic localized function with specific periods along delay and Doppler. Viewed in the time domain, the Zak-OTFS carrier is realized as a pulse train modulated by a tone (termed a pulsone).   We start by providing physical intuition, describing what it means for the Zak-OTFS carrier waveforms to be geometric modes of the Heisenberg-Weyl (HW) group of discrete delay and Doppler shifts that define the discrete-time communication model. In fact, we show that these geometric modes are common eigenvectors of a maximal commutative subgroup of our discrete HW group.   When the channel delay spread is less than the delay period, and the channel Doppler spread is less than the Doppler period, we show that the Zak-OTFS input-output (I/O) relation is predictable and non-selective. Given the I/O response at one DD point in a frame, it is possible to predict the I/O response at all other points, without recourse to some mathematical model of the channel. While it may be intuitive that geometric modes of the HW group are predictable and non-selective wireless carriers, this is not a requirement. We provide a necessary and sufficient condition that depends on the ambiguity properties of the basis of carrier waveforms. In fact, we show that the structure of a pulse train modulated by a Hadamard matrix is common to several families of waveforms proposed for 6G, including Zak-OTFS, AFDM, OTSM and ODDM.

ai.tldr: 本教程推导了Zak-OTFS波形作为可预测、非选择性载波的数学基础，展示了其在延迟-多普勒域中的准周期特性及其在6G通信与感知中的应用潜力。
ai.motivation: 为下一代无线通信系统（如6G）开发一种具有可预测输入输出关系的物理层，以应对高动态信道环境下的可靠通信与感知需求。
ai.method: 从Heisenberg-Weyl群的几何模式出发，将Zak-OTFS载波构造为延迟-多普勒域中的准周期脉冲（称为pulsone），并分析其在信道延迟扩展和多普勒扩展受限条件下的输入输出关系。
ai.result: 当信道延迟扩展小于延迟周期且多普勒扩展小于多普勒周期时，Zak-OTFS的输入输出关系具有可预测性和非选择性，无需依赖信道数学模型即可预测整个帧内的响应。
ai.help_to_user: 为通信工程师提供了Zak-OTFS波形的严格数学框架，揭示了其作为可预测物理层的本质特性，有助于设计更稳健的6G系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用准周期脉冲序列（pulsone）作为载波，实现延迟-多普勒域中的可预测传输。
idea_spark.risk: 实际信道可能超出延迟/多普勒周期假设，导致预测性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: Zak-OTFS与AFDM、OTSM、ODDM等6G候选波形共享Hadamard矩阵调制的脉冲序列结构，暗示了统一的设计范式。

en.tldr: This tutorial derives the mathematical foundations of Zak-OTFS waveforms as predictable and non-selective carriers, demonstrating their quasi-periodic properties in the delay-Doppler domain and their potential for 6G communications and sensing.
en.motivation: To develop a predictable physical layer for next-generation wireless systems (e.g., 6G) that can ensure reliable communication and sensing in highly dynamic channel environments.
en.method: Starting from geometric modes of the Heisenberg-Weyl group, Zak-OTFS carriers are constructed as quasi-periodic pulses in the delay-Doppler domain (termed pulsones), and their input-output relation is analyzed under constraints on channel delay and Doppler spreads.
en.result: When channel delay spread is less than the delay period and Doppler spread is less than the Doppler period, the Zak-OTFS input-output relation is predictable and non-selective, enabling prediction of responses across a frame without a channel model.
en.help_to_user: Provides communication engineers with a rigorous mathematical framework for Zak-OTFS waveforms, revealing their fundamental properties as a predictable physical layer for designing more robust 6G systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using quasi-periodic pulse trains (pulsones) as carriers to achieve predictable transmission in the delay-Doppler domain.
idea_spark.risk: Practical channels may exceed assumed delay/Doppler period constraints, degrading prediction performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Zak-OTFS shares a pulse-train structure modulated by Hadamard matrices with other 6G candidate waveforms like AFDM, OTSM, and ODDM, suggesting a unified design paradigm.

papers.title: Gibbs Measures on Symbolic Spaces: A Unified Treatment of Five Characterizations with Explicit Constants
papers.summary: We prove that five characterizations of Gibbs measures for Hölder potentials on topologically mixing subshifts of finite type are equivalent: the Jacobian condition, the classical cylinder-based Gibbs property, the eigenmeasure of the Ruelle transfer operator, the variational equilibrium state, and the minimizer of the large deviations rate function. The equivalence is established in a single theorem with explicit constants expressed in terms of the Hölder exponent, the potential norm, the alphabet size, and the mixing time. The proof yields explicit spectral gap estimates for the transfer operator via the Birkhoff cone contraction technique, Lipschitz stability of the Gibbs measure in Wasserstein distance under perturbation of the potential, and statistical limit theorems including a central limit theorem with Berry-Esseen bounds and a large deviations principle. This paper constitutes Part I of a six-part series on the thermodynamic formalism for hyperbolic dynamical systems.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了符号动力系统中 Gibbs 测度的五种刻画等价性，并给出了显式常数估计。
ai.motivation: Gibbs 测度在动力系统与统计力学中至关重要，但不同刻画间的等价性证明通常分散且缺乏显式常数。
ai.method: 使用 Birkhoff 锥压缩技术分析 Ruelle 转移算子的谱隙，并利用混合时间、字母表大小等参数推导显式常数。
ai.result: 建立了 Jacobian 条件、柱集 Gibbs 性、Ruelle 算子本征测度、变分平衡态与大偏差率函数极小化五种刻画的等价性，并得到谱隙估计、Wasserstein 稳定性及统计极限定理。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究双曲动力系统的热力学形式提供了统一的框架与显式常数工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将五种不同数学物理视角下的 Gibbs 测度刻画统一于单一定理，并量化其等价关系中的常数。
idea_spark.risk: 显式常数依赖于系统参数（如混合时间、Hölder 指数），对于参数极端的情形可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该框架可扩展至非均匀双曲系统或无限字母表符号空间，研究 Gibbs 测度的相应刻画与稳定性。

en.tldr: This paper proves the equivalence of five characterizations of Gibbs measures for Hölder potentials on subshifts of finite type, with explicit constant estimates.
en.motivation: Gibbs measures are central in dynamical systems and statistical mechanics, but proofs of equivalence between different characterizations are often scattered and lack explicit constants.
en.method: Employ the Birkhoff cone contraction technique to analyze the spectral gap of the Ruelle transfer operator, deriving explicit constants in terms of mixing time, alphabet size, and other parameters.
en.result: Established equivalence among the Jacobian condition, cylinder Gibbs property, eigenmeasure of the Ruelle operator, variational equilibrium state, and minimizer of the large deviations rate function, with spectral gap estimates, Wasserstein stability, and statistical limit theorems.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified framework with explicit constants for studying the thermodynamic formalism of hyperbolic dynamical systems.

idea_spark.idea: Unify five different mathematical-physical perspectives on Gibbs measures into a single theorem and quantify the constants in their equivalence relations.
idea_spark.risk: Explicit constants depend on system parameters (e.g., mixing time, Hölder exponent) and may fail in extreme parameter regimes.
idea_spark.inspiration: The framework could be extended to non-uniformly hyperbolic systems or symbolic spaces with infinite alphabets to study corresponding characterizations and stability of Gibbs measures.

papers.title: Wave operators for Jacobi matrices
papers.summary: We study the wave operators for a Jacobi matrix whose spectral measure satisfies the Szegö condition. We prove existence and completeness of wave operators under a mild additional assumption on the Verblunsky coefficients of the associated measure on the unit circle.

ai.tldr: 研究满足Szegö条件的Jacobi矩阵的波算符，在Verblunsky系数的温和附加假设下证明了波算符的存在性和完备性。
ai.motivation: Jacobi矩阵的波算符在散射理论和谱分析中具有重要作用，但对其存在性和完备性的充分条件仍需深入研究。
ai.method: 利用Jacobi矩阵的谱测度满足Szegö条件，并结合单位圆上相关测度的Verblunsky系数的附加假设进行分析。
ai.result: 证明了波算符的存在性和完备性，为Jacobi矩阵的散射理论提供了新的数学保证。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究Jacobi矩阵的散射性质和谱分析提供了严格的理论框架和工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将Szegö条件与Verblunsky系数结合，为波算符研究提供新的充分条件框架。
idea_spark.risk: 附加假设的具体形式可能限制结果的普适性，需验证其在实际问题中的可满足性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将正交多项式理论中的经典条件（如Szegö条件）与现代散射理论工具相结合的研究思路。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将正交多项式理论中的经典条件（如Szegö条件）与现代散射理论工具相结合的研究思路。

en.tldr: Studies wave operators for Jacobi matrices whose spectral measure satisfies the Szegö condition, proving existence and completeness under a mild additional assumption on the Verblunsky coefficients.
en.motivation: Wave operators for Jacobi matrices play a key role in scattering theory and spectral analysis, but sufficient conditions for their existence and completeness require further investigation.
en.method: Analyzes using the Szegö condition on the spectral measure of the Jacobi matrix, combined with an additional assumption on the Verblunsky coefficients of the associated measure on the unit circle.
en.result: Proves the existence and completeness of wave operators, providing new mathematical guarantees for the scattering theory of Jacobi matrices.
en.help_to_user: Offers a rigorous theoretical framework and tools for studying scattering properties and spectral analysis of Jacobi matrices.

idea_spark.idea: Combining the Szegö condition with Verblunsky coefficients provides a new framework of sufficient conditions for studying wave operators.
idea_spark.risk: The specific form of the additional assumption may limit the generality of the results, requiring verification of its satisfiability in practical problems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires research approaches that integrate classical conditions from orthogonal polynomial theory (e.g., Szegö condition) with modern scattering theory tools.

papers.title: Elephant random walk with attributed steps and extractions of random sizes
papers.summary: We study a model of market economics wherein the $(n+1)$-st customer, for each $n\geqslant N$, with $N$ being a prespecified positive integer, draws a sample of (random) size $K_{n}$, either with replacement or without, from the customers of the past. Each sampled customer is queried as to which of the two products, A and B, available in the oligopolistic market, they chose, and whether they are satisfied or not with their choice. The $(n+1)$-st customer now employs a stochastic rule, based on the information collected from the sampled customers, to decide which of the two products to buy. The probability that a customer is satisfied with the product they have purchased equals $q_{1}$ when the product is A, and $q_{2}$ when it is B, independent of all else. The resulting stochastic process may be represented as a variant of the celebrated elephant random walk, with the relative performance (in terms of sale) of A with respect to B, up to and including the $n$-th sale, captured by the position $S_{n}$ of the walker at time $n$. We study the almost sure convergence of $S_{n}/n$, as well as the convergence in distribution of suitably scaled versions of $S_{n}$ (where the scaling depends on the regime we are in).

ai.tldr: 研究一种市场经济学模型，其中顾客基于对过去顾客的随机抽样和满意度反馈，使用随机规则决定购买两种产品中的哪一种，该过程可表示为带属性步长的象随机游走变体。
ai.motivation: 将象随机游走扩展至具有属性步长和随机大小抽样的场景，以建模寡头市场中顾客的决策过程。
ai.method: 顾客从历史顾客中随机抽取样本（可放回或不放回），收集产品选择和满意度信息，基于此采用随机规则决定购买产品A或B，满意度概率与产品相关。
ai.result: 研究了游走位置S_n/n的几乎必然收敛性，以及在不同机制下S_n适当缩放版本的分布收敛性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种结合随机抽样和满意度反馈的市场决策随机模型，可用于分析产品扩散和市场份额动态。

idea_spark.idea: 将满意度概率与产品特性关联，引入产品差异化参数，研究其对市场均衡的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设满意度概率恒定且独立，实际中可能受时间、口碑或外部因素影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将类似框架应用于平台算法推荐、政治选举投票或技术创新扩散研究。

en.tldr: Studies a market economics model where customers decide between two products using a stochastic rule based on random sampling of past customers and satisfaction feedback, represented as a variant of elephant random walk with attributed steps.
en.motivation: Extends elephant random walk to scenarios with attributed steps and random-size sampling to model customer decision processes in oligopolistic markets.
en.method: Customers randomly sample (with/without replacement) past customers, collect product choice and satisfaction data, and use a stochastic rule to choose product A or B, with satisfaction probabilities product-dependent.
en.result: Investigates almost sure convergence of S_n/n and distributional convergence of suitably scaled versions of S_n under different regimes.
en.help_to_user: Provides a stochastic model of market decision-making combining random sampling and satisfaction feedback, useful for analyzing product diffusion and market share dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Link satisfaction probabilities to product characteristics, introduce product differentiation parameters, and study their impact on market equilibrium.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumes constant and independent satisfaction probabilities, which may be affected by time, word-of-mouth, or external factors in reality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires applying similar frameworks to platform algorithm recommendations, political election voting, or technological innovation diffusion studies.

papers.title: Deterministic Trust Regions for Finite-Window Black-Hole Spectroscopy in GW250114
papers.summary: We study finite-window black-hole spectroscopy in the loud-event regime and ask when a multimode ringdown fit supports a stable common-remnant Kerr interpretation. Starting from whitened, tapered detector-frame data, we prove a deterministic frequency-extraction theorem for a projected sampled Prony--matrix-pencil pipeline with explicit statistical, algorithmic, omitted-tail, and mismatch terms. We then construct a local inverse atlas for the Kerr $(\ell,m,n)=(2,2,0)$ map on an event-local detector-frame remnant box for GW250114 and propagate the resulting primary uncertainty into $(2,2,1)$ and $(4,4,0)$ consistency tests. These ingredients yield a detector-frame trust criterion for individual windows.   We calibrate mismatch and colored-noise radii on a GW250114-like synthetic waveform bank built from public surrogate, CCE, and numerical-relativity information, and we apply the resulting bounds to the public H1/L1 strain and public parameter-estimation products for GW250114. The accepted windows form an intermediate post-peak band: earlier windows remain sensitive to start-time drift and structured nuisance fits, whereas later windows become variance dominated. Within that band, the recovered remnant remains consistent with the public inspiral--merger--ringdown estimates and supports a common-remnant Kerr interpretation that survives the full preprocessing and robustness checks. For loud events, the relevant question is therefore which finite detector-frame windows sustain spectroscopy, not whether some multimode fit can be made in isolation.

ai.tldr: 本文针对GW250114事件，研究有限时间窗口下的黑洞光谱学，提出了一种确定性频率提取定理和探测器帧信任准则，以判断多模拟合是否支持稳定的共同残余克尔解释。
ai.motivation: 在响亮引力波事件中，需要确定哪些有限探测器帧窗口能够支持可靠的多模黑洞光谱学分析，而不仅仅是孤立地获得某种拟合。
ai.method: 从白化、锥化的探测器帧数据出发，证明了投影采样Prony矩阵铅笔管道的确定性频率提取定理。构建了GW250114事件局部探测器帧残余盒上Kerr (2,2,0)映射的局部逆图集，并将主要不确定性传播到(2,2,1)和(4,4,0)一致性检验中。
ai.result: 在GW250114的中间峰值后时间带内，恢复的残余参数与公开的旋进-合并-铃坠估计一致，支持了共同残余克尔解释，且通过了完整的预处理和稳健性检验。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种在响亮引力波事件中，评估有限时间窗口黑洞光谱学结果可靠性的系统框架和确定性信任区域构建方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将黑洞光谱学的可靠性问题，从‘能否获得多模拟合’转变为‘哪些具体的时间窗口能支持稳定的物理解释’。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于对噪声特性、波形模型不匹配以及算法误差的准确校准，在信噪比较低或波形模型不完善的事件中应用可能存在局限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将严格的确定性数学定理与基于数值相对论模拟的统计校准相结合，为引力波天体物理参数推断提供新的可靠性标准。

en.tldr: This paper studies finite-window black-hole spectroscopy for the GW250114 event, proposing a deterministic frequency-extraction theorem and a detector-frame trust criterion to assess when a multimode fit supports a stable common-remnant Kerr interpretation.
en.motivation: For loud gravitational-wave events, the key question is which finite detector-frame windows can sustain reliable multimode spectroscopy, not merely whether some isolated fit can be obtained.
en.method: Starting from whitened, tapered detector-frame data, a deterministic frequency-extraction theorem is proven for a projected sampled Prony-matrix-pencil pipeline. A local inverse atlas for the Kerr (2,2,0) map is constructed on an event-local detector-frame remnant box for GW250114, and the primary uncertainty is propagated into (2,2,1) and (4,4,0) consistency tests.
en.result: Within an intermediate post-peak time band for GW250114, the recovered remnant remains consistent with public inspiral-merger-ringdown estimates and supports a common-remnant Kerr interpretation that survives full preprocessing and robustness checks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic framework and method for constructing deterministic trust regions to evaluate the reliability of finite-window black-hole spectroscopy results in loud gravitational-wave events.

idea_spark.idea: Reframes the reliability question in black-hole spectroscopy from 'can a multimode fit be made' to 'which specific time windows sustain a stable physical interpretation'.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on accurate calibration of noise properties, waveform mismatch, and algorithmic errors, which may limit its application in events with lower signal-to-noise ratios or imperfect waveform models.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining rigorous deterministic mathematical theorems with statistical calibration based on numerical relativity simulations to establish new reliability standards for gravitational-wave astrophysical parameter inference.

papers.title: Steady-state Based Approach to Online Non-stochastic Control
papers.summary: We study the problem of online non-stochastic control (ONC), which is the control of a linear system under adversarial disturbances and adversarial cost functions, with the aim of minimizing the total cost incurred. A recent line of literature in ONC develops algorithms that enjoy sublinear regret with respect to a benchmark based on the set of steady-states that are attainable by a constant input. In this work, we extend this research direction by giving an algorithm that enjoys $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret with respect to a richer benchmark set, namely the set of steady-states attainable under an \emph{affine controller}. Since this benchmark substantially broadens the comparison class, it provides significantly stronger performance guarantees. Our proposed algorithm combines a Follow-The-Perturbed-Leader-style online non-convex optimization approach with a batching method that maintains stability despite changing policies. Although our proposed algorithm requires solving non-convex subproblems, we show that an approximate solution to this subproblem is sufficient to ensure $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret. Furthermore, numerical experiments show that our algorithm enjoys lower total cost and similar computation to existing methods in certain settings.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一种基于稳态的在线非随机控制算法，使用仿射控制器作为更丰富的基准集，实现O(√T)的遗憾界。
ai.motivation: 现有在线非随机控制算法通常以恒定输入可达的稳态集为基准，我们希望扩展至仿射控制器可达的稳态集，以获得更强的性能保证。
ai.method: 结合Follow-The-Perturbed-Leader风格的在线非凸优化方法与批处理方法，即使策略变化也能保持系统稳定性，并证明子问题的近似解足以保证遗憾界。
ai.result: 算法实现了O(√T)的遗憾界，数值实验显示在某些设置下总成本更低且计算量与现有方法相当。
ai.help_to_user: 为对抗性扰动和成本函数下的线性系统控制提供了更强的性能保证基准。

idea_spark.idea: 在在线控制中采用更丰富的基准集来提升性能保证。
idea_spark.risk: 需要解决非凸子问题，但近似解已足够。
idea_spark.inspiration: 批处理方法与在线优化结合可处理策略变化时的稳定性问题。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a steady-state based online non-stochastic control algorithm that achieves O(√T) regret with respect to a richer benchmark set of steady-states attainable under affine controllers.
en.motivation: Existing online non-stochastic control algorithms typically use benchmarks based on steady-states attainable by constant inputs. We aim to extend this to steady-states attainable under affine controllers for stronger performance guarantees.
en.method: Combines a Follow-The-Perturbed-Leader-style online non-convex optimization approach with a batching method that maintains stability despite changing policies, showing that approximate solutions to subproblems suffice for the regret bound.
en.result: The algorithm achieves O(√T) regret, with numerical experiments showing lower total cost and comparable computation to existing methods in certain settings.
en.help_to_user: Provides stronger performance guarantees for linear system control under adversarial disturbances and cost functions.

idea_spark.idea: Using richer benchmark sets in online control to improve performance guarantees.
idea_spark.risk: Requires solving non-convex subproblems, though approximate solutions are sufficient.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining batching methods with online optimization can address stability issues during policy changes.

papers.title: Reference Condensation for Model Predictive Control with Preview
papers.summary: In model predictive control (MPC), preview information can greatly improve tracking. Including preview information does, however, increase the parameter dimension linearly with the preview horizon, which increases online cost and, more importantly, the complexity of explicit MPC. We introduce reference condensation, a method that compresses a future reference trajectory into a single setpoint through a linear map. For the unconstrained tracking problem, the map follows from a least-squares projection. For receding-horizon MPC, we also study a weighted variant that prioritizes the first applied control. Numerical experiments on a double integrator and a higher-order aircraft example show that the weighted condensation closely matches full preview while keeping the parameter dimension independent of the preview horizon.

ai.tldr: 提出参考凝聚法，将未来参考轨迹压缩为单个设定点，以降低模型预测控制的参数维度和在线计算成本。
ai.motivation: 模型预测控制中，预览信息能提升跟踪性能，但会增加参数维度，提高在线计算成本和显式MPC的复杂度。
ai.method: 通过线性映射将未来参考轨迹压缩为单个设定点。对于无约束跟踪问题，映射来自最小二乘投影；对于滚动时域MPC，研究了加权变体以优先处理首个控制动作。
ai.result: 在双积分器和高阶飞机模型上的数值实验表明，加权凝聚法在保持参数维度独立于预览范围的同时，性能接近完整预览。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种降低MPC计算复杂度的有效方法，适用于需要预览信息的实时控制场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将时间序列的未来信息投影到低维空间，作为控制器的简化输入。
idea_spark.risk: 压缩可能损失部分预览信息，影响极端动态下的跟踪精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在控制与信号处理中探索信息保留与计算效率的平衡。

en.tldr: Proposes reference condensation, compressing future reference trajectories into a single setpoint to reduce parameter dimension and online computational cost in model predictive control.
en.motivation: Preview information in MPC improves tracking but increases parameter dimension, raising online computational cost and explicit MPC complexity.
en.method: Compresses future reference trajectories into a single setpoint via a linear map. For unconstrained tracking, the map derives from least-squares projection; for receding-horizon MPC, a weighted variant prioritizes the first control action.
en.result: Numerical experiments on a double integrator and a higher-order aircraft model show that weighted condensation closely matches full preview while keeping parameter dimension independent of preview horizon.
en.help_to_user: Provides an effective method to reduce computational complexity in MPC, suitable for real-time control scenarios requiring preview information.

idea_spark.idea: Project time-series future information into a low-dimensional space as simplified input for the controller.
idea_spark.risk: Compression may lose some preview information, affecting tracking accuracy under extreme dynamics.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires exploration of the balance between information retention and computational efficiency in control and signal processing.

papers.title: On the Effect of Quadratic Regularization in Direct Data-Driven LQR
papers.summary: This paper proposes an explainability concept for direct data-driven linear quadratic regulation (LQR) with quadratic regularization. Our perspective follows the parametric effect of regularization, an analysis approach that translates regularization costs from auxiliary variables to system quantities, enabling intuitive interpretations. The framework further enables the elimination of auxiliary variables, thereby reducing computational complexity. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach and the identified effect of regularization via simulations.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于带二次正则化的直接数据驱动线性二次调节（LQR）的可解释性概念，通过将正则化成本从辅助变量转换到系统量来实现直观解释，并消除辅助变量以降低计算复杂度。
ai.motivation: 直接数据驱动LQR中的二次正则化效果缺乏直观解释，且现有方法可能引入不必要的计算负担。
ai.method: 采用参数化效应分析视角，将正则化成本从辅助变量映射到系统量，从而消除辅助变量并简化计算。
ai.result: 框架实现了正则化效果的直观解释，并通过仿真验证了其有效性及计算复杂度的降低。
ai.help_to_user: 为数据驱动控制中正则化的作用提供了清晰的可解释性框架，并提供了降低计算负担的实用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将正则化成本重新参数化为系统量，而非保留在辅助变量中。
idea_spark.risk: 方法假设特定问题结构，可能不适用于高度非线性或非二次正则化场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发从“成本翻译”而非“变量添加”的角度思考正则化，可能简化其他优化问题的表述。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发从“成本翻译”而非“变量添加”的角度思考正则化，可能简化其他优化问题的表述。

en.tldr: This paper proposes an explainability concept for direct data-driven linear quadratic regulation (LQR) with quadratic regularization, translating regularization costs from auxiliary variables to system quantities for intuitive interpretation and eliminating auxiliary variables to reduce computational complexity.
en.motivation: The effect of quadratic regularization in direct data-driven LQR lacks intuitive interpretation, and existing methods may introduce unnecessary computational burden.
en.method: Adopts a parametric effect analysis perspective, mapping regularization costs from auxiliary variables to system quantities, thereby eliminating auxiliary variables and simplifying computation.
en.result: The framework provides intuitive interpretation of regularization effects and demonstrates effectiveness and reduced computational complexity via simulations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a clear explainability framework for the role of regularization in data-driven control and offers a practical method to reduce computational burden.

idea_spark.idea: Reparameterize regularization costs as system quantities instead of retaining them in auxiliary variables.
idea_spark.risk: The method assumes specific problem structures and may not apply to highly nonlinear or non-quadratic regularization scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires thinking about regularization from a 'cost translation' rather than 'variable addition' perspective, potentially simplifying formulations of other optimization problems.

papers.title: TrafficClaw: Generalizable Urban Traffic Control via Unified Physical Environment Modeling
papers.summary: Urban traffic control is a system-level coordination problem spanning heterogeneous subsystems, including traffic signals, freeways, public transit, and taxi services. Existing optimization-based, reinforcement learning (RL), and emerging LLM-based approaches are largely designed for isolated tasks, limiting both cross-task generalization and the ability to capture coupled physical dynamics across subsystems. We argue that effective system-level control requires a unified physical environment in which subsystems share infrastructure, mobility demand, and spatiotemporal constraints, allowing local interventions to propagate through the network. To this end, we propose TrafficClaw, a framework for general urban traffic control built upon a unified runtime environment. TrafficClaw integrates heterogeneous subsystems into a shared dynamical system, enabling explicit modeling of cross-subsystem interactions and closed-loop agent-environment feedback. Within this environment, we develop an LLM agent with executable spatiotemporal reasoning and reusable procedural memory, supporting unified diagnostics across subsystems and continual strategy refinement. Furthermore, we introduce a multi-stage training pipeline with supervised initialization and agentic RL with system-level optimization, further enabling coordinated and system-aware performance. Experiments demonstrate that TrafficClaw achieves robust, transferable, and system-aware performance across unseen traffic scenarios, dynamics, and task configurations. Our project is available at https://github.com/usail-hkust/TrafficClaw.

ai.tldr: TrafficClaw是一个基于统一物理环境建模的通用城市交通控制框架，通过整合异构子系统并利用LLM智能体进行时空推理，实现系统级协调与泛化性能。
ai.motivation: 现有交通控制方法多为孤立任务设计，难以捕捉跨子系统的耦合物理动态，限制了跨任务泛化与系统级协调能力。
ai.method: 构建统一运行时环境整合交通信号、高速公路、公共交通等异构子系统；开发具备可执行时空推理和可复用程序记忆的LLM智能体；采用监督初始化与系统级优化的智能体强化学习多阶段训练流程。
ai.result: 实验表明TrafficClaw在未见过的交通场景、动态和任务配置中实现了稳健、可迁移且系统感知的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要处理多子系统协调的城市交通控制研究者提供统一的建模框架和训练方法，支持跨场景泛化。

idea_spark.idea: 将物理耦合关系显式建模为共享环境，使局部干预能在网络中传播。
idea_spark.risk: 实际部署需考虑计算开销、实时性要求及与现有基础设施的集成复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将系统级协调问题重构为共享动态系统中的智能体学习问题。
