en.tldr: TrafficClaw is a general urban traffic control framework based on unified physical environment modeling, integrating heterogeneous subsystems and utilizing LLM agents for spatiotemporal reasoning to achieve system-level coordination and generalization.
en.motivation: Existing traffic control approaches are largely designed for isolated tasks, limiting cross-task generalization and the ability to capture coupled physical dynamics across subsystems.
en.method: Construct a unified runtime environment integrating heterogeneous subsystems; develop an LLM agent with executable spatiotemporal reasoning and reusable procedural memory; employ a multi-stage training pipeline with supervised initialization and agentic RL with system-level optimization.
en.result: Experiments demonstrate that TrafficClaw achieves robust, transferable, and system-aware performance across unseen traffic scenarios, dynamics, and task configurations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified modeling framework and training methodology for researchers working on multi-subsystem coordination in urban traffic control, supporting cross-scenario generalization.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly model physical couplings as a shared environment, allowing local interventions to propagate through the network.
idea_spark.risk: Practical deployment requires consideration of computational overhead, real-time requirements, and integration complexity with existing infrastructure.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires reframing system-level coordination problems as agent learning within shared dynamical systems.

papers.title: MambaKick: Early Penalty Direction Prediction from HAR Embeddings
papers.summary: Penalty kicks in soccer are decided under extreme time constraints, where goalkeepers benefit from anticipating shot direction from the kickers motion before or around ball contact. In this paper, MambaKick is presented as a learning-based framework for penalty direction prediction that leverages pretrained human action recognition (HAR) embeddings extracted from contact-centered short video segments and combines them with a lightweight temporal predictor. Rather than relying on explicit kinematic reconstruction or handcrafted biomechanical features, the approach reuses transferable spatiotemporal representations and utilizes selective state-spare models (Mamba) for efficient sequence aggregation. Simple contextual metadata (e.g., field side and footedness) are also considered as complementary cues that may reduce ambiguity in real-world footage. Across a range of HAR backbones, MambaKick consistently improves or matches strong embedding baselines, achieving up to 53.1% accuracy for three classes and 64.5% for two classes under the proposed methodology. Overall, the results indicate that combining pretrained HAR representations with efficient state-space temporal modeling is a practical direction for low-latency intention prediction in real-world sports video. The code will be available at GitHub: https://github.com/hvelesaca/MambaKick/

ai.tldr: MambaKick是一个基于学习的框架，利用预训练的人类动作识别嵌入和轻量级时间预测器，从足球点球视频中预测射门方向。
ai.motivation: 足球点球中，守门员需要在极短时间内预判射门方向，现有方法依赖显式运动学重建或手工特征，计算成本高且不适用于实时场景。
ai.method: 从接触球前后的短视频片段提取预训练HAR嵌入，使用选择性状态空间模型进行高效序列聚合，并辅以场地侧和惯用脚等上下文元数据。
ai.result: 在多个HAR骨干网络上，MambaKick持续改进或匹配强基线，三分类准确率达53.1%，二分类达64.5%。
ai.help_to_user: 为体育视频中的低延迟意图预测提供了一种实用方案，结合了可迁移的时空表示和高效的时间建模。

idea_spark.idea: 利用通用动作表示而非领域特定特征，结合轻量级时序聚合，实现低计算成本的实时预测。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练HAR模型的质量和泛化能力；真实场景中视频质量、视角变化可能影响性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将大模型时代的可迁移表示与高效序列模型结合，为资源受限的实时视频分析开辟新路径。

en.tldr: MambaKick is a learning-based framework that predicts penalty kick direction using pretrained human action recognition embeddings and a lightweight temporal predictor.
en.motivation: Penalty kicks require goalkeepers to anticipate shot direction under extreme time constraints; existing methods rely on explicit kinematic reconstruction or handcrafted features, which are computationally expensive and not suitable for real-time applications.
en.method: Extracts pretrained HAR embeddings from contact-centered short video segments, aggregates them using selective state-space models (Mamba), and incorporates contextual metadata such as field side and footedness.
en.result: Across various HAR backbones, MambaKick consistently improves or matches strong baselines, achieving 53.1% accuracy for three classes and 64.5% for two classes.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical approach for low-latency intention prediction in sports video by combining transferable spatiotemporal representations with efficient temporal modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage generic action representations instead of domain-specific features, combined with lightweight temporal aggregation for low-computation real-time prediction.
idea_spark.risk: Depends on the quality and generalization of pretrained HAR models; video quality and viewpoint variations in real-world footage may affect performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining transferable representations from the era of large models with efficient sequence models opens new avenues for resource-constrained real-time video analysis.

papers.title: Fisher Decorator: Refining Flow Policy via A Local Transport Map
papers.summary: Recent advances in flow-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) have achieved strong performance by parameterizing policies via flow matching. However, they still face critical trade-offs among expressiveness, optimality, and efficiency. In particular, existing flow policies interpret the $L_2$ regularization as an upper bound of the 2-Wasserstein distance ($W_2$), which can be problematic in offline settings. This issue stems from a fundamental geometric mismatch: the behavioral policy manifold is inherently anisotropic, whereas the $L_2$ (or upper bound of $W_2$) regularization is isotropic and density-insensitive, leading to systematically misaligned optimization directions. To address this, we revisit offline RL from a geometric perspective and show that policy refinement can be formulated as a local transport map: an initial flow policy augmented by a residual displacement. By analyzing the induced density transformation, we derive a local quadratic approximation of the KL-constrained objective governed by the Fisher information matrix, enabling a tractable anisotropic optimization formulation. By leveraging the score function embedded in the flow velocity, we obtain a corresponding quadratic constraint for efficient optimization. Our results reveal that the optimality gap in prior methods arises from their isotropic approximation. In contrast, our framework achieves a controllable approximation error within a provable neighborhood of the optimal solution. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across diverse offline RL benchmarks. See project page: https://github.com/ARC0127/Fisher-Decorator.

ai.tldr: 提出Fisher Decorator框架，通过局部传输映射和Fisher信息矩阵引导的各向异性优化，解决离线强化学习中流策略的几何失配问题，实现更精确的策略优化。
ai.motivation: 现有基于流匹配的离线强化学习方法使用L2正则化（作为2-Wasserstein距离的上界），但行为策略流形本质上是各向异性的，而L2正则化是各向同性且对密度不敏感的，导致优化方向系统性地失配。
ai.method: 从几何视角重新审视离线RL，将策略精炼表述为局部传输映射：初始流策略加上残差位移。通过分析诱导的密度变换，推导出由Fisher信息矩阵控制的KL约束目标的局部二次近似，从而得到可处理的各向异性优化公式。利用流速度中嵌入的得分函数，获得对应的二次约束以实现高效优化。
ai.result: 理论分析表明先前方法的最优性差距源于其各向同性近似；本框架在最优解的可证明邻域内实现可控近似误差。大量实验在多样离线RL基准上展示了最先进的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 为离线强化学习中的策略优化提供了新的几何视角和理论框架，通过各向异性正则化更精确地匹配行为策略流形，提升策略表达能力和优化效率。

idea_spark.idea: 利用流模型中已有的得分函数（流速度）来近似Fisher信息矩阵，从而避免显式计算海森矩阵，实现高效的各向异性正则化。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于初始流策略的质量和得分函数的准确性；在极度离分布或得分估计不准的情况下，局部近似可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将信息几何（Fisher度量）与最优传输（Wasserstein距离）结合，为理解和改进生成式策略的优化几何提供了新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes the Fisher Decorator framework, which refines flow policies via a local transport map and anisotropic optimization guided by the Fisher information matrix, addressing geometric mismatch in offline reinforcement learning for more precise policy optimization.
en.motivation: Existing flow-based offline RL methods use L2 regularization (as an upper bound of the 2-Wasserstein distance), but the behavioral policy manifold is inherently anisotropic, while L2 regularization is isotropic and density-insensitive, leading to systematically misaligned optimization directions.
en.method: Revisits offline RL from a geometric perspective, formulating policy refinement as a local transport map: an initial flow policy augmented by a residual displacement. By analyzing the induced density transformation, derives a local quadratic approximation of the KL-constrained objective governed by the Fisher information matrix, enabling a tractable anisotropic optimization formulation. Leverages the score function embedded in the flow velocity to obtain a corresponding quadratic constraint for efficient optimization.
en.result: Theoretical analysis reveals that the optimality gap in prior methods stems from their isotropic approximation; this framework achieves a controllable approximation error within a provable neighborhood of the optimal solution. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across diverse offline RL benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new geometric perspective and theoretical framework for policy optimization in offline RL, using anisotropic regularization to better match the behavioral policy manifold, improving policy expressiveness and optimization efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Utilizes the score function (flow velocity) already present in flow models to approximate the Fisher information matrix, avoiding explicit Hessian computation and enabling efficient anisotropic regularization.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on the quality of the initial flow policy and the accuracy of the score function; local approximations may fail under extreme out-of-distribution scenarios or inaccurate score estimates.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining information geometry (Fisher metric) with optimal transport (Wasserstein distance) offers a new perspective for understanding and improving the optimization geometry of generative policies.

papers.title: Convergence of Langevin AIS for multimodal distributions
papers.summary: We study convergence rates of the annealed importance sampling algorithm (Neal '01) combined with Langevin Monte Carlo when the target is a multimodal Gibbs measure. The main result shows that for a fixed error threshold, the time complexity is quadratic in the inverse temperature. We identify a simple and useful quantity that controls the sampling error for AIS in a general setting, and then bound this quantity in our setting using spectral estimates. We also study an autonormalized version and obtain bounds for the time complexity in terms of the inverse temperature.

ai.tldr: 研究了结合朗之万蒙特卡洛的退火重要性采样算法在目标为多峰吉布斯测度时的收敛速率。主要结果表明，对于固定误差阈值，时间复杂度与逆温度的平方成正比。
ai.motivation: 退火重要性采样（AIS）与朗之万蒙特卡洛结合用于采样多峰分布时，其收敛行为尚不明确，需要理论分析以量化其计算复杂度。
ai.method: 识别了一个控制AIS采样误差的通用量，并在多峰吉布斯测度设定下，使用谱估计技术对该量进行上界分析。同时研究了自归一化版本的时间复杂度。
ai.result: 对于固定误差阈值，算法的时间复杂度与逆温度的平方成正比。谱估计提供了误差控制量的明确上界。
ai.help_to_user: 为使用朗之万AIS采样多峰分布的研究者提供了理论收敛保证和复杂度界限，有助于算法参数选择和性能预期。

idea_spark.idea: 将AIS的误差分解为与逆温度相关的谱间隙项，从而量化多峰采样中的能垒跨越难度。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于吉布斯测度的特定形式，对于非平衡或非可逆动力学可能不直接适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对其它退火策略或扩散过程在多峰采样中复杂度的类似分析，或设计自适应逆温度调度以优化性能。

idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于吉布斯测度的特定形式，对于非平衡或非可逆动力学可能不直接适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对其它退火策略或扩散过程在多峰采样中复杂度的类似分析，或设计自适应逆温度调度以优化性能。

en.tldr: Studies convergence rates of annealed importance sampling combined with Langevin Monte Carlo when targeting multimodal Gibbs measures. The main result shows time complexity scales quadratically with inverse temperature for a fixed error threshold.
en.motivation: The convergence behavior of annealed importance sampling (AIS) with Langevin Monte Carlo for sampling multimodal distributions is not well understood, requiring theoretical analysis to quantify its computational complexity.
en.method: Identifies a general quantity controlling AIS sampling error, and bounds this quantity in the multimodal Gibbs setting using spectral estimates. Also studies an autonormalized version and derives time complexity bounds.
en.result: For a fixed error threshold, the time complexity scales quadratically with the inverse temperature. Spectral estimates provide explicit bounds on the error-controlling quantity.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical convergence guarantees and complexity bounds for users employing Langevin AIS to sample multimodal distributions, aiding in algorithm parameter selection and performance expectations.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose AIS error into spectral gap terms related to inverse temperature, quantifying the difficulty of crossing energy barriers in multimodal sampling.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on the specific Gibbs measure form and may not directly apply to non-equilibrium or non-reversible dynamics.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires similar complexity analyses for other annealing strategies or diffusion processes in multimodal sampling, or designing adaptive inverse temperature schedules to optimize performance.

papers.title: Real-Time Algorithms for Model Predictive Control of Hybrid Dynamical Systems
papers.summary: Model predictive control (MPC) of hybrid dynamical systems is challenging because the associated optimization problem is nonsmooth and the resulting feedback law is discontinuous. This paper develops real-time MPC algorithms for nonlinear hybrid systems modeled as dynamical complementarity systems. The resulting optimal control problems are formulated as mathematical programs with complementarity constraints (MPCCs). We show that the solution map of parametric MPCCs is discontinuous, and that standard nonlinear-programming-based approaches may become infeasible when the hybrid system switches. To address this, we introduce three real-time hybrid MPC schemes whose feedback phase solves a quadratic program with complementarity constraints per sample, yielding local discontinuous piecewise affine approximations of the MPC feedback law. Moreover, we derive continuity and differentiability results for parametric MPCCs, and establish conditions under which the approximation error of our new hybrid MPC algorithms remains uniformly bounded despite solution discontinuities. The algorithms are demonstrated on a robotic manipulation example, where contact sequences are discovered online.

ai.tldr: 本文针对非线性混合动力系统，开发了三种实时模型预测控制算法，通过求解带互补约束的二次规划来近似不连续的MPC反馈律，并证明了近似误差的一致有界性。
ai.motivation: 混合动力系统的模型预测控制具有挑战性，因为其优化问题非光滑且反馈律不连续，标准非线性规划方法在系统切换时可能不可行。
ai.method: 将最优控制问题建模为带互补约束的数学规划，并在每个采样点求解带互补约束的二次规划，得到MPC反馈律的局部不连续分段仿射近似。
ai.result: 推导了参数化MPCC的连续性和可微性结果，建立了新混合MPC算法近似误差保持一致有界的条件，并在机器人操作示例中在线发现接触序列。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理混合系统不连续反馈提供了实用的实时MPC框架，适用于需要在线处理接触等混合行为的机器人控制。

idea_spark.idea: 可考虑将此框架应用于其他具有模式切换的动态系统，如电力电子变换器或交通流控制。
idea_spark.risk: 算法性能依赖于互补约束的准确建模，在高度不确定或快速切换的场景中可能面临挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 近似误差有界性的证明思路可能启发其他不连续系统控制器的稳定性分析。

en.motivation: MPC of hybrid dynamical systems is challenging due to nonsmooth optimization and discontinuous feedback laws, with standard NLP approaches potentially becoming infeasible during mode switches.
en.method: Formulate optimal control problems as MPCCs and solve quadratic programs with complementarity constraints per sampling instant, yielding local discontinuous piecewise affine approximations of the MPC feedback law.

en.help_to_user: Provides a practical real-time MPC framework for handling discontinuous feedback in hybrid systems, applicable to robotic control requiring online contact management.

idea_spark.idea: Consider applying this framework to other mode-switching dynamic systems like power electronics converters or traffic flow control.
idea_spark.risk: Algorithm performance depends on accurate complementarity constraint modeling, potentially challenging in highly uncertain or rapidly switching scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approximation error boundedness proof may inspire stability analysis for other discontinuous system controllers.

papers.title: Gamma-Based Expansion for the First-Passage Time Distribution of Stochastic Logistic Models with Harvesting
papers.summary: The first passage time problem is considered for stochastic logistic growth model with constant harvesting and multiplicative environmental noise. Explicit expressions for the moments and cumulants of both upcrossing and downcrossing FPTs in the presence of constant thresholds are obtained through a power-series expansion of the Laplace transform. Then a closed-form representation of the FPT density is recovered via an orthogonal Laguerre--Gamma expansion .   This representation is used to numerically evaluate FPT densities, with the truncation order controlling the trade-off between accuracy and stability. Numerical experiments based on Monte Carlo simulations confirm the high accuracy of the method in regimes of moderate dispersion and highlight its limitations when higher-order moments grow rapidly. Application to fisheries management models shows that the method remains effective even for large-scale population. Finally, the approximated density is satisfactory used to estimate some parameters of the model.

ai.tldr: 针对带常数收获和乘性环境噪声的随机逻辑增长模型，通过拉普拉斯变换的幂级数展开和正交拉盖尔-伽马展开，获得了首次通过时间分布的闭式近似，并应用于渔业管理模型。
ai.motivation: 随机逻辑增长模型在种群动力学和资源管理中广泛应用，需要高效计算首次通过时间分布以评估种群达到特定阈值的风险。
ai.method: 对拉普拉斯变换进行幂级数展开获得矩和累积量，再通过正交拉盖尔-伽马展开重建首次通过时间密度函数。
ai.result: 方法在中等离散度下具有高精度，能有效处理大规模种群，但高阶矩快速增长时存在局限。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了随机逻辑模型首次通过时间分布的高效计算方法，适用于种群管理和风险评估。

idea_spark.idea: 将拉普拉斯变换的幂级数系数转化为正交展开系数，实现密度函数的稳定重建。
idea_spark.risk: 高阶矩快速增长时展开可能不稳定，需要截断阶数权衡精度与稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 正交展开框架为复杂随机过程的首次通过时间分析提供了通用数值工具。

en.tldr: For stochastic logistic growth with constant harvesting and multiplicative noise, closed-form approximations of first-passage time distributions are derived via Laplace transform power-series and orthogonal Laguerre-Gamma expansions, with applications to fisheries management.
en.motivation: Stochastic logistic models are widely used in population dynamics and resource management, requiring efficient computation of first-passage time distributions to assess population threshold risks.
en.method: Power-series expansion of the Laplace transform yields moments and cumulants; orthogonal Laguerre-Gamma expansion reconstructs the first-passage time density function.
en.result: The method achieves high accuracy under moderate dispersion and scales to large populations, but faces limitations when higher-order moments grow rapidly.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient computational method for first-passage time distributions in stochastic logistic models, applicable to population management and risk assessment.

idea_spark.idea: Convert power-series coefficients of the Laplace transform into orthogonal expansion coefficients for stable density reconstruction.
idea_spark.risk: Expansion may become unstable when higher-order moments grow rapidly, requiring truncation order trade-offs between accuracy and stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: The orthogonal expansion framework offers a general numerical tool for first-passage time analysis of complex stochastic processes.

papers.title: An Exact Algorithm for Public Transport Line Planning Considering Passenger and Operational Costs and Lost Demand
papers.summary: Line planning in public transport is the strategic problem of selecting lines and their operating frequencies. This problem is important as it defines the passenger service, based on available connections and expected travel times, and drives operational cost in terms of the number of vehicles required. This paper presents a line planning model that minimizes the weighted sum of passenger travel time, including in-vehicle time and frequency-dependent waiting and transfer times, and operating costs for the public transport agency. Unlike traditional approaches that assume demand to be fixed, our approach requires a minimum service level for demand to be captured, ensuring that services are provided only when they are attractive to users and cost-efficient to operate. The introduced capacity constraints ensure sufficient capacity on the lines and help guide the trade-off between expected demand on selected lines and their frequencies. The resulting mixed-integer program presents a challenging combinatorial problem as the number of passenger paths grows rapidly in relation to the number of lines and frequencies considered. To address this, we propose an iterative exact algorithm that utilizes a reduced problem representation and dynamically expands it with additional frequencies and paths. Evaluated on four networks with varying complexity and cost trade-offs, our method achieves significant speed-ups and tighter bounds compared to solving the complete model directly by CPLEX, particularly when operator and passenger costs are more evenly balanced in the objective. Furthermore, we demonstrate how accounting for lost demand leads to more efficient resource use from an overall perspective.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一种考虑乘客与运营成本及流失需求的公共交通线路规划精确算法，通过迭代求解缩减问题表示，显著提升计算效率。
ai.motivation: 传统线路规划假设需求固定，可能导致资源浪费或服务不足。需同时优化乘客出行时间（车内、等待、换乘）与运营商成本，并引入最低服务水平约束确保服务吸引力。
ai.method: 建立混合整数规划模型，最小化加权乘客出行时间与运营成本之和，包含容量约束与流失需求机制。设计迭代精确算法：动态扩展缩减问题表示（线路频率与乘客路径），避免组合爆炸。
ai.result: 在四个不同复杂度网络中测试，相比CPLEX直接求解完整模型，本算法获得显著加速与更紧边界，尤其在乘客与运营商成本权重平衡时效果更优。考虑流失需求提升了整体资源利用效率。
ai.help_to_user: 为交通规划者提供可处理大规模网络、平衡多方利益且计算高效的决策工具，支持线路频率联合优化与需求响应式服务设计。

idea_spark.idea: 将流失需求作为约束而非固定参数，迫使模型仅在服务足够吸引力时提供线路，避免低效投资。
idea_spark.risk: 模型对出行时间权重、需求弹性参数敏感，需校准；大规模网络路径枚举仍可能限制可扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可结合机器学习预测需求弹性，或嵌入多目标优化框架直接揭示成本权衡前沿。

en.tldr: This paper presents an exact algorithm for public transport line planning considering passenger and operational costs with lost demand, using iterative reduction of problem representation to achieve significant computational speed-ups.
en.motivation: Traditional line planning assumes fixed demand, potentially leading to inefficient resource use. A model is needed to jointly minimize passenger travel time (in-vehicle, waiting, transfer) and operator costs, while ensuring a minimum service level to capture demand only when services are attractive.
en.method: A mixed-integer programming model minimizes weighted sum of passenger travel time and operating costs, with capacity constraints and lost demand mechanism. An iterative exact algorithm dynamically expands a reduced problem representation (lines, frequencies, passenger paths) to avoid combinatorial explosion.
en.result: Tested on four networks of varying complexity, the method achieves significant speed-ups and tighter bounds compared to solving the full model directly with CPLEX, especially when passenger and operator costs are balanced. Accounting for lost demand improves overall resource efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides transport planners with a computationally efficient tool for large-scale network optimization that balances multiple stakeholders, enabling joint line-frequency design and demand-responsive service provision.

idea_spark.idea: Treating lost demand as a constraint rather than a fixed parameter forces the model to offer lines only when service is sufficiently attractive, avoiding inefficient investments.
idea_spark.risk: Model sensitivity to travel time weights and demand elasticity parameters requires calibration; path enumeration in large networks may still limit scalability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could integrate machine learning for demand elasticity prediction or embed within a multi-objective optimization framework to directly reveal cost trade-off frontiers.

papers.title: A Null Model for Mapper Subtype Claims
papers.summary: The Mapper algorithm from topological data analysis constructs a graph summarizing the shape of a high-dimensional dataset, and groups of data points identified within this graph are widely interpreted as evidence of distinct subtypes. However, the covariance structure of the data alone can make such groups appear differentiated, even when no subtypes are present. Existing validation approaches do not account for this effect and thus cannot distinguish covariance artifacts from genuine subtypes. We propose a Gaussian null model that generates reference data matching the sample covariance matrix. We pair it with a test statistic that measures mean-level differentiation between communities. In an idealized setting, we prove that covariance geometry alone causes Mapper communities to differ in their average feature profiles, and we show that a simpler label-permutation baseline cannot detect this effect. Simulations confirm well-controlled Type I error under Gaussian data. We apply the framework to four published Mapper analyses spanning breast cancer gene expression, Congressional voting, NBA player performance, and lower-grade glioma genomics. In every case, once outlier singleton communities are accounted for, the observed differentiation does not exceed what the null produces at the α = 0.05 level. This result does not rule out subtypes in these datasets, but it does indicate that the observed structure is consistent with what covariance geometry alone can produce. Stronger evidence would be needed to support a subtype claim.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种高斯零模型，用于检验Mapper算法识别的亚型是否仅由数据协方差结构引起，而非真实亚型证据。
ai.motivation: Mapper算法在拓扑数据分析中广泛用于识别数据亚型，但现有验证方法无法区分协方差结构伪影与真实亚型。
ai.method: 构建匹配样本协方差矩阵的高斯零模型，并采用衡量社区间均值差异的检验统计量进行假设检验。
ai.result: 在四个已发表的Mapper分析案例中，经异常单例社区校正后，观察到的差异均未超过零模型在α=0.05水平下的预期。
ai.help_to_user: 为拓扑数据分析中的亚型声明提供了统计验证框架，帮助研究者区分数据固有结构与真实生物学信号。

idea_spark.idea: 开发针对特定数据生成过程的零模型，以检验其他拓扑特征或聚类结构的显著性。
idea_spark.risk: 高斯假设可能不适用于非正态分布数据，需开发更通用的分布假设或非参数方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对高维数据几何伪影的系统性研究，推动拓扑数据分析方法论的严谨性发展。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a Gaussian null model to test whether subtypes identified by the Mapper algorithm are merely artifacts of covariance structure rather than genuine evidence.
en.motivation: The Mapper algorithm in topological data analysis is widely used to identify subtypes, but existing validation approaches cannot distinguish covariance artifacts from true subtypes.
en.method: Construct a Gaussian null model matching the sample covariance matrix and employ a test statistic measuring mean-level differentiation between communities.
en.result: In four published Mapper analyses, after accounting for outlier singleton communities, observed differentiation did not exceed what the null model produces at the α = 0.05 level.
en.help_to_user: Provides a statistical validation framework for subtype claims in topological data analysis, helping researchers distinguish inherent data structure from genuine biological signals.

idea_spark.idea: Develop null models for specific data-generating processes to test the significance of other topological features or clustering structures.
idea_spark.risk: Gaussian assumptions may not hold for non-normal data, requiring more general distributional assumptions or nonparametric methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires systematic study of geometric artifacts in high-dimensional data, promoting methodological rigor in topological data analysis.

papers.title: Waves Everywhere: A Distributional Equation Approach to Front Propagation
papers.summary: We study reaction-diffusion particle systems with several interaction mechanisms. As the number of particles tends to infinity, the system admits a mean-field limit describing the bulk behaviour. We focus on determining the propagation speed and the particle distribution around the centre of mass, which corresponds to the travelling wave of the limiting equation. We introduce a probabilistic method to characterise these waves via tagged particle distributional equations. Our key technique connects these to linear distributional equations solvable using martingale limits from branching processes. We first demonstrate our approach on a general model where particles move via Lévy processes and synchronise at interaction moments (the lower particle jumps to the position of the higher one). Assuming the mean-field limit holds, we characterise its travelling-wave solutions. We then apply the method to two specific models with established mean-field limits. For Brownian particles, we recover known travelling-wave solutions of the F-KPP equation. For the compound Poisson model studied in \cite{baryshnikov2025large} where particles perform random walks with exponential holding times and copy positions at interactions, we extend previous results beyond exponential jumps to arbitrary jump distributions. Finally, we analyse the power-of-2 growth model, where interactions add a random value to the lower particle. We characterise its travelling waves and discover a surprising connection to the synchronisation models.   The distributional equations at the heart of our technique are of independent interest, and we identify connections and differences with related equations studied extensively in the literature.

ai.tldr: 本文研究具有多种相互作用机制的反应-扩散粒子系统，提出一种基于标记粒子分布方程的随机方法，用于刻画平均场极限下的行波解及其传播速度。
ai.motivation: 在粒子数趋于无穷时，反应-扩散粒子系统存在描述整体行为的平均场极限。确定该极限行波解的传播速度及质心附近的粒子分布是核心问题。
ai.method: 引入一种概率方法，通过标记粒子的分布方程来刻画行波。关键技术是将这些方程与可通过分支过程的鞅极限求解的线性分布方程联系起来。
ai.result: 在一般模型（粒子作Lévy运动并在相互作用时同步）中刻画了行波解；在布朗粒子模型中恢复了F-KPP方程的已知行波解；在复合泊松模型中推广了先前结果；在幂次增长模型中刻画了行波并发现了与同步模型的意外联系。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种基于分布方程的通用概率框架，用于分析粒子系统平均场极限的行波传播问题，连接了分支过程理论与偏微分方程行波解。

idea_spark.idea: 用概率分布方程作为桥梁，连接微观粒子相互作用与宏观行波现象。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于平均场极限的有效性假设，对于不满足该极限的系统可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该分布方程框架可能适用于其他具有传播现象的复杂随机系统，如生态学中的物种扩散或社交网络中的信息传播。

zh.tldr: 本文研究具有多种相互作用机制的反应-扩散粒子系统，提出一种基于标记粒子分布方程的随机方法，用于刻画平均场极限下的行波解及其传播速度。
zh.motivation: 在粒子数趋于无穷时，反应-扩散粒子系统存在描述整体行为的平均场极限。确定该极限行波解的传播速度及质心附近的粒子分布是核心问题。
zh.method: 引入一种概率方法，通过标记粒子的分布方程来刻画行波。关键技术是将这些方程与可通过分支过程的鞅极限求解的线性分布方程联系起来。
zh.result: 在一般模型（粒子作Lévy运动并在相互作用时同步）中刻画了行波解；在布朗粒子模型中恢复了F-KPP方程的已知行波解；在复合泊松模型中推广了先前结果；在幂次增长模型中刻画了行波并发现了与同步模型的意外联系。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种基于分布方程的通用概率框架，用于分析粒子系统平均场极限的行波传播问题，连接了分支过程理论与偏微分方程行波解。

idea_spark.idea: 用概率分布方程作为桥梁，连接微观粒子相互作用与宏观行波现象。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于平均场极限的有效性假设，对于不满足该极限的系统可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该分布方程框架可能适用于其他具有传播现象的复杂随机系统，如生态学中的物种扩散或社交网络中的信息传播。

en.tldr: This paper studies reaction-diffusion particle systems with various interaction mechanisms, proposing a probabilistic method based on tagged particle distributional equations to characterize travelling wave solutions and propagation speeds in the mean-field limit.
en.motivation: As the number of particles tends to infinity, reaction-diffusion particle systems admit a mean-field limit describing bulk behavior. Determining the propagation speed and particle distribution around the center of mass (corresponding to the travelling wave of the limiting equation) is a central problem.
en.method: Introduces a probabilistic method to characterize these waves via tagged particle distributional equations. The key technique connects these to linear distributional equations solvable using martingale limits from branching processes.
en.result: Characterizes travelling-wave solutions for a general model (particles moving via Lévy processes and synchronizing at interactions); recovers known travelling-wave solutions of the F-KPP equation for Brownian particles; extends previous results for the compound Poisson model beyond exponential jumps; characterizes travelling waves for the power-of-2 growth model and discovers a surprising connection to synchronization models.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general probabilistic framework based on distributional equations for analyzing travelling wave propagation in mean-field limits of particle systems, connecting branching process theory with PDE travelling wave solutions.

idea_spark.idea: Using probability distributional equations as a bridge connecting microscopic particle interactions with macroscopic travelling wave phenomena.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on the assumption that the mean-field limit holds, which may not be valid for systems that violate its conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: This distributional equation framework could be applicable to other complex stochastic systems exhibiting propagation phenomena, such as species dispersal in ecology or information spread in social networks.

papers.title: Asymptotic stability and diffusion-driven pattern formation in a predator-prey system with two chemicals
papers.summary: This work analyzes a predator-prey cross-diffusion system coupled with two chemical substances under homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions in a bounded domain Omega subset of R^n (n >= 2) with smooth boundary dOmega. Under appropriate conditions on the model parameters, the global existence of classical solutions is established. Furthermore, by constructing a suitable Lyapunov functional, the asymptotic stability of the spatially homogeneous steady state is proved. The emergence of spatial patterns induced by diffusion-driven instability is also investigated. Owing to the complexity of the resulting four-equation system, the criteria for Turing bifurcation are derived numerically rather than analytically. Numerical simulations are performed to generate Turing bifurcation diagrams, illustrating the dynamical responses of the system to variations in the predation rate. These results provide new insights into the role of predation intensity in the formation of spatial patterns in predator-prey systems mediated by two chemical substances.

ai.tldr: 本文分析了一个包含两种化学物质的捕食者-猎物交叉扩散系统，证明了经典解的全局存在性、空间均匀稳态的渐近稳定性，并数值研究了由扩散驱动不稳定性引发的空间图灵斑图形成。
ai.motivation: 研究两种化学物质介导的捕食者-猎物系统中，扩散效应如何影响空间斑图的形成，特别是捕食强度在其中的作用。
ai.method: 在光滑有界域中建立四方程交叉扩散系统，利用Lyapunov泛函证明渐近稳定性，通过数值方法推导图灵分岔条件并进行模拟。
ai.result: 获得了经典解的全局存在性，证明了空间均匀稳态的渐近稳定性，并通过数值模拟展示了捕食率变化对系统动力学响应及空间斑图形成的影响。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解多化学物质耦合的生态扩散系统中斑图形成的机制提供了数学框架和数值依据。

idea_spark.idea: 将化学信号种类扩展至两种，研究其协同或竞争效应对生态斑图形成的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 四方程系统解析处理困难，高度依赖数值方法；参数条件可能较苛刻，实际生态对应性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索不同边界条件、空间维数或非均匀环境对多化学物质介导的斑图形成的影响。

en.tldr: This work analyzes a predator-prey cross-diffusion system coupled with two chemicals, establishes global existence of classical solutions and asymptotic stability of the homogeneous steady state, and numerically investigates Turing pattern formation driven by diffusion instability.
en.motivation: To understand how diffusion effects influence spatial pattern formation in predator-prey systems mediated by two chemical substances, particularly the role of predation intensity.
en.method: A four-equation cross-diffusion system in a smooth bounded domain is analyzed; Lyapunov functionals prove asymptotic stability; Turing bifurcation criteria are derived numerically with simulations.
en.result: Global existence of classical solutions is established; asymptotic stability of the spatially homogeneous steady state is proved; numerical simulations illustrate how predation rate variations affect dynamical responses and spatial pattern formation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a mathematical framework and numerical evidence for understanding pattern formation mechanisms in ecological diffusion systems coupled with multiple chemicals.

idea_spark.idea: Extend chemical signaling to two substances to study their synergistic or competitive effects on ecological pattern formation.
idea_spark.risk: Analytical treatment of the four-equation system is difficult, relying heavily on numerical methods; parameter conditions may be restrictive, requiring validation against real ecological contexts.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore effects of different boundary conditions, spatial dimensions, or heterogeneous environments on pattern formation mediated by multiple chemicals.

papers.title: A Note on Coadjoint Orbits for Multifermion Systems
papers.summary: The coadjoint orbit action for a multifermion system, as an exact description of its dynamics, is considered. A parametrization of the variables involved is given which facilitates the approximation of this by another coadjoint orbit action suitable for expansions around the Fermi surface, recovering various actions which have been used in previous literature. The presentation of this in terms of functions on phase space with star-products as well as further truncations are briefly considered.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了多费米子系统的余伴随轨道作用，给出了变量参数化方法，便于在费米面附近展开近似，并联系了已有文献中的各种作用量形式。
ai.motivation: 多费米子系统的余伴随轨道作用为其动力学提供了精确描述，但需要发展便于在费米面附近展开的参数化与近似方法，以统一并推广已有文献中的处理方式。
ai.method: 提出了一种变量参数化方案，将精确的余伴随轨道作用近似为适用于费米面展开的另一余伴随轨道作用，并简要讨论了基于相空间函数与星积的表述以及进一步截断方案。
ai.result: 建立的参数化框架能够系统恢复以往文献中使用的各种作用量，为多费米子系统在费米面附近的动力学展开提供了统一的基础。
ai.help_to_user: 本文为处理多费米子系统的余伴随轨道动力学提供了系统的参数化与近似框架，特别适用于费米面附近的展开计算。

idea_spark.idea: 将精确的几何动力学作用量通过变量重参数化，映射到更便于微扰展开的等效作用量形式。
idea_spark.risk: 近似过程中可能丢失某些非微扰效应，截断方案的合理性需针对具体物理问题验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该框架暗示了不同有效场论作用量在几何动力学下的统一起源，可能启发新的费米面理论构造。

en.tldr: This note considers the coadjoint orbit action for multifermion systems, provides a parametrization of variables that facilitates approximation around the Fermi surface, and recovers various actions used in previous literature.
en.motivation: The coadjoint orbit action gives an exact description of multifermion dynamics, but a parametrization suitable for expansions near the Fermi surface is needed to unify and extend previous approaches.
en.method: A parametrization of variables is introduced that approximates the exact coadjoint orbit action by another coadjoint orbit action amenable to Fermi surface expansions. Presentation via phase-space functions with star-products and further truncations are briefly discussed.
en.result: The parametrization framework systematically recovers various actions used in earlier literature, providing a unified basis for dynamical expansions near the Fermi surface in multifermion systems.
en.help_to_user: This work offers a systematic parametrization and approximation framework for coadjoint orbit dynamics of multifermion systems, particularly useful for expansions around the Fermi surface.

idea_spark.idea: Reparameterize the exact geometric dynamical action to map it to an equivalent form more suitable for perturbative expansion.
idea_spark.risk: Some non‑perturbative effects may be lost in the approximation; truncation schemes require validation for specific physical problems.
idea_spark.inspiration: The framework suggests a unified geometric‑dynamical origin for different effective field‑theory actions, potentially inspiring new constructions of Fermi‑surface theories.

papers.title: Minimax optimal dual control -- The single input case
papers.summary: An explicit solution is derived for the Bellman inequality corresponding to minimax optimal dual control. The minimizing player determines control action as a function of past state measurements and inputs. The maximizing player selects disturbances and model parameters for the underlying linear time-invariant dynamics. The optimal minimizing policy is a dual controller that optimizes the tradeoff between exploration and exploitation. Once sufficient data has been collected, the policy becomes a deterministic certainty equivalence controller. However, when data is insufficient, the policy introduces a randomized term to improve excitation.

ai.tldr: 针对单输入情况，推导了极小极大最优对偶控制对应的贝尔曼不等式的显式解，得到了一种在探索与利用间权衡的最优策略。
ai.motivation: 在模型参数不确定的动态系统中，控制器需要在估计系统（探索）和优化性能（利用）之间进行权衡。传统确定性控制器在数据不足时性能受限，需要一种理论上的最优对偶控制策略。
ai.method: 将问题建模为双人零和博弈：最小化玩家（控制器）根据过去的状态测量和输入决定控制动作；最大化玩家选择干扰和线性时不变动态的模型参数。通过求解对应的贝尔曼不等式，得到显式的最优策略。
ai.result: 最优策略是一个对偶控制器。当数据充足时，它退化为确定性的确定性等价控制器；当数据不足时，策略会引入一个随机项以改善激励，从而主动探索系统特性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理参数不确定性的线性系统控制提供了理论最优解，明确了从主动探索到确定性控制的切换条件。

idea_spark.idea: 将数据充足性作为控制器结构（随机/确定性）的切换条件。
idea_spark.risk: 显式解仅针对单输入情况，多输入情况的扩展可能非常复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可启发自适应控制、强化学习中的探索策略设计，或用于机器人学中需要在线辨识模型的控制任务。

en.tldr: An explicit solution is derived for the Bellman inequality corresponding to minimax optimal dual control in the single-input case, yielding an optimal policy that trades off exploration and exploitation.
en.motivation: In dynamical systems with uncertain parameters, the controller must trade off estimating the system (exploration) and optimizing performance (exploitation). Traditional deterministic controllers are limited when data is insufficient, necessitating a theoretically optimal dual control strategy.
en.method: The problem is modeled as a two-player zero-sum game: the minimizing player (controller) determines control actions based on past state measurements and inputs; the maximizing player selects disturbances and model parameters for the underlying linear time-invariant dynamics. The explicit optimal policy is obtained by solving the corresponding Bellman inequality.
en.result: The optimal policy is a dual controller. When sufficient data has been collected, it reduces to a deterministic certainty equivalence controller. When data is insufficient, the policy introduces a randomized term to improve excitation, thereby actively exploring the system.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretically optimal solution for controlling linear systems with parameter uncertainty, clarifying the switching condition from active exploration to deterministic control.

idea_spark.idea: Using data sufficiency as a switching condition for the controller structure (randomized/deterministic).
idea_spark.risk: The explicit solution is only for the single-input case; extension to multiple inputs may be highly complex.
idea_spark.inspiration: This approach could inspire exploration strategy design in adaptive control or reinforcement learning, or be applied to robotic control tasks requiring online model identification.

papers.title: RISC-V Functional Safety for Autonomous Automotive Systems: An Analytical Framework and Research Roadmap for ML-Assisted Certification
papers.summary: RISC-V is emerging as a viable platform for automotive-grade embedded computing, with recent ISO 26262 ASIL-D certifications demonstrating readiness for safety-critical deployment in autonomous driving systems. However, functional safety in automotive systems is fundamentally a certification problem rather than a processor problem. The dominant costs arise from diagnostic coverage analysis, toolchain qualification, fault injection campaigns, safety-case generation, and compliance with ISO 26262, ISO 21448 (SOTIF), and ISO/SAE 21434.   This paper analyzes the role of RISC-V in automotive functional safety, focusing on ISA openness, formal verifiability, custom extension control, debug transparency, and vendor-independent qualification. We examine autonomous driving safety requirements and map them to RISC-V architectural challenges such as lockstep execution, safety islands, mixed-criticality isolation, and secure debug.   Rather than proposing a single algorithmic breakthrough, we present an analytical framework and research roadmap centered on certification economics as the primary optimization objective. We also discuss how selected ML methods, including LLM-assisted FMEDA generation, knowledge-graph-based safety case automation, reinforcement learning for fault injection, and graph neural networks for diagnostic coverage, can support certification workflows. We argue that the strongest outcome is not a faster core, but an ASIL-D-ready certifiable RISC-V platform.

ai.tldr: 本文分析了RISC-V在汽车功能安全中的作用，提出了以认证经济学为主要优化目标的分析框架和研究路线图，并探讨了机器学习方法如何支持认证工作流程。
ai.motivation: RISC-V正成为汽车级嵌入式计算的可行平台，但汽车功能安全本质上是一个认证问题，而非处理器问题。主要成本来自诊断覆盖率分析、工具链鉴定、故障注入活动、安全案例生成以及与ISO 26262等标准的合规性。
ai.method: 分析RISC-V在汽车功能安全中的作用，重点关注ISA开放性、形式可验证性、自定义扩展控制、调试透明度和供应商独立鉴定。将自动驾驶安全要求映射到RISC-V架构挑战，并提出以认证经济学为中心的分析框架和研究路线图。
ai.result: 最强结果不是更快的核心，而是具备ASIL-D认证准备的可认证RISC-V平台。讨论了LLM辅助FMEDA生成、基于知识图的安全案例自动化、强化学习用于故障注入和图神经网络用于诊断覆盖率等ML方法如何支持认证工作流程。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究RISC-V在汽车功能安全认证中的应用提供了系统性分析框架和未来研究方向，特别是如何利用机器学习优化认证成本。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个基于ML的自动化工具链，用于生成符合ISO 26262的安全案例和诊断覆盖率报告。
idea_spark.risk: ML方法在安全关键系统中的可靠性和可解释性仍需严格验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将图神经网络用于诊断覆盖率分析，可能提高复杂系统安全分析的效率和准确性。

zh.result: 最强结果不是更快的核心，而是具备ASIL-D认证准备的可认证RISC-V平台。讨论了LLM辅助FMEDA生成、基于知识图的安全案例自动化、强化学习用于故障注入和图神经网络用于诊断覆盖率等ML方法如何支持认证工作流程。
zh.help_to_user: 为研究RISC-V在汽车功能安全认证中的应用提供了系统性分析框架和未来研究方向，特别是如何利用机器学习优化认证成本。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个基于ML的自动化工具链，用于生成符合ISO 26262的安全案例和诊断覆盖率报告。
idea_spark.risk: ML方法在安全关键系统中的可靠性和可解释性仍需严格验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将图神经网络用于诊断覆盖率分析，可能提高复杂系统安全分析的效率和准确性。

en.tldr: This paper analyzes the role of RISC-V in automotive functional safety, presents an analytical framework and research roadmap centered on certification economics as the primary optimization objective, and discusses how ML methods can support certification workflows.
en.motivation: RISC-V is emerging as a viable platform for automotive-grade embedded computing, but functional safety in automotive systems is fundamentally a certification problem rather than a processor problem. The dominant costs arise from diagnostic coverage analysis, toolchain qualification, fault injection campaigns, safety-case generation, and compliance with standards like ISO 26262.
en.method: Analyzes the role of RISC-V in automotive functional safety, focusing on ISA openness, formal verifiability, custom extension control, debug transparency, and vendor-independent qualification. Maps autonomous driving safety requirements to RISC-V architectural challenges and presents an analytical framework and research roadmap centered on certification economics.
en.result: The strongest outcome is not a faster core, but an ASIL-D-ready certifiable RISC-V platform. Discusses how selected ML methods, including LLM-assisted FMEDA generation, knowledge-graph-based safety case automation, reinforcement learning for fault injection, and graph neural networks for diagnostic coverage, can support certification workflows.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic analytical framework and future research directions for studying RISC-V's application in automotive functional safety certification, particularly how to leverage machine learning to optimize certification costs.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an ML-based automated toolchain for generating ISO 26262-compliant safety cases and diagnostic coverage reports.
idea_spark.risk: The reliability and interpretability of ML methods in safety-critical systems still require rigorous verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using graph neural networks for diagnostic coverage analysis may improve the efficiency and accuracy of safety analysis for complex systems.

papers.title: Hybrid Multi-Dimensional MRI Prostate Cancer Detection via Hadamard Network-Based Bias Correction and Residual Networks
papers.summary: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is vital for prostate cancer (PCa) diagnosis. While advanced techniques such as Hybrid Multi-dimensional MRI (HM-MRI) have enhanced diagnostic capabilities, the significant need remains for robust, automated Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based detection methods. In this study, we combine quantitative HM-MRI of tissue composition with an AI-based neural network. We propose the Hadamard-Bias Network plus ResNet18 (HBR-Net-18), a two-stage AI framework for PCa detection. In the first stage, a Hadamard U-Net-based algorithm suppresses intensity inhomogeneities (bias fields) across six parametric HM-MRI maps generated via a Physics-Informed Autoencoder (PIA). In the second stage, a Residual Network (ResNet-18) performs patch-level classification. The framework utilizes overlapping 11-by-11 patches, incorporating both 2D intra-slice and 3D inter-slice (adjacent-slice) information to improve spatial consistency. Our experimental results demonstrate that HB-Net achieves balanced sensitivity and specificity, significantly outperforming conventional radiomics-based approaches and baseline CNN models, highlighting its potential for clinical deployment.

ai.tldr: 本研究提出HBR-Net-18两阶段AI框架，通过Hadamard U-Net校正HM-MRI图像偏置场，再使用ResNet-18进行斑块级分类，显著提升前列腺癌检测性能。
ai.motivation: 混合多维MRI虽提升了前列腺癌诊断能力，但仍缺乏稳健的自动化AI检测方法。
ai.method: 第一阶段采用基于Hadamard U-Net的算法抑制六参数HM-MRI图的强度不均匀性；第二阶段使用ResNet-18对重叠的11×11斑块进行2D/3D分类。
ai.result: HB-Net实现了平衡的敏感性和特异性，显著优于传统放射组学方法和基线CNN模型。
ai.help_to_user: 为医学影像分析提供了结合物理信息编码与深度学习的偏置场校正与分类框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将物理信息编码生成的多参数图与深度学习分类器结合，提升模型可解释性与鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于特定MRI参数图的生成质量，泛化至其他医疗机构设备需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将物理模型与数据驱动网络融合，解决医学影像中的系统误差问题。

en.tldr: This study proposes HBR-Net-18, a two-stage AI framework that corrects bias fields in HM-MRI images via Hadamard U-Net and performs patch-level classification using ResNet-18, significantly improving prostate cancer detection performance.
en.motivation: While Hybrid Multi-dimensional MRI enhances diagnostic capabilities, there remains a significant need for robust automated AI-based detection methods for prostate cancer.
en.method: Stage one uses a Hadamard U-Net-based algorithm to suppress intensity inhomogeneities across six parametric HM-MRI maps; stage two employs ResNet-18 for 2D/3D classification of overlapping 11×11 patches.
en.result: HB-Net achieves balanced sensitivity and specificity, significantly outperforming conventional radiomics approaches and baseline CNN models.
en.help_to_user: Provides a bias correction and classification framework combining physics-informed encoding with deep learning for medical image analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Combining physics-informed encoded multi-parametric maps with deep learning classifiers enhances model interpretability and robustness.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on the quality of specific MRI parametric map generation; generalization to other institutional devices requires validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the fusion of physical models with data-driven networks to address systematic errors in medical imaging.

papers.title: Neutrally Evolving Interlocking Complexity in the Quandary Den
papers.summary: Molecular biology features numerous complexes of proteins that coordinate in an interlocking fashion to fulfill different functions. Adaptive evolution explains some of this complexity, but needn't be the default when neutral explanations suffice. A new artificial life model ``organism,'' the Quandary Den, is introduced to explore different neutral evolution scenarios where complexity increases in the absence of greater informational needs. Two interlocking complexity scenarios emerge. Subfunctionalization leads to functionality diffusing through the complex. Masking allows intracomplex interference to accumulate genetically, requiring that it be blocked at the level of expression.

ai.tldr: 本文引入了一个名为Quandary Den的人工生命模型，用于探索在缺乏更大信息需求的情况下，复杂性如何通过中性演化而增加。
ai.motivation: 分子生物学中存在许多蛋白质以互锁方式协调完成不同功能的复合物。适应性演化可以解释部分复杂性，但当中性解释足够时，它不一定是默认机制。
ai.method: 引入新的人工生命模型“Quandary Den”，探索不同的中性演化场景，其中复杂性在缺乏更大信息需求的情况下增加。
ai.result: 出现了两种互锁复杂性场景：亚功能化导致功能在复合物中扩散；掩蔽允许复合物内干扰在遗传上积累，需要在表达层面进行阻断。
ai.help_to_user: 该模型为理解生物系统中非适应性复杂性增长提供了计算框架。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个模拟工具，可视化不同中性演化路径下系统复杂性的动态变化。
idea_spark.risk: 模型简化可能无法完全捕捉真实生物系统的所有约束条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对“非功能性”复杂性在人工和自然系统中涌现机制的新思考。

en.tldr: This paper introduces an artificial life model called the Quandary Den to explore how complexity can increase through neutral evolution in the absence of greater informational needs.
en.motivation: Molecular biology features numerous protein complexes that coordinate in an interlocking fashion. Adaptive evolution explains some complexity, but neutral explanations may suffice when no greater function is required.
en.method: Introduces a new artificial life model 'Quandary Den' to explore different neutral evolution scenarios where complexity increases without greater informational demands.
en.result: Two interlocking complexity scenarios emerge: subfunctionalization leads to functionality diffusing through the complex; masking allows intracomplex interference to accumulate genetically, requiring blocking at expression level.
en.help_to_user: The model provides a computational framework for understanding non-adaptive complexity growth in biological systems.

idea_spark.idea: Develop a simulation tool visualizing dynamic changes in system complexity under different neutral evolution paths.
idea_spark.risk: Model simplifications may not fully capture all constraints of real biological systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires new thinking about mechanisms of 'non-functional' complexity emergence in both artificial and natural systems.

papers.title: Synthetic Seismograms from Particle Bed Interactions and Turbulent River Flow: Modeling and Comparison with Observations
papers.summary: We present a physics based numerical model that estimates the seismic radiation generated by water sediment flows in gravel-bed rivers. The model reproduces the trajectories of individual particles, evaluates impact and rolling forces from grain scale dynamics, and accounts for broadband turbulence and vortex shedding in the water column. Synthetic seismic signals are propagated to the receivers using the Rayleigh wave Green s function approach and synthetic ground-velocity signals are estimated. Application to a controlled test case shows how intermittent, size selective sediment transport mechanisms produce distinct spectral signatures. Comparison with seismic data from a flood event in a mountain torrent in the Tuscan Apennines displays general agreement with the observed frequency bands and clarifies the relative width of particle collisions and turbulent flow. These results show that resolved grain scale dynamics provides a framework for discriminating sediment transport and flow induced contributions to river seismic noise.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于物理的数值模型，用于估计砾石河床中水-沉积物流产生的地震辐射，通过模拟颗粒轨迹、碰撞力和湍流，生成合成地震图并与观测数据对比。
ai.motivation: 河流地震噪声中沉积物输运与水流贡献的区分需要更精细的物理模型。
ai.method: 建立颗粒尺度动力学模型，模拟单个颗粒轨迹、碰撞与滚动力，结合宽频湍流和涡旋脱落，使用瑞利波格林函数法传播合成地震信号至接收器。
ai.result: 模型在受控测试中再现了间歇性、粒径选择性输运机制的光谱特征；与山洪地震数据对比显示频率带一致，并阐明了颗粒碰撞与湍流贡献的相对宽度。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了从颗粒尺度动力学区分沉积物输运与水流诱发地震噪声的框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将离散元方法与流体湍流模型结合，量化不同输运机制的地震频谱特征。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖于颗粒参数和湍流表征的准确性，野外复杂环境可能引入未建模因素。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发利用高分辨率地震数据反演沉积物输运速率或粒径分布的可能性。

zh.tldr: 提出一种基于物理的数值模型，用于估计砾石河床中水-沉积物流产生的地震辐射，通过模拟颗粒轨迹、碰撞力和湍流，生成合成地震图并与观测数据对比。

idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖于颗粒参数和湍流表征的准确性，野外复杂环境可能引入未建模因素。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发利用高分辨率地震数据反演沉积物输运速率或粒径分布的可能性。

en.tldr: A physics-based numerical model estimates seismic radiation from water-sediment flows in gravel-bed rivers by simulating particle trajectories, impact forces, and turbulence, generating synthetic seismograms compared with observations.
en.motivation: Discriminating sediment transport and flow-induced contributions to river seismic noise requires finer physical modeling.
en.method: Develop a grain-scale dynamics model simulating individual particle trajectories, impact/rolling forces, broadband turbulence, and vortex shedding; propagate synthetic seismic signals using Rayleigh wave Green's function approach.
en.result: The model reproduces spectral signatures of intermittent, size-selective transport in a controlled test; comparison with flood seismic data shows agreement in frequency bands and clarifies relative contributions of particle collisions vs. turbulent flow.
en.help_to_user: Provides a framework to discriminate sediment transport and flow-induced seismic noise from resolved grain-scale dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Combine discrete element method with fluid turbulence modeling to quantify seismic spectral features of different transport mechanisms.
idea_spark.risk: Model accuracy depends on grain parameters and turbulence characterization; field complexity may introduce unmodeled factors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires potential inversion of sediment transport rates or grain size distributions from high-resolution seismic data.

papers.title: A Universal Systematic Method to Generate Error Patterns on Memoryless Channels
papers.summary: The high computational cost of approaching the performance of Maximum-likelihood (ML) decoding has limited its practical use for decades. Because the complexity grows exponentially with the message length, researchers have spent years developing algorithms like Ordered Statistics Decoding (OSD), Partial Ordered Statistics Decoding (POSD) and Guessing Random Additive Noise decoding (GRAND) which try to approach ML performance. OSD, POSD and GRAND work by trying to guess the error patterns affecting the received signals. However, there does not exist a systematic method to extend the error pattern guesses to novel channels. This work introduces a systematic method that uses the Probability Density Function (PDF) of a memoryless channel to generate a set of error patterns that can be applied on any future received signal on this channel. Simulation results show that our proposed method applied on GRAND, OSD and POSD generally matches or outperforms current pre-generated error patterns on additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN) channel, mixture of Gaussian distribution channels, Rayleigh fading channel with perfect knowledge of Channel State Information (CSI) and Rayleigh fading channel with no perfect knowledge of Channel State Information (NCSI).

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用系统方法，利用无记忆信道的概率密度函数生成错误模式集合，可应用于GRAND、OSD和POSD等解码算法，在多种信道条件下匹配或超越现有预生成错误模式的性能。
ai.motivation: 最大似然解码性能优异但计算成本极高，复杂度随消息长度指数增长。现有近似算法如OSD、POSD和GRAND通过猜测错误模式来逼近ML性能，但缺乏系统方法将错误模式猜测扩展到新信道。
ai.method: 提出一种系统方法，利用无记忆信道的概率密度函数生成错误模式集合。该方法可应用于该信道上任何未来接收信号，并与GRAND、OSD和POSD等解码算法结合使用。
ai.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法在AWGN信道、高斯混合分布信道、具有完美CSI的瑞利衰落信道以及不具有完美CSI的瑞利衰落信道上，应用GRAND、OSD和POSD时，通常匹配或优于当前预生成的错误模式。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种可扩展的错误模式生成框架，适用于多种信道条件和解码算法，有助于降低接近ML解码性能的计算复杂度。

idea_spark.idea: 将信道PDF直接转化为错误模式搜索空间，建立信道特性与解码尝试之间的直接映射。
idea_spark.risk: 方法性能可能依赖于信道PDF估计的准确性，在时变信道中可能需要自适应更新。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将统计学习方法与经典解码算法结合，通过数据驱动方式优化解码搜索策略。

zh.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用系统方法，利用无记忆信道的概率密度函数生成错误模式集合，可应用于GRAND、OSD和POSD等解码算法，在多种信道条件下匹配或超越现有预生成错误模式的性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将信道PDF直接转化为错误模式搜索空间，建立信道特性与解码尝试之间的直接映射。
idea_spark.risk: 方法性能可能依赖于信道PDF估计的准确性，在时变信道中可能需要自适应更新。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将统计学习方法与经典解码算法结合，通过数据驱动方式优化解码搜索策略。

en.tldr: This paper introduces a universal systematic method that uses the probability density function of a memoryless channel to generate error patterns, applicable to decoding algorithms like GRAND, OSD, and POSD, matching or outperforming current pre-generated patterns across various channel conditions.
en.motivation: The high computational cost of Maximum-likelihood decoding has limited its practical use for decades. Existing approximation algorithms like OSD, POSD, and GRAND attempt to approach ML performance by guessing error patterns, but lack a systematic method to extend error pattern guessing to novel channels.
en.method: Proposes a systematic method that utilizes the Probability Density Function of a memoryless channel to generate a set of error patterns. This method can be applied to any future received signal on this channel and integrated with decoding algorithms such as GRAND, OSD, and POSD.
en.result: Simulation results show that the proposed method applied to GRAND, OSD, and POSD generally matches or outperforms current pre-generated error patterns on AWGN channels, mixture of Gaussian distribution channels, Rayleigh fading channels with perfect CSI, and Rayleigh fading channels without perfect CSI.
en.help_to_user: Provides an extensible error pattern generation framework applicable to multiple channel conditions and decoding algorithms, helping reduce computational complexity while approaching ML decoding performance.

idea_spark.idea: Directly transform channel PDF into error pattern search space, establishing a direct mapping between channel characteristics and decoding attempts.
idea_spark.risk: Method performance may depend on the accuracy of channel PDF estimation, potentially requiring adaptive updates in time-varying channels.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining statistical learning approaches with classical decoding algorithms to optimize decoding search strategies through data-driven methods.

papers.title: Geometric Trajectory Optimization for TRACON Arrivals: An NLP Approach with ATC Vectoring Maneuver Modeling
papers.summary: Terminal airspace congestion remains a major bottleneck in the global air traffic network. Although the Aircraft Sequencing and Scheduling Problem (ASSP) has been widely studied, many methods rely on simplified node-link abstractions that ignore the practical flight path, producing schedules that can be hard to execute under real airspace geometric constraints. This paper introduces a high-fidelity trajectory optimization framework for Terminal Arrival Sequencing and Scheduling (TASS) that explicitly models controller vectoring maneuvers. We formulate a single-stage nonlinear programming (NLP) model with a weighted objective function that optimizes Baseleg path extension and segment-wise speed profiles for arriving aircraft. The model enforces nonlinear geometric coupling between Baseleg extensions and the required Radius-to-Fix (RF) turn for Final Approach Fix (FAF) intercept through closed-form expressions. Under the First-Come-First-Served (FCFS) rule, it generates separated, operationally feasible trajectories aligned with controller practice. Monte Carlo simulations with ample runs on the A80 TRACON in Atlanta demonstrate minimal separation violations below the runway capacity threshold through tactical path stretching, with violations occurring only when arrival rates exceed the maximum tolerable rate.

ai.tldr: 提出一种高保真轨迹优化框架，用于终端进场排序与调度，显式建模管制员引导机动，通过非线性规划生成满足几何约束的可执行轨迹。

en.tldr: Proposes a high-fidelity trajectory optimization framework for Terminal Arrival Sequencing and Scheduling that explicitly models controller vectoring maneuvers, generating executable trajectories satisfying geometric constraints via nonlinear programming.
en.motivation: Terminal airspace congestion is a major bottleneck in the global air traffic network. Many existing methods rely on simplified node-link abstractions that ignore practical flight paths, producing schedules hard to execute under real geometric constraints.
en.method: Formulates a single-stage nonlinear programming model optimizing Baseleg path extensions and segment-wise speed profiles for arriving aircraft. Enforces nonlinear geometric coupling between Baseleg extensions and required Radius-to-Fix turn for Final Approach Fix intercept through closed-form expressions.
en.result: Monte Carlo simulations on the Atlanta A80 TRACON demonstrate minimal separation violations below the runway capacity threshold via tactical path stretching, with violations occurring only when arrival rates exceed the maximum tolerable rate.
en.help_to_user: Provides a high-fidelity trajectory optimization method for terminal airspace management that is closer to controller practice and considers actual flight paths.

idea_spark.idea: Directly encode controller vectoring maneuvers (e.g., path extensions, turns) as constraints in the optimization model, rather than post-optimization adjustments.
idea_spark.risk: The model relies on specific airspace structures (e.g., Baseleg, FAF) and the FCFS rule; adaptation may be needed for other control strategies or airspace configurations.
idea_spark.inspiration: The inspiration lies in translating operational practices (controller vectoring) directly into mathematical model constraints, ensuring feasibility at the optimization stage.

papers.title: Accuracy Certificates for Convex Optimization at Accelerated Rates via Primal-Dual Averaging
papers.summary: Many works in convex optimization provide rates for achieving a small primal gap. However, this quantity is typically unavailable in practice. In this work, we show that solving a regularized surrogate with algorithms based on simple primal-dual averaging provides non-asymptotic convergence guarantees for a \textit{computable} optimality certificate. We first analyze primal and dual methods based on one average, namely modified dual averaging and generalized conditional gradient, and establish $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1})$ certificate complexities. Motivated by asymmetries in the one-average case, we analyze a self-dual, two-average method that preserves symmetry while losing certificate guarantees. To recover certificate convergence, we propose a three-average method that achieves an accelerated $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1/2})$ certificate complexity. Furthermore, we prove primal-dual algorithm correspondences for the one, two, and three-average cases. In particular, the primal three-average accelerated method mirrors the well-known gradient extrapolation method in the dual. By interpreting our results through the lens of zero-sum matrix games and Fisher markets, we further connect primal-dual averaging methods to game theory and market dynamics.

papers.title: Yanasse: Finding New Proofs from Deep Vision's Analogies, Part 1
papers.summary: Project Yanasse presents a method for discovering new proofs of theorems in one area of mathematics by transferring proof strategy patterns (e.g., Lean 4 tactic invocation patterns) from a structurally distant area. The system extracts tactic usage distributions across 27 top-level areas of Mathlib (217,133 proof states), computes z-scores to identify tactics that are heavily used in a source area but rare or absent in a target area, matches source and target proof states via GPU-accelerated NP-hard analogy (running on a MacBook Air via Apple's MPS backend), and then asks an AI reasoning agent to semantically adapt--not symbol-substitute--the source tactics invocation pattern to the target theorem. In this first part of the study, the method is applied to the pair Probability -> Representation Theory, producing 4 Lean-verified new proofs out of 10 attempts (40%). The proofs compile with zero sorry declarations. The key finding is that tactic schemas decompose into a head (domain-gated, rarely transfers) and a modifier (domain-general, often transfers): filter upwards's head fails in representation theory (no Filter structure), but its [LIST] with ω modifier transfers cleanly as ext1 + simp [LIST] + rfl. Crucially, the underlying matching engine--deep vision lib.py--is entirely domain independent: the same optimization code for an NP-hard matching that matches chess positions by analogy matches Lean proof states by analogy, without knowing which domain it is processing. Only a relation extractor is domain-specific.

ai.tldr: Yanasse项目提出了一种通过从结构遥远的数学领域转移证明策略模式来发现新定理证明的方法，在概率论到表示论的转移中实现了40%的成功率。
ai.motivation: 数学不同领域的证明策略存在潜在的可转移模式，但传统方法难以发现这些跨领域的类比。
ai.method: 从Mathlib的27个顶级领域提取217,133个证明状态，计算战术使用分布的z分数，通过GPU加速的NP-hard类比匹配源和目标证明状态，最后用AI推理代理语义适配战术调用模式。
ai.result: 在概率论到表示论的实验中，10次尝试产生了4个Lean验证的新证明（40%），所有证明编译时零错误。关键发现是战术模式可分解为领域特定的头部和领域通用的修饰符。
ai.help_to_user: 为数学研究者提供了自动化发现跨领域证明类比的新工具，可加速新证明的发现过程。

idea_spark.idea: 将证明战术模式分解为领域特定头部和通用修饰符的框架，可扩展到其他形式化系统的策略迁移。
idea_spark.risk: 匹配过程的计算复杂度高，依赖大规模证明库数据，可能无法处理高度特化的数学领域。
idea_spark.inspiration: 深度学习视觉库直接用于数学证明状态匹配，展示了跨模态类比发现的潜力。

en.tldr: Project Yanasse presents a method for discovering new proofs by transferring proof strategy patterns from structurally distant mathematical areas, achieving 40% success rate in Probability -> Representation Theory transfer.
en.motivation: There exist potentially transferable proof strategy patterns across different mathematical domains, but traditional methods struggle to discover these cross-domain analogies.
en.method: Extract 217,133 proof states from 27 top-level areas of Mathlib, compute z-scores of tactic usage distributions, match source and target proof states via GPU-accelerated NP-hard analogy matching, then use an AI reasoning agent to semantically adapt tactic invocation patterns.
en.result: In Probability -> Representation Theory experiments, 4 Lean-verified new proofs were produced out of 10 attempts (40%), all compiling with zero errors. Key finding: tactic schemas decompose into domain-gated heads and domain-general modifiers.
en.help_to_user: Provides mathematicians with a new tool for automated discovery of cross-domain proof analogies, potentially accelerating new proof discovery.

idea_spark.idea: The framework decomposing tactic patterns into domain-specific heads and general modifiers could extend to strategy migration in other formal systems.
idea_spark.risk: High computational complexity of matching process, dependence on large-scale proof library data, may not handle highly specialized mathematical domains.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using deep vision libraries directly for mathematical proof state matching demonstrates potential for cross-modal analogy discovery.

papers.title: BBP transition and the leading eigenvector of the spiked Wigner model with inhomogeneous noise
papers.summary: The spiked Wigner ensemble is a prototypical model for high-dimensional inference. We study the spectral properties of an inhomogeneous rank-one spiked Wigner model in which the variance of each entry of the noise matrix is itself a random variable. In the high-dimensional limit, we derive exact equations for the spectral edges, the outlier eigenvalue, and the distribution of the components of the outlier eigenvector. These equations determine the BBP transition line that separates the gapped phase, where the signal is detectable, from the gapless phase. In the gapped regime, the distribution of the outlier eigenvector provides a natural estimator of the spike. We solve the equations for a noise matrix whose variances are generated from a truncated power-law distribution. In this case, the BBP transition line is non-monotonic, showing that an inhomogeneous noise can enhance signal detectability.

ai.tldr: 研究具有非均匀噪声的尖峰Wigner模型的谱性质，推导了谱边缘、离群特征值及其特征向量分布的精确方程，确定了区分可检测与不可检测信号相的BBP转变线。
ai.motivation: 尖峰Wigner集合是高维推断的原型模型，但传统模型假设噪声均匀。实际应用中噪声往往是非均匀的，需要研究非均匀噪声对信号可检测性的影响。
ai.method: 采用非均匀秩一尖峰Wigner模型，其中噪声矩阵每个条目的方差本身是随机变量。在高温极限下，通过随机矩阵理论推导谱边缘、离群特征值和特征向量分布的精确方程。
ai.result: 推导的方程确定了BBP转变线，分隔了信号可检测的带隙相和不可检测的无隙相。对于截断幂律分布的噪声方差，BBP转变线是非单调的，表明非均匀噪声可以增强信号可检测性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了非均匀噪声下高维信号检测的理论框架，适用于需要处理异方差噪声的统计推断问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将噪声方差建模为随机变量，研究其对谱性质和检测阈值的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于高温极限和特定分布假设，实际有限维应用中可能存在偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发思考噪声异质性如何影响其他统计模型的相变行为，或如何设计自适应检测器利用噪声结构。

en.tldr: Studies spectral properties of a spiked Wigner model with inhomogeneous noise, deriving exact equations for spectral edges, outlier eigenvalue, and eigenvector distribution, determining the BBP transition line separating detectable and undetectable signal phases.
en.motivation: The spiked Wigner ensemble is a prototypical model for high-dimensional inference, but traditional models assume homogeneous noise. Real-world applications often involve inhomogeneous noise, requiring investigation of its effect on signal detectability.
en.method: Uses an inhomogeneous rank-one spiked Wigner model where the variance of each noise matrix entry is itself random. Derives exact equations for spectral edges, outlier eigenvalue, and eigenvector distribution in the high-dimensional limit using random matrix theory.
en.result: The derived equations determine the BBP transition line separating gapped (detectable) and gapless (undetectable) phases. For noise variances from a truncated power-law distribution, the BBP line is non-monotonic, showing inhomogeneous noise can enhance signal detectability.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for high-dimensional signal detection with inhomogeneous noise, applicable to statistical inference problems with heteroscedastic noise.

idea_spark.idea: Model noise variances as random variables and study their impact on spectral properties and detection thresholds.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on high-dimensional limits and specific distributional assumptions, with potential deviations in finite-dimensional applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires consideration of how noise heterogeneity affects phase transitions in other statistical models, or how to design adaptive detectors leveraging noise structure.

papers.title: CVaR-Guided Decision-Focused Learning and Risk-Triggered Re-Optimization for Two-Stage Robust Microgrid Operation
papers.summary: Microgrid operation is highly vulnerable to short-term load uncertainty, while conventional predict-then-optimize pipelines cannot fully align probabilistic forecasting quality with downstream robust scheduling performance. This paper proposes a CVaR-guided decision-focused learning and risk-triggered re-optimization framework for two-stage robust microgrid operation. A probabilistic load forecasting model first generates multi-quantile outputs, which are converted into prediction intervals to parameterize the load uncertainty set of the downstream two-stage robust optimization (TSRO) model. To improve forecasting reliability under difficult and high-risk operating conditions, a CVaR-guided forecasting objective is introduced to emphasize tail-sensitive samples. To further close the forecast-decision gap, a convex regularized surrogate TSRO model and a smooth regret loss are developed, enabling downstream operational feedback to be propagated to the forecasting model through KKT-based implicit differentiation. For online deployment, a risk-triggered re-optimization mechanism selectively re-solves the remaining-horizon TSRO only when the schedule mismatch becomes significant, avoiding unnecessary online computation. Case studies on modified IEEE 33-bus and 69-bus microgrids demonstrate superior probabilistic forecasting accuracy, operational economy, and tail-risk mitigation over benchmark methods, while preserving near-full-re-optimization performance with less than 0.5% higher operating cost and up to 91% lower daily solution time.

ai.tldr: 提出一个CVaR引导的决策聚焦学习与风险触发重优化框架，用于两阶段鲁棒微电网运行，以改善预测与调度性能的对齐。
ai.motivation: 微电网运行易受短期负荷不确定性影响，传统的预测-优化流程无法将概率预测质量与下游鲁棒调度性能充分对齐。
ai.method: 首先，概率负荷预测模型生成多分位数输出，转换为预测区间以参数化下游两阶段鲁棒优化模型的不确定集。引入CVaR引导的预测目标以强调尾部敏感样本。开发凸正则化代理TSRO模型和平滑遗憾损失，通过基于KKT的隐式微分将下游操作反馈传播至预测模型。在线部署时，采用风险触发重优化机制，仅在调度失配显著时重新求解剩余时域TSRO。
ai.result: 在改进的IEEE 33总线和69总线微电网上的案例研究表明，该方法在概率预测精度、运行经济性和尾部风险缓解方面优于基准方法，同时以低于0.5%的额外运行成本和高达91%的日求解时间降低，保持了接近完全重优化的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理不确定性的微电网调度提供了一个将预测与决策端到端对齐的框架，并设计了高效在线重优化机制。

idea_spark.idea: 利用CVaR强调高风险样本，并通过隐式微分实现决策反馈对预测模型的直接优化。
idea_spark.risk: 代理模型的凸性和近似精度可能影响梯度传播的有效性和最终调度方案的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将金融风险度量（CVaR）与决策聚焦学习结合，为不确定性下的序贯决策问题提供了新的优化视角。

For online deployment, a risk-triggered re-optimization mechanism selectively re-solves the remaining-horizon TSRO only when schedule mismatch becomes significant.
en.result: Case studies on modified IEEE 33-bus and 69-bus microgrids demonstrate superior probabilistic forecasting accuracy, operational economy, and tail-risk mitigation over benchmark methods, while preserving near-full-re-optimization performance with less than 0.5% higher operating cost and up to 91% lower daily solution time.
en.help_to_user: Provides an end-to-end framework aligning forecasting with decision-making for microgrid scheduling under uncertainty, with an efficient online re-optimization mechanism.

idea_spark.idea: Using CVaR to emphasize high-risk samples and optimizing the forecasting model directly via decision feedback through implicit differentiation.
idea_spark.risk: The convexity and approximation accuracy of the surrogate model may affect the effectiveness of gradient propagation and the robustness of the final schedule.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining financial risk measures (CVaR) with decision-focused learning offers a new optimization perspective for sequential decision-making under uncertainty.

papers.title: Composition and tensor train structure in polynomial optimization
papers.summary: We study polynomial optimization problems whose objective has a composition or tensor train structure. These polynomials can be evaluated as a sequence of maps, giving rise to intermediate variables (``states'') of dimension lower than the ambient dimension. Structures like these arise naturally in dynamical systems, Markov chains, and neural networks. We develop two moment-SOS (sums of squares) hierarchies that exploit this composition structure in different ways. The first one, termed state-lifting chordal, is based on the correlative sparsity graph of the problem. The second one, termed state-lifting push-forward, encodes the structure at the level of the measures directly. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed methods can compute certified bounds for problems with hundreds or even a thousand variables. To illustrate the versatility of the hierarchies we apply them to Markov chain optimization, quantum optimal control, and neural networks.

ai.tldr: 本文研究具有复合结构或张量链结构的多项式优化问题，提出了两种利用该结构的矩-SOS层次方法，可处理数百至上千变量的问题。
ai.motivation: 在动力系统、马尔可夫链和神经网络中，多项式目标函数常呈现复合或张量链结构，其计算维度低于环境维度，但现有优化方法未充分利用此结构。
ai.method: 开发了两种矩-SOS层次方法：1) 基于相关稀疏图的状态提升弦方法；2) 直接在测度层面编码结构的状态提升前推方法。
ai.result: 数值实验表明，所提方法能为数百甚至上千变量的问题提供认证边界，并成功应用于马尔可夫链优化、量子最优控制和神经网络。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有序列映射结构的高维多项式优化提供了可扩展的认证求解框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将复合结构显式编码为优化层次，而非仅依赖变量稀疏性。
idea_spark.risk: 对非结构化或高度非线性复合映射的扩展可能面临维数灾难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将张量网络表示与凸优化层次结合，处理其他结构化非凸问题。

en.tldr: This paper studies polynomial optimization problems with composition or tensor train structures, proposing two moment-SOS hierarchies that exploit this structure to handle problems with hundreds to thousands of variables.
en.motivation: Polynomial objective functions in dynamical systems, Markov chains, and neural networks often exhibit composition or tensor train structures where intermediate states have lower dimension, but existing optimization methods do not fully leverage this.
en.method: Developed two moment-SOS hierarchies: 1) state-lifting chordal based on correlative sparsity graphs; 2) state-lifting push-forward encoding structure directly at the measure level.
