en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable certified optimization framework for high-dimensional polynomial problems with sequential mapping structures.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly encode composition structure into optimization hierarchies rather than relying solely on variable sparsity.
idea_spark.risk: Extension to unstructured or highly nonlinear compositions may face dimensionality challenges.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining tensor network representations with convex optimization hierarchies for other structured nonconvex problems.

papers.title: PoInit-of-View: Poisoning Initialization of Views Transfers Across Multiple 3D Reconstruction Systems
papers.summary: Poisoning input views of 3D reconstruction systems has been recently studied. However, we identify that existing studies simply backpropagate adversarial gradients through the 3D reconstruction pipeline as a whole, without uncovering the new vulnerability rooted in specific modules of the 3D reconstruction pipeline. In this paper, we argue that the structure-from-motion (SfM) initialization, as the geometric core of many widely used reconstruction systems, can be targeted to achieve transferable poisoning effects across diverse 3D reconstruction systems. To this end, we propose PoInit-of-View, which optimizes adversarial perturbations to intentionally introduce cross-view gradient inconsistencies at projections of corresponding 3D points. These inconsistencies disrupt keypoint detection and feature matching, thereby corrupting pose estimation and triangulation within SfM, eventually resulting in low-quality rendered views. We also provide a theoretical analysis that connects cross-view inconsistency to correspondence collapse. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our PoInit-of-View on diverse 3D reconstruction systems and datasets, surpassing the single-view baseline by 25.1% in PSNR and 16.5% in SSIM in black-box transfer settings, such as 3DGS to NeRF.

ai.tldr: PoInit-of-View通过毒化SfM初始化，在多种3D重建系统中实现可迁移的攻击，导致渲染视图质量下降。
ai.motivation: 现有研究将3D重建流程视为整体进行反向传播攻击，未挖掘特定模块（如SfM初始化）的新漏洞。
ai.method: 优化对抗扰动，在对应3D点的投影处引入跨视图梯度不一致性，破坏关键点检测与特征匹配，从而腐蚀SfM中的姿态估计与三角化。
ai.result: 在多种3D重建系统和数据集上有效，在黑盒迁移设置（如3DGS到NeRF）中，PSNR提升25.1%，SSIM提升16.5%。
ai.help_to_user: 揭示了3D重建系统中几何初始化模块的安全脆弱性，为防御跨系统可迁移攻击提供新视角。

idea_spark.idea: 通过制造跨视图投影不一致性来破坏几何一致性，而非直接攻击最终渲染输出。
idea_spark.risk: 可能被滥用于破坏依赖3D重建的AR/VR、自动驾驶等应用，需加强初始化模块的鲁棒性验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 模块化分析复杂系统的安全漏洞，针对共享核心组件设计攻击，可提高攻击的泛化能力。

idea_spark.inspiration: 模块化分析复杂系统的安全漏洞，针对共享核心组件设计攻击，可提高攻击的泛化能力。

en.tldr: PoInit-of-View achieves transferable poisoning across multiple 3D reconstruction systems by targeting SfM initialization, degrading rendered view quality.
en.motivation: Existing studies backpropagate through the entire 3D reconstruction pipeline without uncovering vulnerabilities in specific modules like SfM initialization.
en.method: Optimizes adversarial perturbations to introduce cross-view gradient inconsistencies at projections of corresponding 3D points, disrupting keypoint detection and feature matching to corrupt pose estimation and triangulation in SfM.
en.result: Effective on diverse 3D reconstruction systems and datasets, surpassing single-view baseline by 25.1% in PSNR and 16.5% in SSIM in black-box transfer settings (e.g., 3DGS to NeRF).
en.help_to_user: Reveals security vulnerabilities in the geometric initialization module of 3D reconstruction systems, offering new perspectives for defending against cross-system transferable attacks.

idea_spark.idea: Disrupt geometric consistency by creating cross-view projection inconsistencies instead of directly attacking final render outputs.
idea_spark.risk: Could be misused to undermine AR/VR, autonomous driving, and other applications relying on 3D reconstruction, necessitating enhanced robustness validation for initialization modules.
idea_spark.inspiration: Modular vulnerability analysis of complex systems; targeting shared core components can improve attack generalization.

papers.title: Map-Dependent Quantum Characteristic Functions and CP-Divisibility in Non-Markovian Quantum Dynamics
papers.summary: We introduce map-dependent quantum characteristic functions constructed from the normalized Choi operator of quantum dynamical maps. We prove a Bochner--Choi positivity theorem establishing that the positive-type condition of the associated Gram matrix is equivalent to complete positivity of the underlying quantum channel. Applying the construction to intermediate dynamical maps, we obtain a characterization of CP-divisibility in terms of positivity of two-time characteristic functions. Numerical examples for amplitude damping and pure dephasing models demonstrate that negativity of the Gram matrix coincides with the breakdown of CP-divisibility and the emergence of information backflow. The proposed framework provides a new bridge between characteristic-function methods in quantum statistics and structural properties of quantum dynamical maps.

ai.tldr: 本文通过映射依赖的量子特征函数，建立了量子统计特征函数方法与量子动力学映射结构性质之间的新桥梁，并证明了CP可分性的特征函数判据。
ai.motivation: 量子特征函数方法在量子统计中广泛应用，但如何将其与量子动力学映射的结构性质（如CP可分性）联系起来尚不明确。
ai.method: 从量子动力学映射的归一化Choi算子构造映射依赖的量子特征函数，证明其关联Gram矩阵的正定型条件等价于底层量子通道的完全正性。将该构造应用于中间动力学映射，得到CP可分性的两时间特征函数正性刻画。
ai.result: 证明了Bochner--Choi正性定理；数值模拟显示，振幅阻尼和纯退相模型中Gram矩阵的负性与CP可分性破坏及信息回流现象一致。
ai.help_to_user: 为分析非马尔可夫量子动力学中的CP可分性提供了一个基于特征函数的新理论框架和数值工具。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将此框架推广到更一般的量子过程（如非CP映射）或连续时间演化？可否构造多时间特征函数来刻画更高阶的非马尔可夫性？
idea_spark.risk: 数值计算中高维系统的Gram矩阵可能面临维度灾难；理论结果对具体噪声模型的普适性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将经典概率论中的特征函数与正定函数理论系统性地移植到量子开放系统研究，可能催生新的非马尔可夫性度量。

zh.help_to_user: 为分析非马尔可夫量子动力学中的CP可分性提供了一个基于特征函数的新理论框架和数值工具。

en.tldr: This paper establishes a new bridge between characteristic-function methods in quantum statistics and structural properties of quantum dynamical maps via map-dependent quantum characteristic functions, providing a characteristic-function criterion for CP-divisibility.
en.motivation: While quantum characteristic functions are widely used in quantum statistics, their connection to structural properties of quantum dynamical maps, such as CP-divisibility, remains unclear.
en.method: Construct map-dependent quantum characteristic functions from the normalized Choi operator of quantum dynamical maps. Prove that the positive-type condition of the associated Gram matrix is equivalent to the complete positivity of the underlying quantum channel (Bochner–Choi positivity theorem). Apply this construction to intermediate dynamical maps to characterize CP-divisibility in terms of positivity of two-time characteristic functions.
en.result: Proved the Bochner–Choi positivity theorem. Numerical examples for amplitude damping and pure dephasing models demonstrate that negativity of the Gram matrix coincides with the breakdown of CP-divisibility and the emergence of information backflow.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new theoretical framework and numerical tool based on characteristic functions for analyzing CP-divisibility in non-Markovian quantum dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Can this framework be extended to more general quantum processes (e.g., non-CP maps) or continuous-time evolution? Could multi-time characteristic functions be constructed to characterize higher-order non-Markovianity?
idea_spark.risk: Numerical computation of Gram matrices for high-dimensional systems may face the curse of dimensionality; the universality of theoretical results for specific noise models requires further verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the systematic transplantation of classical characteristic function and positive-definite function theory into quantum open system research, potentially leading to new measures of non-Markovianity.

papers.title: SPREG: Structured Plan Repair with Entropy-Guided Test-Time Intervention for Large Language Model Reasoning
papers.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are prone to logical hallucinations and stochastic drifts during long-chain reasoning. While Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) can improve instruction adherence, standard static implementations often cause semantic dilution and linguistic degradation. We propose SPREG (Structured Plan-guided Real-time Entropy Gating), a lightweight inference-time framework for surgical error rectification. SPREG employs an adaptive dual-threshold mechanism to monitor real-time entropy, identifying sudden ``entropy spikes'' as reliable indicators of logical failure. Upon detection, it triggers a dynamic repair by replacing uninformative null-priors with reference distributions synthesized from historical high-confidence states. By modulating guidance intensity according to structured reasoning stages (e.g., Action, Observation), SPREG steers the model back to a stable manifold without compromising fluency. Our experiments demonstrate significant gains, notably a 20.0% absolute accuracy improvement on AIME25, while effectively suppressing uncontrolled entropy drift in complex tasks.

ai.tldr: SPREG是一个轻量级推理时框架，通过实时熵监控和动态修复，纠正大语言模型长链推理中的逻辑幻觉和随机漂移。
ai.motivation: 大语言模型在长链推理中容易出现逻辑幻觉和随机漂移，标准的静态Classifier-Free Guidance实现常导致语义稀释和语言退化。
ai.method: SPREG采用自适应双阈值机制监控实时熵，将突发的'熵尖峰'识别为逻辑失败指标，触发动态修复：用历史高置信状态合成的参考分布替换无信息先验，并根据结构化推理阶段（如行动、观察）调节引导强度。
ai.result: 实验显示显著提升，在AIME25上绝对准确率提高20.0%，并有效抑制复杂任务中的不受控熵漂移。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要提升大语言模型推理可靠性的研究者提供了一种轻量级、无需重新训练的动态纠错方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将推理过程结构化分阶段，为不同阶段设计差异化的引导策略。
idea_spark.risk: 熵尖峰的误判可能导致不必要的干预，破坏模型流畅性；历史状态合成的参考分布可能引入偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴控制论中的实时反馈与校正思想，将推理过程视为动态系统进行稳定性维护。

idea_spark.idea: 将推理过程结构化分阶段，为不同阶段设计差异化的引导策略。

en.tldr: SPREG is a lightweight inference-time framework that corrects logical hallucinations and stochastic drifts in LLM reasoning via real-time entropy monitoring and dynamic repair.
en.motivation: LLMs are prone to logical hallucinations and stochastic drifts during long-chain reasoning, and standard static CFG implementations often cause semantic dilution and linguistic degradation.
en.method: SPREG employs an adaptive dual-threshold mechanism to monitor real-time entropy, identifying 'entropy spikes' as indicators of logical failure. It triggers dynamic repair by replacing uninformative null-priors with reference distributions synthesized from historical high-confidence states, modulating guidance intensity according to structured reasoning stages.
en.result: Experiments demonstrate significant gains, notably a 20.0% absolute accuracy improvement on AIME25, while effectively suppressing uncontrolled entropy drift in complex tasks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight, training-free dynamic error correction solution for researchers seeking to improve the reliability of LLM reasoning.

idea_spark.idea: Structure the reasoning process into stages and design differentiated guidance strategies for each stage.
idea_spark.risk: Misjudgment of entropy spikes may lead to unnecessary interventions, compromising fluency; reference distributions synthesized from historical states may introduce bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw inspiration from real-time feedback and correction in control theory, treating the reasoning process as a dynamic system to maintain stability.

papers.title: Continuous transformations of probability measures and their transport representations
papers.summary: Given a function $F$ transforming a probability measure $μ$ into another one $F(μ)$, we study the existence and regularity of a transport representation of it. That is, we ask whether we can represent the image $F(μ)$ of the input probability measure $μ$ as the push-forward of $μ$ by a map $f(\cdot,μ)$ which may depend on $μ$; and furthermore, how regular $f$ can be chosen depending on $F$. Even if $F$ is continuous and a transport representative exists, it cannot necessarily be chosen in a continuous way; however, if $F$ is Lipschitz continuous with respect to the Wasserstein distance, then $f$ can be chosen continuous. We provide several examples to illustrate the sharpness of our assumptions. This question is motivated by approximation results for transformations of probability distributions with transformers.

ai.tldr: 研究概率测度变换的输运表示存在性与正则性，证明当变换关于Wasserstein距离Lipschitz连续时，存在连续的输运映射表示。
ai.motivation: 受概率分布变换的近似方法（如transformer）启发，需要理解概率测度变换能否由依赖于输入测度的推前映射表示。
ai.method: 分析函数F将概率测度μ映射为F(μ)时，是否存在映射f(·,μ)使得F(μ)=f(·,μ)#μ，并研究f的正则性如何依赖于F的性质（如连续性、Lipschitz性）。
ai.result: 即使F连续且存在输运表示，也不一定能连续选取f；但若F关于Wasserstein距离Lipschitz连续，则f可选取为连续映射。通过反例说明条件的尖锐性。
ai.help_to_user: 为概率测度变换的表示提供了严格的数学框架，有助于理解分布变换模型（如生成模型）的数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑其他概率度量（如f-divergence）或更一般的测度空间，研究变换的输运表示存在条件。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中概率测度往往有限样本近似，理论上的连续性条件在离散化后可能不保持。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可应用于设计具有理论保证的概率变换神经网络层，或分析生成模型中的分布映射正则性。

zh.tldr: 研究概率测度变换的输运表示存在性与正则性，证明当变换关于Wasserstein距离Lipschitz连续时，存在连续的输运映射表示。
zh.motivation: 受概率分布变换的近似方法（如transformer）启发，需要理解概率测度变换能否由依赖于输入测度的推前映射表示。
zh.method: 分析函数F将概率测度μ映射为F(μ)时，是否存在映射f(·,μ)使得F(μ)=f(·,μ)#μ，并研究f的正则性如何依赖于F的性质（如连续性、Lipschitz性）。
zh.result: 即使F连续且存在输运表示，也不一定能连续选取f；但若F关于Wasserstein距离Lipschitz连续，则f可选取为连续映射。通过反例说明条件的尖锐性。
zh.help_to_user: 为概率测度变换的表示提供了严格的数学框架，有助于理解分布变换模型（如生成模型）的数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑其他概率度量（如f-divergence）或更一般的测度空间，研究变换的输运表示存在条件。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中概率测度往往有限样本近似，理论上的连续性条件在离散化后可能不保持。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可应用于设计具有理论保证的概率变换神经网络层，或分析生成模型中的分布映射正则性。

en.tldr: Studies existence and regularity of transport representations for transformations of probability measures, proving that when the transformation is Lipschitz continuous with respect to the Wasserstein distance, a continuous transport map representation exists.
en.motivation: Motivated by approximation methods for transforming probability distributions (e.g., transformers), requiring understanding of whether probability measure transformations can be represented by push-forward maps depending on the input measure.
en.method: Analyzes when a function F mapping a probability measure μ to F(μ) admits a map f(·,μ) such that F(μ)=f(·,μ)#μ, and investigates how regularity of f depends on properties of F (continuity, Lipschitzness).
en.result: Even if F is continuous and a transport representative exists, it cannot necessarily be chosen continuously; however, if F is Lipschitz continuous with respect to the Wasserstein distance, then f can be chosen continuous. Examples demonstrate sharpness of assumptions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for representing probability measure transformations, aiding understanding of mathematical foundations of distribution-transforming models (e.g., generative models).

idea_spark.idea: Consider other probability metrics (e.g., f-divergences) or more general measure spaces to study conditions for existence of transport representations of transformations.
idea_spark.risk: In practical applications, probability measures are often approximated by finite samples; theoretical continuity conditions may not persist after discretization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Applicable to designing theoretically grounded neural network layers for probability transformations, or analyzing regularity of distribution mappings in generative models.

papers.title: Schauder estimates and classical solutions of the Dirichlet problem for stochastic parabolic equations
papers.summary: We study second-order stochastic parabolic equations in a cylindrical domain with homogeneous Dirichlet boundary conditions. Under a natural compatibility condition on the gradient noise, we establish global Schauder estimates in stochastic Hölder spaces for the Dirichlet problem. The coefficients and free terms are assumed to be Hölder continuous in the spatial variables, while only their boundary traces are required to be Hölder continuous in time. As a consequence, we obtain existence and uniqueness of quasi-classical solutions in stochastic Hölder spaces, and further derive pathwise classical solvability in Hölder classes.

ai.tldr: 研究圆柱域中二阶随机抛物方程的Dirichlet问题，在梯度噪声满足自然相容条件下，建立了随机Hölder空间中的全局Schauder估计，并得到拟经典解的存在唯一性及路径意义下的经典可解性。
ai.motivation: 随机抛物方程的经典解理论需要建立合适的正则性估计，特别是在边界条件下处理系数和噪声的时间正则性较弱的情形。
ai.method: 假设系数和自由项在空间变量上Hölder连续，仅要求其边界迹在时间上Hölder连续，在梯度噪声满足相容性条件下，于随机Hölder空间中建立全局Schauder估计。
ai.result: 获得了随机Hölder空间中拟经典解的存在唯一性，并进一步推导出Hölder类中的路径wise经典可解性。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有Dirichlet边界条件的随机抛物方程提供了系统的Schauder估计框架，扩展了经典解的存在性与正则性理论。

idea_spark.idea: 通过引入随机Hölder空间并利用梯度噪声的相容条件，克服系数时间正则性不足的困难。
idea_spark.risk: 对噪声结构的相容性要求可能限制模型的普适性；实际验证边界迹的时间正则性可能具有挑战性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可推广至其他边界条件（如Neumann、Robin）或更一般的随机微分算子，也可考虑应用于随机流体力学方程的正则性研究。

en.tldr: Studies the Dirichlet problem for second-order stochastic parabolic equations in a cylindrical domain. Establishes global Schauder estimates in stochastic Hölder spaces under a natural compatibility condition on gradient noise, yielding existence/uniqueness of quasi-classical solutions and pathwise classical solvability.
en.motivation: The classical solution theory for stochastic parabolic equations requires appropriate regularity estimates, particularly when handling coefficients and noise with weak time regularity under boundary conditions.
en.method: Assumes coefficients and free terms are Hölder continuous in spatial variables, requiring only their boundary traces to be Hölder continuous in time. Establishes global Schauder estimates in stochastic Hölder spaces under a compatibility condition on gradient noise.
en.result: Obtains existence and uniqueness of quasi-classical solutions in stochastic Hölder spaces, and further derives pathwise classical solvability in Hölder classes.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic Schauder estimate framework for stochastic parabolic equations with Dirichlet boundary conditions, extending classical solvability and regularity theory.

idea_spark.idea: Overcoming insufficient time regularity of coefficients by introducing stochastic Hölder spaces and utilizing compatibility conditions on gradient noise.
idea_spark.risk: Compatibility requirements on noise structure may limit model generality; practical verification of time regularity for boundary traces could be challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach could extend to other boundary conditions (e.g., Neumann, Robin) or more general stochastic differential operators, and may apply to regularity studies in stochastic fluid dynamics equations.

papers.title: An adaptive discretization algorithm for locally optimal experimental design with constraints
papers.summary: We develop a novel iterative algorithm for locally optimal experimental design under constraints, like budget or performance constraints. It is an adaptive discretization algorithm. In every iteration, a discretized version of the constrained-design problem is solved and then the discretization is adaptively refined by adding an approximate violator of a suitable sufficient $\eps$-optimality condition for the current design. We prove that with $\eps = 0$, our algorithm converges to an optimal design and that with $\eps > 0$, our algorithm finitely terminates at an $\eps$-optimal design. Compared to the existing algorithms on constrained experimental design, our algorithm comes with considerably less computational effort because the nonlinear subproblems in our algorithm have a smaller dimension and have to be solved only approximately and only in selected iterations (typically the last few). Additionally, our algorithm covers a considerably larger class of constraints. We demonstrate the good convergence properties of the algorithm on experimental design problems from chemical engineering that feature time and yield constraints.

ai.tldr: 提出一种用于带约束局部最优实验设计的自适应离散化迭代算法，通过求解离散化子问题并自适应添加违反ε最优性条件的点来逼近最优设计，计算量显著低于现有方法。
ai.motivation: 现有带约束实验设计算法计算量大、约束类型有限，需要一种更高效、更通用的求解方法。
ai.method: 迭代算法：每轮求解离散化约束设计问题，根据违反ε最优性条件的近似点自适应细化离散网格。
ai.result: ε=0时算法收敛到最优设计；ε>0时有限步终止于ε最优设计。计算量更小，约束类别更广，在化工实验设计问题上验证了良好收敛性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理预算、性能等约束的实验设计问题提供了计算高效的通用算法框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将连续优化问题转化为序列离散子问题，仅需在最后几轮近似求解降维非线性子问题
idea_spark.risk: 离散化精度与ε阈值需要合理选择以保证效率与精度的平衡
idea_spark.inspiration: 可迁移至其他带约束的连续优化问题，如资源分配、参数估计等场景

en.tldr: An adaptive discretization iterative algorithm for locally optimal experimental design with constraints. It solves discretized subproblems and refines the grid by adding points violating an ε-optimality condition, requiring significantly less computation than existing methods.
en.motivation: Existing algorithms for constrained experimental design are computationally expensive and support limited constraint types, necessitating a more efficient and general approach.
en.method: Iterative algorithm: each iteration solves a discretized constrained design problem and adaptively refines the discretization by adding approximate violators of a sufficient ε-optimality condition.
en.result: Converges to an optimal design for ε=0; terminates finitely at an ε-optimal design for ε>0. Demonstrates reduced computational effort, broader constraint coverage, and good convergence on chemical engineering design problems.
en.help_to_user: Provides a computationally efficient general algorithm framework for experimental design problems with constraints such as budget or performance.

idea_spark.idea: Transform continuous optimization into a sequence of discrete subproblems, requiring only approximate solution of lower-dimensional nonlinear subproblems in the final few iterations
idea_spark.risk: Discretization granularity and ε threshold require careful tuning to balance efficiency and accuracy
idea_spark.inspiration: Transferable to other constrained continuous optimization problems, such as resource allocation or parameter estimation scenarios

papers.title: Crouzeix-Raviart Finite Element Approximation of Dirichlet Boundary Control Problems with Piecewise Constant Controls
papers.summary: This article examines the Dirichlet boundary control problem governed by the Poisson equation, where the control variables are square integrable functions defined on the boundary of a two-dimensional bounded, convex, polygonal domain. It employs an ultra-weak formulation and utilizes Crouzeix-Raviart finite elements to discretize the state variable, while employing piecewise constants for the control variable discretization. Furthermore, it establishes an optimal order a priori error estimate for the control variable.

ai.tldr: 本文研究由泊松方程控制的Dirichlet边界控制问题，采用超弱形式和Crouzeix-Raviart有限元离散状态变量，控制变量采用分段常数离散，并建立了控制变量的最优阶先验误差估计。
ai.motivation: 在二维有界凸多边形域上，针对边界控制变量为平方可积函数的Dirichlet边界控制问题，需要有效的数值离散方法和误差分析理论。
ai.method: 采用超弱变分形式，使用Crouzeix-Raviart有限元离散状态变量，控制变量采用分段常数离散，进行数值近似。
ai.result: 建立了控制变量的最优阶先验误差估计，为该方法提供了理论保证。
ai.help_to_user: 为Dirichlet边界控制问题提供了一种基于Crouzeix-Raviart有限元和分段常数控制的数值方法及误差分析框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将分段常数控制离散与Crouzeix-Raviart状态离散结合，可能适用于非匹配网格或复杂边界
idea_spark.risk: 方法可能依赖于凸多边形域假设，在非凸域或曲边域需要额外分析
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索其他非协调有限元或高阶控制离散对误差估计的影响

en.tldr: This paper examines the Dirichlet boundary control problem governed by the Poisson equation, employing an ultra-weak formulation with Crouzeix-Raviart finite elements for the state and piecewise constants for the control, establishing optimal-order a priori error estimates for the control variable.
en.motivation: For Dirichlet boundary control problems with square-integrable control functions on two-dimensional convex polygonal domains, effective numerical discretization and error analysis are needed.
en.method: An ultra-weak variational formulation is used, with Crouzeix-Raviart finite elements discretizing the state variable and piecewise constants discretizing the control variable.
en.result: Optimal-order a priori error estimates are established for the control variable, providing theoretical guarantees for the method.
en.help_to_user: Provides a numerical method and error analysis framework for Dirichlet boundary control problems using Crouzeix-Raviart finite elements and piecewise constant controls.

idea_spark.idea: Combining piecewise constant control discretization with Crouzeix-Raviart state discretization may be suitable for non-matching grids or complex boundaries
idea_spark.risk: The method may rely on convex polygonal domain assumptions, requiring additional analysis for non-convex or curved domains
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore the impact of other non-conforming finite elements or higher-order control discretizations on error estimates

papers.title: Intent-aligned Autonomous Spacecraft Guidance via Reasoning Models
papers.summary: Future spacecraft operations require autonomy that can interpret high-level mission intent while preserving safety. However, existing trajectory optimization still relies heavily on expert-crafted formulations and does not support intent-conditioned decision-making. This paper proposes an intent-aligned spacecraft guidance framework that links high-level reasoning and safe trajectory optimization through explicit intermediate abstractions, based on behavior sequences and waypoint constraints. A foundation model first predicts an intent-aligned behavior plan, a waypoint generation model then converts it into waypoint constraints, and the safe trajectory is computed via optimization. This decomposition enables scalable supervision without sacrificing safety. Numerical experiments in close-proximity operation scenarios demonstrate that the proposed pipeline achieves over 90\% SCP convergence and yields a $1.5\times$ higher rate of generating trajectories that satisfy the top intent-prioritized performance criteria than heuristic decision-making. These results support the use of intermediate behavior abstraction as a practical interface between foundation-model reasoning and safety-critical onboard spacecraft autonomy.

ai.tldr: 提出一种意图对齐的航天器制导框架，通过行为序列和航点约束等中间抽象，将高层推理与安全轨迹优化连接起来。
ai.motivation: 现有轨迹优化严重依赖专家制定的公式，不支持意图条件决策，无法解释高层任务意图并保证安全。
ai.method: 基础模型预测意图对齐的行为计划，航点生成模型将其转换为航点约束，最后通过优化计算安全轨迹。
ai.result: 在近距离操作场景中，该框架实现了超过90%的SCP收敛，生成满足最高意图优先性能标准的轨迹率比启发式决策高1.5倍。
ai.help_to_user: 为航天器自主系统提供了一种可扩展的监督方法，在保持安全性的同时实现了意图对齐的决策。

idea_spark.idea: 将高层意图分解为行为序列和航点约束，再通过优化实现安全轨迹。
idea_spark.risk: 基础模型的预测可靠性、实时计算负担、极端场景下的安全性验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该分解思路可应用于其他需要将高级指令转化为安全、可执行动作的自主系统，如机器人、自动驾驶。

en.motivation: Existing trajectory optimization heavily relies on expert-crafted formulations and does not support intent-conditioned decision-making, failing to interpret high-level mission intent while preserving safety.
en.method: A foundation model predicts an intent-aligned behavior plan, a waypoint generation model converts it into waypoint constraints, and safe trajectory is computed via optimization.
en.result: In close-proximity operation scenarios, the pipeline achieves over 90% SCP convergence and yields a 1.5× higher rate of generating trajectories satisfying top intent-prioritized performance criteria than heuristic decision-making.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable supervision method for spacecraft autonomy that enables intent-aligned decision-making without sacrificing safety.

idea_spark.risk: Reliability of foundation model predictions, real-time computational burden, safety verification in edge cases.
idea_spark.inspiration: The decomposition approach could be applied to other autonomous systems requiring translation of high-level commands into safe, executable actions, such as robotics or autonomous driving.

papers.title: Maximum Cuts and Fractional Cut Covers: A Computational Study of a Randomized Semidefinite Programming Approach
papers.summary: We present experimental work on a primal-dual framework simultaneously approximating maximum cut and weighted fractional cut-covering instances. In this primal-dual framework, we solve a semidefinite programming (SDP) relaxation to either the maximum cut problem or to the weighted fractional cut-covering problem, and then independently sample a collection of cuts via the random-hyperplane technique. We then simultaneously certify the approximate optimality of a cut and a fractional cut cover. We present several implementations which reliably achieve the celebrated Goemans and Williamson approximation ratio of $α_{\mathrm{GW}} \approx 0.878$ for both optimization problems simultaneously, after $\lceil 128 \ln m \rceil$ samples, a number significantly smaller than the best theoretical bounds.   This is the first experimental work approximating the weighted fractional cut-covering problem, and we deliver robust and repeatable results despite the use of randomized algorithms and floating-point arithmetic. Careful pre-processing of instances and post-processing of numeric results allow for good empirical outcomes with both first-order and second-order SDP solvers. Nearly optimal SDP solutions are suitably perturbed to ensure better probabilistic and numerical behavior. Our experiments deviate from theory by using a linear programming (LP) solver to compute fractional cut covers. For most instances studied, LP solving produces certifiably better results than the theoretical algorithm after $\lceil 128 \ln m \rceil$ samples. All our experiments strictly follow a unified pipeline which explicitly documents all parameters used in each run.

ai.tldr: 本研究通过计算实验，验证了一种同时逼近最大割与加权分数割覆盖问题的随机半定规划方法，在有限采样下可靠达到Goemans-Williamson近似比。
ai.motivation: 最大割与分数割覆盖是组合优化中的重要问题，理论算法通常需要大量采样。本文旨在通过实验验证一种高效的随机化框架的实际性能。
ai.method: 采用原始-对偶框架：求解半定规划松弛，使用随机超平面技术独立采样割集合，同时验证割与分数割覆盖的近似最优性。通过预处理实例与后处理数值结果提升稳定性。
ai.result: 实验表明，仅需⌈128 ln m⌉次采样即可同时为两个问题可靠达到约0.878的近似比，远少于理论边界。使用线性规划求解器在实践中优于理论算法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效、可重复的随机化算法实现框架，适用于最大割与割覆盖问题的近似求解，并展示了实际计算中远优于理论界的采样效率。

idea_spark.idea: 在理论算法基础上，引入线性规划求解器计算分数割覆盖，在实践中获得更优认证结果。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖随机采样与浮点运算，需谨慎处理数值误差；实验性能可能受实例结构影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 理论算法的采样复杂度在实践中可大幅降低，启发对算法实际效率与理论边界之间差距的进一步研究。

en.tldr: This computational study validates a randomized semidefinite programming approach that simultaneously approximates maximum cut and weighted fractional cut-covering problems, reliably achieving the Goemans-Williamson approximation ratio with limited sampling.
en.motivation: Maximum cut and fractional cut covering are key combinatorial optimization problems; theoretical algorithms often require extensive sampling. This work aims to experimentally verify the practical performance of an efficient randomized framework.
en.method: A primal-dual framework is employed: solve an SDP relaxation, independently sample cuts via the random-hyperplane technique, and simultaneously certify approximate optimality of a cut and a fractional cut cover. Instance pre-processing and result post-processing enhance stability.
en.result: Experiments show that only ⌈128 ln m⌉ samples are needed to reliably achieve the ≈0.878 approximation ratio for both problems simultaneously, significantly fewer than theoretical bounds. Using an LP solver yields certifiably better results than the theoretical algorithm in practice.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, reproducible randomized algorithm framework for approximating maximum cut and cut-covering problems, demonstrating practical sampling efficiency far superior to theoretical limits.

idea_spark.idea: Augment the theoretical algorithm with an LP solver to compute fractional cut covers, obtaining better certified results in practice.
idea_spark.risk: Reliance on random sampling and floating-point arithmetic requires careful handling of numerical errors; experimental performance may depend on instance structure.
idea_spark.inspiration: The sampling complexity of theoretical algorithms can be significantly reduced in practice, inspiring further study on the gap between practical efficiency and theoretical bounds.

papers.title: A Unified Control Theory Derivation of Discrete-Time Linear Ensemble Kalman Filters
papers.summary: The ensemble Kalman filter (EnKF) has become a standard methodology for state estimation in high-dimensional systems, yet its various stochastic and deterministic formulations often appear conceptually disconnected. In this paper, a unified derivation framework for EnKF algorithms are established by leveraging the classical duality between estimation and optimal control, which is the key concept in deriving Kalman filter. By recasting the minimum variance estimation problem into second order moment for the ensembles, we demonstrate that seemingly distinct EnKF variants -- both with or without perturbed observation -- can be systematically classified.   Specifically, the duality based framework reveals that the operational differences among these variety of EnKF algorithms reduce to a specific choice of hyperparameters. Ultimately, this perspective not only covers existing EnKF variants but also provides a systematic foundation for designing novel hybrid filters using control theory approach.

ai.tldr: 本文基于最优控制与估计的对偶性，为离散时间线性集合卡尔曼滤波器提供了一个统一的推导框架，将不同变体系统分类为超参数选择问题。
ai.motivation: 集合卡尔曼滤波器已成为高维系统状态估计的标准方法，但其各种随机和确定性公式在概念上往往显得脱节，缺乏统一的理论基础。
ai.method: 利用经典的最优控制与估计对偶性，将最小方差估计问题重新表述为集合的二阶矩问题，从而系统推导不同EnKF变体。
ai.result: 框架表明，各种EnKF算法（包括扰动观测和非扰动观测版本）的操作差异可归结为特定超参数的选择，为设计新型混合滤波器提供了系统基础。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解不同集合卡尔曼滤波器变体之间的内在联系提供了清晰的控制理论视角，简化了算法分类与比较。

idea_spark.idea: 将其他非线性滤波问题（如粒子滤波器）也纳入该对偶框架进行统一推导与分类。
idea_spark.risk: 框架目前仅针对离散时间线性系统，扩展到连续时间或强非线性系统可能存在理论障碍。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发利用控制理论中的其他经典对偶关系（如鲁棒控制与滤波）来统一更多类型的估计算法。

en.tldr: This paper establishes a unified derivation framework for discrete-time linear ensemble Kalman filters using the classical duality between optimal control and estimation, systematically classifying variants as hyperparameter selection problems.
en.motivation: The ensemble Kalman filter has become standard for state estimation in high-dimensional systems, yet its various stochastic and deterministic formulations often appear conceptually disconnected without a unified theoretical foundation.
en.method: Leveraging the classical duality between optimal control and estimation, the minimum variance estimation problem is recast into second order moment for ensembles, enabling systematic derivation of different EnKF variants.
en.result: The framework reveals that operational differences among EnKF algorithms (including both perturbed and unperturbed observation versions) reduce to specific hyperparameter choices, providing systematic foundation for designing novel hybrid filters.
en.help_to_user: Provides a clear control-theoretic perspective for understanding intrinsic connections between different ensemble Kalman filter variants, simplifying algorithm classification and comparison.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the duality framework to unify and classify other nonlinear filtering problems, such as particle filters.
idea_spark.risk: The framework currently focuses on discrete-time linear systems; extension to continuous-time or strongly nonlinear systems may present theoretical barriers.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires using other classical dualities from control theory (e.g., robust control and filtering) to unify broader classes of estimation algorithms.

papers.title: Semi-definite programs for online control of nonlinear systems with stability guarantees
papers.summary: This paper develops a semidefinite-programming-based method for online feedback control of nonlinear systems using a state-dependent representation. We formulate sequences of time-varying SDPs whose optimal solutions jointly yield a stabilizing feedback controller and a Lyapunov certificate satisfying stability conditions and quadratic performance specifications. We further establish compact conditions certifying recursive feasibility of the resulting SDP sequences and derive estimates of the region of attraction. Numerical examples on representative nonlinear systems illustrate the flexibility and effectiveness of the proposed method.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于半定规划的在线反馈控制方法，用于非线性系统，通过状态依赖表示构建时变SDP序列，联合求解稳定控制器和Lyapunov证书，保证稳定性和二次性能指标。
ai.motivation: 非线性系统的在线控制需要同时满足稳定性、性能指标和计算可行性，现有方法在保证递归可行性和吸引域估计方面存在挑战。
ai.method: 采用状态依赖表示构建时变半定规划序列，其最优解联合产生稳定反馈控制器和满足稳定性条件的Lyapunov证书，并建立保证递归可行性的紧致条件。
ai.result: 理论证明了方法的递归可行性和吸引域估计，数值实验在典型非线性系统上验证了方法的灵活性和有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为非线性系统在线控制提供了一种具有稳定性保证和性能规范的半定规划框架，适用于需要实时稳定控制的工程场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将Lyapunov稳定性条件嵌入在线SDP求解，联合优化控制器和证书。
idea_spark.risk: 计算复杂度可能限制高维系统的实时应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将证书优化与控制器设计耦合的在线保证方法。

en.tldr: This paper develops a semidefinite-programming-based method for online feedback control of nonlinear systems using a state-dependent representation, formulating time-varying SDP sequences whose solutions jointly yield a stabilizing controller and a Lyapunov certificate with stability guarantees and quadratic performance specifications.
en.motivation: Online control of nonlinear systems requires simultaneous satisfaction of stability, performance specifications, and computational feasibility, with existing methods facing challenges in guaranteeing recursive feasibility and estimating regions of attraction.
en.method: Constructs sequences of time-varying semidefinite programs using a state-dependent representation, whose optimal solutions jointly produce a stabilizing feedback controller and a Lyapunov certificate satisfying stability conditions, with compact conditions established for recursive feasibility.
en.result: Theoretically establishes recursive feasibility and region-of-attraction estimates, with numerical examples on representative nonlinear systems demonstrating the method's flexibility and effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Provides a semidefinite programming framework for online control of nonlinear systems with stability guarantees and performance specifications, applicable to engineering scenarios requiring real-time stable control.

idea_spark.idea: Embed Lyapunov stability conditions into online SDP solving, jointly optimizing controller and certificate.
idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity may limit real-time application in high-dimensional systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires online guaranteed methods that couple certificate optimization with controller design.

papers.title: Ergodic properties of the harmonic process
papers.summary: In this paper we study detailed fluctuation results for a class of non-equilibrium steady states. The main example is the boundary driven harmonic model \cite{frassek2022exact}. In this model, the non-equilibrium steady state (NESS) is a mixture of products of geometric distributions, of which the local parameters are in turn distributed as uniform order statistics. For such a NESS, we prove law of large numbers, central limit theorem and large deviation results for fields of a general local functions (generalizing the density field). We also obtain quantitative results on the deviation from local equilibrium.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了边界驱动谐振模型的非平衡稳态的详细涨落性质，包括大数定律、中心极限定理和大偏差结果。
ai.motivation: 研究一类非平衡稳态的详细涨落行为，以边界驱动谐振模型为主要实例。
ai.method: 分析由几何分布混合乘积构成的非平衡稳态，其局部参数服从均匀顺序统计量分布，并证明一般局部函数场的极限定理。
ai.result: 获得了密度场等一般局部函数场的大数定律、中心极限定理和大偏差结果，并给出了偏离局部平衡的定量结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解非平衡稳态的统计涨落提供了严格的数学框架和具体结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将涨落分析技术应用于其他边界驱动或非平衡系统
idea_spark.risk: 方法可能依赖于模型的精确可解性
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对非平衡系统中局部与全局统计关系的研究

en.tldr: This paper studies detailed fluctuation properties of non-equilibrium steady states in the boundary-driven harmonic model, including law of large numbers, central limit theorem, and large deviation results.
en.motivation: To investigate detailed fluctuation behavior for a class of non-equilibrium steady states, with the boundary-driven harmonic model as the primary example.
en.method: Analyzes non-equilibrium steady states formed as mixtures of products of geometric distributions with local parameters distributed as uniform order statistics, proving limit theorems for fields of general local functions.
en.result: Obtains law of large numbers, central limit theorem, and large deviation results for fields of general local functions (generalizing the density field), with quantitative results on deviation from local equilibrium.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework and concrete results for understanding statistical fluctuations in non-equilibrium steady states.

idea_spark.idea: Apply fluctuation analysis techniques to other boundary-driven or non-equilibrium systems
idea_spark.risk: Methods may rely on exact solvability of the model
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires investigation of local versus global statistical relationships in non-equilibrium systems

papers.title: Eigenvalue asymptotics of Müller minimizers for atoms and molecules
papers.summary: We study the spectral properties of minimizers of the Müller functional for atoms and molecules with $N$ electrons and total nuclear charge $Z$. We prove that under some suitable assumptions on $Z$ and $N$, the $k$-th eigenvalue of a Müller minimizer $γ_*$ behaves as $A_* k^{-8/3}$ when $k\to \infty$, with a constant $A_*>0$ determined explicitly by the density of $γ_*$. In particular, in the atomic case $V=Z|x|^{-1}$ our assumption holds if $Z$ is sufficiently large and $N\le Z- C_0 Z^{1/3}$. While our proof is inspired by Sobolev's work on the asymptotic behavior of the one-particle density matrix of Schrödinger ground states, the analysis in Müller theory requires several new ingredients concerning both the singular behavior of the integral kernel of the minimizers near the diagonal and the decay properties at infinity.

ai.tldr: 研究原子和分子Müller泛函极小化子的谱性质，证明第k个特征值在k→∞时以A_* k^{-8/3}渐近，其中A_*由密度显式确定。
ai.motivation: Müller泛函是量子化学中重要的密度泛函模型，但其极小化子的谱性质尚未完全清楚，特别是特征值的渐近行为。
ai.method: 受Sobolev关于薛定谔基态单粒子密度矩阵渐近行为的启发，但Müller理论需要新工具分析极小化子积分核在近对角线的奇异性及无穷远处的衰减性质。
ai.result: 在Z和N满足适当假设下（如原子情形Z足够大且N≤Z-C_0 Z^{1/3}），Müller极小化子的第k个特征值具有A_* k^{-8/3}的渐近形式。
ai.help_to_user: 为密度泛函理论中Müller模型的数学分析提供了严格的谱渐近结果，揭示了其与薛定谔基态模型的异同。

idea_spark.idea: 将Sobolev的渐近技术适配到非线性的Müller泛函，需处理其特有的核结构。
idea_spark.risk: 结论依赖于Z和N的特定假设，可能不覆盖所有物理感兴趣的情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对更广泛密度泛函模型谱性质的系统研究，特别是渐近常数与物理量的关联。

en.tldr: Studies spectral properties of minimizers of the Müller functional for atoms and molecules, proving the k-th eigenvalue asymptotically behaves as A_* k^{-8/3} when k→∞, with A_* explicitly determined by the density.
en.motivation: The Müller functional is an important density functional model in quantum chemistry, but the spectral properties of its minimizers, particularly eigenvalue asymptotics, are not fully understood.
en.method: Inspired by Sobolev's work on asymptotic behavior of one-particle density matrices for Schrödinger ground states, but Müller theory requires new tools to analyze singular behavior of the minimizer's integral kernel near the diagonal and decay properties at infinity.
en.result: Under suitable assumptions on Z and N (e.g., in atomic case with Z sufficiently large and N≤Z-C_0 Z^{1/3}), the k-th eigenvalue of a Müller minimizer exhibits A_* k^{-8/3} asymptotic scaling.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous spectral asymptotics for the Müller model in density functional theory, revealing similarities and differences with Schrödinger ground state models.

idea_spark.idea: Adapt Sobolev's asymptotic techniques to the nonlinear Müller functional, requiring handling of its specific kernel structure.
idea_spark.risk: Results depend on specific assumptions on Z and N, possibly not covering all physically relevant regimes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires systematic study of spectral properties for broader density functional models, particularly relating asymptotic constants to physical quantities.

papers.title: Multitask LQG Control: Performance and Generalization Bounds
papers.summary: We study multitask learning for stochastic and partially observed control systems, focusing on the linear quadratic Gaussian (LQG) problem. Our goal is to learn a common stabilizing controller that generalizes across a distribution of systems and objectives. To this end, we leverage a history-dependent lifting that recasts the multitask LQG problem into an equivalent high-dimensional multitask LQR problem, allowing for the analysis of policy gradient methods. We show that learning a common lifted controller induces a heterogeneity bias which we characterize via a "bisimulation function". We establish performance and generalization guarantees that explicitly depend on such bisimulation-based heterogeneity measures. For model-free, we demonstrate that multitask learning reduces policy gradient estimation variance proportionally to the number of tasks in the training set.

idea_spark.inspiration: 此框架可启发其他多任务强化学习场景的泛化分析，或用于设计能主动减少任务间异构性的元学习算法。

en.tldr: This paper studies multitask Linear Quadratic Gaussian (LQG) control, recasting it via a history-dependent lifting into an equivalent multitask LQR problem, analyzes policy gradient methods, quantifies heterogeneity bias via a bisimulation function, and establishes performance and generalization guarantees.
en.motivation: Learning a common stabilizing controller that generalizes across a distribution of systems and objectives is a central challenge for multitask stochastic and partially observed control systems.
en.method: Leverages a history-dependent lifting to transform the multitask LQG problem into an equivalent high-dimensional multitask LQR problem, enabling analysis of policy gradient methods and characterizing the heterogeneity bias induced by learning a common lifted controller via a bisimulation function.
en.result: Establishes performance and generalization guarantees that explicitly depend on such bisimulation-based heterogeneity measures; demonstrates that in model-free settings, multitask learning reduces policy gradient estimation variance proportionally to the number of training tasks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and generalization bounds for multitask stochastic control, particularly useful for designing controllers that must maintain performance under variations in system parameters or objective distributions.

idea_spark.idea: Linking the key bias term in multitask LQG control generalization analysis to the bisimulation distance between systems, yielding tighter generalization bounds.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on linear-quadratic-Gaussian assumptions; extension to nonlinear or non-Gaussian settings may introduce analytical complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: This framework could inspire generalization analysis in other multitask reinforcement learning scenarios or inform the design of meta-learning algorithms that actively reduce inter-task heterogeneity.

papers.title: Spherical singularities in compactified Ruijsenaars--Schneider systems
papers.summary: We investigate certain Liouville integrable systems constructed earlier via reduction of the quasi-Hamiltonian double of $\mathrm{SU}(n)$. These systems live on compact connected symplectic manifolds of dimension $2(n-1)$ and can be interpreted as compactified trigonometric Ruijsenaars--Schneider systems. Depending on the value of a parameter $0<y< π$, they arise in two drastically different forms: in type (i) these are toric systems, while in the type (ii) cases they possess globally continuous action variables that generate a Hamiltonian torus action (only) on a dense open subset of the phase space. The principal goal of the paper is to study those fibers of the action map (alias the $\mathbb{T}^{n-1}$ momentum map) which are contained in the complement of the domain of the densely defined torus action occurring in the type (ii) cases. We demonstrate that all such `singular fibers' are smooth connected isotropic submanifolds. We also work out a model of the fibers as quotient spaces of certain subgroups of $\mathrm{SU}(n)$ with respect to an action of another subgroup. The general results are exemplified by determining the vertices of the polytope filled by the action variables in the simplest type (ii) cases that appear for any $n\geq 4$ with $π/(n-1) <y < π/(n-2)$, and proving that the fibers over the `singular vertices' are diffeomorphic to $S^3 \simeq \mathrm{SU}(2)$ in these cases. In this way, our findings enrich the set of examples of Liouville integrable systems with spherical singularities.

ai.tldr: 研究通过SU(n)拟哈密顿对偶约化构造的Liouville可积系统，这些系统是紧致化三角Ruijsenaars-Schneider系统。重点分析类型(ii)情况下作用映射奇异纤维的几何结构。
ai.motivation: 理解紧致化Ruijsenaars-Schneider系统中奇异纤维的几何性质，特别是当系统仅在一个稠密开子集上具有全局连续作用变量时。
ai.method: 通过SU(n)子群的商空间模型研究奇异纤维，分析作用变量在多面体顶点处的纤维结构，证明其光滑连通各向同性子流形性质。
ai.result: 证明所有奇异纤维都是光滑连通各向同性子流形，在特定参数范围内确定作用变量多面体顶点，并证明奇异顶点处纤维微分同胚于S^3≃SU(2)。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了具有球面奇点的Liouville可积系统新示例，深化了对紧致可积系统奇异纤维几何结构的理解。

idea_spark.idea: 将奇异纤维建模为李子群的商空间，通过群作用分析其几何结构。
idea_spark.risk: 结果严重依赖于特定参数范围和SU(n)结构，推广到其他群或参数区域可能需要重新论证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 为研究可积系统奇点提供了新的几何视角，可能启发对量子可积系统或规范场论中类似结构的研究。

en.tldr: Investigates Liouville integrable systems constructed via reduction of the quasi-Hamiltonian double of SU(n), which are compactified trigonometric Ruijsenaars-Schneider systems. Focuses on analyzing the geometric structure of singular fibers of the action map in type (ii) cases.
en.motivation: To understand the geometric properties of singular fibers in compactified Ruijsenaars-Schneider systems, particularly when the system possesses globally continuous action variables only on a dense open subset.
en.method: Studies singular fibers through quotient space models of SU(n) subgroups, analyzes fiber structures at vertices of the polytope filled by action variables, and proves they are smooth connected isotropic submanifolds.
en.result: Demonstrates all singular fibers are smooth connected isotropic submanifolds, determines vertices of the action variable polytope for specific parameter ranges, and proves fibers over singular vertices are diffeomorphic to S^3≃SU(2).
en.help_to_user: Provides new examples of Liouville integrable systems with spherical singularities, deepening understanding of singular fiber geometry in compact integrable systems.

idea_spark.idea: Model singular fibers as quotient spaces of Lie subgroups and analyze their geometry through group actions.
idea_spark.risk: Results heavily depend on specific parameter ranges and SU(n) structure; generalization to other groups or parameter regions may require new arguments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Provides a new geometric perspective for studying singularities in integrable systems, potentially inspiring similar investigations in quantum integrable systems or gauge field theories.

papers.title: Decoding AI Tutor Effects for Educational Measurement: Temporal, Multi-Outcome, and Behavior-Cognitive Analysis
papers.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) tutors have become increasingly popular in learning environments. In this study, we propose an AI agent prototype framework for exploring AI-assisted learning with temporal interaction patterns, multiple outcomes analysis, and behavioral-cognitive learner profiling. Based on three research questions, this study aims to investigate whether early interaction patterns can predict later performance and trust, how multiple outcomes can be traded off with different AI tutor feedback conditions, and if learner profiles can be identified with behavioral and cognitive indicators. An AI tutor agent has been developed to provide various feedback forms to learners, including hints, explanations, examples, and code. A neural policy model and a stochastic simulation framework are used to produce artificial student-AI tutor interaction records, which include response time, attempts, hint requests, correctness, quiz results, improvement, satisfaction, and trust. Temporal features are used to predict later correctness and trust with early interaction patterns, and clustering methods are used to find learner profiles. The results showed that early interaction patterns were predictive of later performance and trust, that student behavior changed over time with AI-based tutoring, and that latent student profiles could be identified based on their behavioral and cognitive differences.

ai.tldr: 本研究提出一个AI导师代理框架，通过时间交互模式、多结果分析和行为-认知学习者画像，探索AI辅助学习的效果。
ai.motivation: AI导师在学习环境中日益普及，但其对学生学习过程、多维度结果及学习者个体差异的影响机制尚需深入探究。
ai.method: 开发AI导师代理提供多种反馈形式；使用神经策略模型和随机模拟框架生成模拟的学生-AI导师交互记录；利用时间特征预测后期表现与信任，并采用聚类方法识别学习者画像。
ai.result: 早期交互模式能预测后期表现和信任；学生在AI辅导下的行为随时间变化；基于行为和认知差异可识别潜在的学生画像。
ai.help_to_user: 为教育测量领域的研究者提供了一个系统分析AI导师效果的多维度框架，包括时间动态、多结果权衡和学习者异质性分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将神经策略模型与随机模拟结合，生成可控的交互数据用于教育测量研究。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟数据可能与真实课堂交互存在差异；学习者画像的泛化能力需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可扩展至其他智能辅导系统或在线学习平台的分析，用于个性化教学策略优化。

idea_spark.risk: 模拟数据可能与真实课堂交互存在差异；学习者画像的泛化能力需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可扩展至其他智能辅导系统或在线学习平台的分析，用于个性化教学策略优化。

en.tldr: This study proposes an AI tutor agent framework to explore AI-assisted learning through temporal interaction patterns, multiple outcomes analysis, and behavioral-cognitive learner profiling.
en.motivation: AI tutors are increasingly popular in learning environments, but their effects on learning processes, multidimensional outcomes, and individual learner differences require deeper investigation.
en.method: Developed an AI tutor agent to provide various feedback forms; used a neural policy model and stochastic simulation framework to generate simulated student-AI tutor interaction records; employed temporal features to predict later performance and trust, and applied clustering methods to identify learner profiles.
en.result: Early interaction patterns were predictive of later performance and trust; student behavior changed over time with AI-based tutoring; latent student profiles could be identified based on behavioral and cognitive differences.
en.help_to_user: Provides a multidimensional framework for researchers in educational measurement to systematically analyze AI tutor effects, encompassing temporal dynamics, outcome trade-offs, and learner heterogeneity.

idea_spark.idea: Integrating neural policy models with stochastic simulation to generate controllable interaction data for educational measurement research.
idea_spark.risk: Simulated data may differ from real classroom interactions; generalizability of learner profiles requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach can be extended to analyze other intelligent tutoring systems or online learning platforms for personalized instructional strategy optimization.

papers.title: Training Language Models for Bilateral Trade with Private Information
papers.summary: Bilateral bargaining under incomplete information provides a controlled testbed for evaluating large language model (LLM) agent capabilities. Bilateral trade demands individual rationality, strategic surplus maximization, and cooperation to realize gains from trade. We develop a structured bargaining environment where LLMs negotiate via tool calls within an event-driven simulator, separating binding offers from natural-language messages to enable automated evaluation. The environment serves two purposes: as a benchmark for frontier models and as a training environment for open-weight models via reinforcement learning.   In benchmark experiments, a round-robin tournament among five frontier models (15,000 negotiations) reveals that effective strategies implement price discrimination through sequential offers. Aggressive anchoring, calibrated concession, and temporal patience correlate with the highest surplus share and deal rate. Accommodating strategies that concede quickly disable price discrimination in the buyer role, yielding the lowest surplus capture and deal completion. Stronger models scale their behavior proportionally to item value, maintaining performance across price tiers; weaker models perform well only when wide zones of possible agreement offset suboptimal strategies.   In training experiments, we fine-tune Qwen3 (8B, 14B) via supervised fine-tuning (SFT) followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) against a fixed frontier opponent. These stages optimize competing objectives: SFT approximately doubles surplus share but reduces deal rates, while RL recovers deal rates but erodes surplus gains, reflecting the reward structure. SFT also compresses surplus variation across price tiers, which generalizes to unseen opponents, suggesting that behavioral cloning instills proportional strategies rather than memorized price points.

ai.tldr: 本研究构建了一个双边贸易谈判模拟环境，用于评估和训练大语言模型（LLM）在信息不完全条件下的谈判能力。通过基准测试发现有效策略依赖于顺序报价的价格歧视，并通过监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（GRPO）训练开源模型，揭示了不同训练目标在盈余份额和成交率之间的权衡。
ai.motivation: 双边讨价还价是评估LLM智能体在战略互动、个体理性与合作方面能力的受控测试平台。需要一种能够自动化评估LLM谈判表现并可用于训练的环境。
ai.method: 开发了一个结构化谈判环境，LLM通过工具调用在事件驱动模拟器中谈判，将具有约束力的报价与自然语言消息分离。进行了两项实验：1）在五个前沿模型间进行循环赛基准测试；2）使用SFT和GRPO对Qwen3模型进行微调，对抗固定的前沿对手。
ai.result: 基准测试表明，通过顺序报价实施价格歧视的有效策略与最高的盈余份额和成交率相关。训练实验显示，SFT阶段大约使盈余份额翻倍但降低了成交率，而RL阶段恢复了成交率但侵蚀了盈余收益，反映了奖励结构的影响。SFT还压缩了不同价格层级间的盈余差异，并能泛化到未见过的对手。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一个可复现的LLM谈判评估与训练框架，揭示了战略行为的关键特征（如锚定、让步、耐心）与绩效的关系，并为通过行为克隆和强化学习优化谈判策略提供了实证依据。

idea_spark.idea: 将谈判策略分解为可学习的模块（如锚定生成器、让步调度器），或设计元学习框架使模型能快速适应不同对手类型。
idea_spark.risk: 训练可能使模型过度适应特定模拟环境或对手策略，在现实世界谈判中泛化能力不足。奖励函数设计不当可能导致模型学会利用模拟漏洞而非真正有效的谈判策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 研究结果暗示，通过行为克隆（SFT）可以灌输比例策略而非记忆具体价格点，这为将人类专家谈判数据用于模型预训练提供了支持。不同模型在策略可扩展性上的差异可能与其推理能力有关，值得进一步探究。

en.tldr: This study constructs a bilateral trade negotiation simulation environment to evaluate and train large language models (LLMs) in bargaining under incomplete information. Benchmark tests reveal that effective strategies rely on price discrimination via sequential offers. Fine-tuning open-weight models via supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (GRPO) demonstrates trade-offs between surplus share and deal rate under different training objectives.
en.motivation: Bilateral bargaining under incomplete information provides a controlled testbed for evaluating LLM agent capabilities in strategic interaction, individual rationality, and cooperation. An environment is needed for automated evaluation of LLM negotiation performance and for training.
en.method: Developed a structured bargaining environment where LLMs negotiate via tool calls within an event-driven simulator, separating binding offers from natural-language messages. Conducted two experiments: 1) a round-robin tournament benchmark among five frontier models; 2) fine-tuning Qwen3 models via SFT followed by GRPO against a fixed frontier opponent.
en.result: Benchmark experiments show that effective strategies implementing price discrimination through sequential offers correlate with the highest surplus share and deal rate. Training experiments reveal that SFT approximately doubles surplus share but reduces deal rates, while RL recovers deal rates but erodes surplus gains, reflecting the reward structure. SFT also compresses surplus variation across price tiers, which generalizes to unseen opponents.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reproducible framework for evaluating and training LLMs in negotiation, identifies key strategic behaviors (e.g., anchoring, concession, patience) linked to performance, and offers empirical evidence for optimizing negotiation strategies via behavioral cloning and reinforcement learning.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose negotiation strategies into learnable modules (e.g., anchor generator, concession scheduler) or design a meta-learning framework for rapid adaptation to different opponent types.
idea_spark.risk: Training may overfit models to specific simulation environments or opponent strategies, limiting generalization to real-world negotiations. Poorly designed reward functions could lead models to exploit simulation loopholes rather than learn genuinely effective negotiation strategies.
idea_spark.inspiration: Findings suggest that behavioral cloning (SFT) can instill proportional strategies rather than memorized price points, supporting the use of human expert negotiation data for model pre-training. Differences in strategy scalability across models may relate to their reasoning capabilities, warranting further investigation.

papers.title: Solution of the Ising model with Brascamp-Kunz boundary conditions by the transfer matrix method
papers.summary: The square lattice Ising model under the Brascamp-Kunz boundary conditions is a well-known exactly solvable lattice model. The exact solution of this system has been derived within the framework of Pfaffian-type method. In this paper we provide a derivation for the solution by the Schultz-Mattis-Lieb method in the transfer matrix formalism. We set special interactions on the boundaries and take certain limit of these interactions, so that the system under the Brascamp-Kunz boundary conditions is transformed into another system under the toroidal boundary conditions. The Schultz-Mattis-Lieb method is applied to the mapping system and the partition function is exactly solved in the fermionic representation. The Fisher zeros are analytically calculated and the physical critical point is identified. We also discuss the difference between the transfer matrix approaches to the Brascamp-Kunz and to the toroidal boundary conditions. Our work introduces a member to the family of transfer-matrix-based studies for Ising model under various boundary conditions.

ai.tldr: 本文使用转移矩阵方法中的Schultz-Mattis-Lieb方法，求解了Brascamp-Kunz边界条件下二维Ising模型的精确解。通过边界特殊相互作用及其极限变换，将原系统映射为环面边界条件系统，在费米子表示中精确计算配分函数和Fisher零点，并确定了物理临界点。
ai.motivation: Brascamp-Kunz边界条件下的Ising模型是著名的精确可解模型，已有Pfaffian型方法求解。本文旨在通过转移矩阵框架下的Schultz-Mattis-Lieb方法重新推导该解，丰富不同边界条件下Ising模型的转移矩阵研究体系。
ai.method: 在边界设置特殊相互作用，并取这些相互作用的特定极限，将Brascamp-Kunz边界条件系统变换为环面边界条件系统。对映射系统应用Schultz-Mattis-Lieb方法，在费米子表示中精确求解配分函数。
ai.result: 精确求解了配分函数，解析计算了Fisher零点，确定了物理临界点。比较了Brascamp-Kunz与环面边界条件下转移矩阵方法的差异。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解Ising模型在不同边界条件下的精确求解提供了转移矩阵方法的新实例，展示了边界条件变换与极限技巧在可积系统中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将复杂边界条件问题通过相互作用参数调节转化为已知可解边界条件问题，再利用标准可积方法求解。
idea_spark.risk: 极限操作的物理合理性需谨慎验证；映射后系统的物理诠释可能与原系统存在微妙差异。
idea_spark.inspiration: 此边界条件映射策略可尝试推广至其他晶格模型或高维系统；费米子表示与转移矩阵的结合框架可用于研究更多相互作用模型的临界行为。

en.tldr: This paper solves the square lattice Ising model under Brascamp-Kunz boundary conditions exactly using the Schultz-Mattis-Lieb method within the transfer matrix formalism. By introducing special boundary interactions and taking a certain limit, the system is transformed into one with toroidal boundary conditions. The partition function and Fisher zeros are computed analytically in the fermionic representation, and the physical critical point is identified.
en.motivation: The Ising model under Brascamp-Kunz boundary conditions is a well-known exactly solvable model, previously solved via Pfaffian-type methods. This work aims to rederive the solution using the Schultz-Mattis-Lieb transfer-matrix approach, adding to the family of transfer-matrix-based studies for Ising models under various boundary conditions.
en.method: Special interactions are set on the boundaries, and a certain limit of these interactions is taken to map the Brascamp-Kunz system to a system with toroidal boundary conditions. The Schultz-Mattis-Lieb method is then applied to the mapped system, and the partition function is solved exactly in the fermionic representation.
en.result: The partition function is solved exactly, Fisher zeros are computed analytically, and the physical critical point is identified. Differences between transfer matrix approaches for Brascamp-Kunz and toroidal boundary conditions are discussed.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new example of solving the Ising model exactly under specific boundary conditions using transfer matrix methods, demonstrating boundary-condition mapping and fermionic representation techniques in integrable systems.

idea_spark.idea: Transform a problem with complex boundary conditions into one with known solvable boundary conditions by tuning interaction parameters and taking limits, then apply standard integrable methods.
idea_spark.risk: Physical justification of the limit procedure requires care; the physical interpretation of the mapped system may differ subtly from the original.
idea_spark.inspiration: This boundary-condition mapping strategy could be generalized to other lattice models or higher-dimensional systems; the framework combining fermionic representations and transfer matrices could be applied to study critical behavior in more interacting models.

papers.title: When Can LLMs Learn to Reason with Weak Supervision?
papers.summary: Large language models have achieved significant reasoning improvements through reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). Yet as model capabilities grow, constructing high-quality reward signals becomes increasingly difficult, making it essential to understand when RLVR can succeed under weaker forms of supervision. We conduct a systematic empirical study across diverse model families and reasoning domains under three weak supervision settings: scarce data, noisy rewards, and self-supervised proxy rewards. We find that generalization is governed by training reward saturation dynamics: models that generalize exhibit a prolonged pre-saturation phase during which training reward and downstream performance climb together, while models that saturate rapidly memorize rather than learn. We identify reasoning faithfulness, defined as the extent to which intermediate steps logically support the final answer, as the pre-RL property that predicts which regime a model falls into, while output diversity alone is uninformative. Motivated by these findings, we disentangle the contributions of continual pre-training and supervised fine-tuning, finding that SFT on explicit reasoning traces is necessary for generalization under weak supervision, while continual pre-training on domain data amplifies the effect. Applied together to Llama3.2-3B-Base, these interventions enable generalization across all three settings where the base model previously failed.

ai.tldr: 本研究系统探索了大型语言模型在弱监督下（稀缺数据、噪声奖励、自监督代理奖励）学习推理能力的条件，发现泛化能力由训练奖励饱和动态决定，而推理忠实性是关键预测因素。
ai.motivation: 随着模型能力增强，构建高质量奖励信号愈发困难，因此需要理解强化学习与可验证奖励在何种弱监督条件下仍能成功。
ai.method: 在不同模型家族和推理领域下进行系统性实证研究，分析训练奖励饱和动态，并探究推理忠实性的作用，同时解耦持续预训练和监督微调的贡献。
ai.result: 发现泛化模型在训练奖励饱和前经历较长爬升期，而快速饱和的模型则倾向于记忆而非学习；推理忠实性可预测模型所属机制；监督微调对泛化必要，持续预训练则增强效果。
ai.help_to_user: 为在弱监督条件下训练语言模型进行推理提供了实证依据和实用指导，明确了泛化成功的关键因素和干预措施。

idea_spark.idea: 在弱监督强化学习设置中，引入推理忠实性作为早期诊断指标，动态调整训练策略（如早停、数据增强）。
idea_spark.risk: 推理忠实性的度量可能依赖特定领域逻辑形式化，在开放域或模糊推理任务中难以可靠计算。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将“忠实性”概念从推理步骤推广至其他生成任务的中间表示一致性评估，如代码生成、多模态推理。

en.tldr: This study systematically investigates when large language models can learn to reason under weak supervision (scarce data, noisy rewards, self-supervised proxy rewards), finding that generalization is governed by training reward saturation dynamics, with reasoning faithfulness as a key predictor.
en.motivation: As model capabilities grow, constructing high-quality reward signals becomes increasingly difficult, making it essential to understand when reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards can succeed under weaker supervision.
en.method: Conducts a systematic empirical study across diverse model families and reasoning domains, analyzes training reward saturation dynamics, investigates the role of reasoning faithfulness, and disentangles the contributions of continual pre-training and supervised fine-tuning.
en.result: Finds that generalizing models exhibit a prolonged pre-saturation phase where training reward and performance climb together, while rapidly saturating models memorize; reasoning faithfulness predicts the regime; SFT is necessary for generalization, and continual pre-training amplifies the effect.
en.help_to_user: Provides empirical evidence and practical guidance for training language models to reason under weak supervision, identifying key factors for generalization success and effective interventions.

idea_spark.idea: In weak-supervision RL settings, use reasoning faithfulness as an early diagnostic metric to dynamically adjust training strategies (e.g., early stopping, data augmentation).
idea_spark.risk: Measuring reasoning faithfulness may rely on domain-specific logical formalisms, making it difficult to compute reliably in open-domain or ambiguous reasoning tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Generalize the 'faithfulness' concept from reasoning steps to intermediate representation consistency in other generative tasks, such as code generation or multimodal reasoning.

papers.title: An Adaptive Smoothing Algorithm for Non-Lipschitz Optimization on Manifolds with Complexity Guarantees
papers.summary: We study a class of optimization problems on Riemannian manifolds, where the objective function consists of a smooth term and quasi-norm type penalties with exponent $p \in (0, 1]$. The essential difficulty lies in the fact that the objective function may not be locally Lipschitz continuous, which places this type of problems beyond the reach of existing Riemannian techniques. To overcome this obstacle, this paper constructs a general smoothing framework and establishes fundamental properties for developing efficient algorithms. In particular, we propose a smoothing Riemannian gradient algorithm equipped with a smoothing-aware AdaGrad-type stepsize rule. Its global convergence is demonstrated together with an iteration complexity of $O (ε^{p - 4})$, which includes the best available iteration complexity of $O (ε^{- 3})$ for Lipschitz problems with $p = 1$ as a special case. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first complexity result for non-Lipschitz optimization on Riemannian manifolds. Preliminary numerical experiments corroborate the practical efficiency of the proposed approach in real-world applications arsing from machine learning and data science.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于黎曼流形上非Lipschitz优化的自适应平滑算法，并给出了复杂度保证。
ai.motivation: 黎曼流形上的优化问题，当目标函数包含指数p∈(0,1]的拟范数惩罚项时，可能不具备局部Lipschitz连续性，这超出了现有黎曼优化技术的处理范围。
ai.method: 构建了一个通用的平滑框架，提出了配备平滑感知AdaGrad型步长规则的平滑黎曼梯度算法。
ai.result: 证明了算法的全局收敛性，并获得了O(ε^{p-4})的迭代复杂度，其中p=1时退化为Lipschitz问题的最佳已知复杂度O(ε^{-3})。初步数值实验验证了其在机器学习和数据科学应用中的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理黎曼流形上非Lipschitz连续目标函数的优化问题提供了首个具有复杂度保证的算法框架。

idea_spark.idea: 通过构造平滑逼近将非Lipschitz问题转化为可处理形式，并结合流形几何设计迭代算法。
idea_spark.risk: 理论复杂度在p较小时可能较高，实际计算效率需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将欧氏空间非光滑优化技术（如平滑化、自适应梯度）与黎曼几何相结合的新思路。

en.tldr: This paper proposes an adaptive smoothing algorithm for non-Lipschitz optimization on Riemannian manifolds with complexity guarantees.
en.motivation: Optimization problems on Riemannian manifolds with quasi-norm penalties (exponent p∈(0,1]) may lack local Lipschitz continuity, placing them beyond existing Riemannian optimization techniques.
en.method: Constructs a general smoothing framework and proposes a smoothing Riemannian gradient algorithm equipped with a smoothing-aware AdaGrad-type stepsize rule.
en.result: Demonstrates global convergence with an iteration complexity of O(ε^{p-4}), which includes the best-known O(ε^{-3}) for Lipschitz problems (p=1) as a special case. Preliminary experiments show practical efficiency in machine learning and data science applications.
en.help_to_user: Provides the first complexity-guaranteed algorithmic framework for non-Lipschitz optimization on Riemannian manifolds.

idea_spark.idea: Transform non-Lipschitz problems into tractable forms via smoothing approximations, then design iterative algorithms incorporating manifold geometry.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical complexity may be high when p is small; practical computational efficiency requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires new approaches combining Euclidean non-smooth optimization techniques (e.g., smoothing, adaptive gradients) with Riemannian geometry.

papers.title: Score-Based Matching with Target Guidance for Cryo-EM Denoising
papers.summary: Cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) enables single-particle analysis of biological macromolecules under strict low-dose imaging conditions, but the resulting micrographs often exhibit extremely low signal-to-noise ratios and weak particle visibility. Image denoising is therefore an important preprocessing step for downstream cryo-EM analysis, including particle picking, 2D classification, and 3D reconstruction. Existing cryo-EM denoising methods are commonly trained with pixel-wise or Noise2Noise-style objectives, which can improve visual quality but do not explicitly account for structural consistency required by downstream analysis. In this work, we propose a score-based denoising framework for cryo-EM that learns the clean-data score to recover particle signals while better preserving structural information. Building on this formulation, we further introduce a target-guided variant that incorporates reference-density guidance to stabilize score learning under weak and ambiguous signal conditions. Rather than simply amplifying particle-like responses, our framework better suppresses structured low-frequency background, which improves particle--background separability for downstream analysis. Experiments on multiple cryo-EM datasets show that our score-based methods consistently improve downstream particle picking and produce more structure-consistent 3D reconstructions. Experiments on multiple cryo-EM datasets show that our methods improve downstream particle picking and produce more structure-consistent reconstructions.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于分数匹配和目标引导的冷冻电镜图像去噪框架，通过引入参考密度引导来稳定弱信号下的分数学习，更好地保留结构信息并提升下游分析性能。
ai.motivation: 冷冻电镜图像在低剂量成像条件下信噪比极低，现有去噪方法多基于像素级或Noise2Noise目标，虽能提升视觉质量但未显式考虑下游分析所需的结构一致性。
ai.method: 构建基于分数匹配的去噪框架，学习干净数据的分数以恢复粒子信号；进一步引入目标引导变体，在弱信号条件下通过参考密度引导稳定分数学习，抑制结构化低频背景。
ai.result: 在多个冷冻电镜数据集上的实验表明，该方法能持续提升下游粒子挑选性能，并产生更具结构一致性的三维重建结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为冷冻电镜图像预处理提供了一种能更好保留结构信息的去噪工具，有助于提升粒子挑选和三维重建的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 在弱信号成像中，引入先验结构信息（如参考密度）作为引导，可稳定生成模型的训练并提升结构保真度。
idea_spark.risk: 参考密度的质量直接影响引导效果；若先验信息偏差较大，可能引入错误的结构偏好。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将生成模型（分数匹配）与领域先验（结构引导）相结合，为解决特定科学成像中的信噪比瓶颈提供了新思路。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将生成模型（分数匹配）与领域先验（结构引导）相结合，为解决特定科学成像中的信噪比瓶颈提供了新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a score-based matching framework with target guidance for cryo-EM denoising, incorporating reference-density guidance to stabilize score learning under weak signals, better preserving structural information and improving downstream analysis performance.
en.motivation: Cryo-EM images exhibit extremely low signal-to-noise ratios under low-dose imaging. Existing denoising methods often use pixel-wise or Noise2Noise objectives, which improve visual quality but do not explicitly account for structural consistency required for downstream analysis.
en.method: Develops a score-based denoising framework that learns the clean-data score to recover particle signals. Introduces a target-guided variant that incorporates reference-density guidance to stabilize score learning under weak and ambiguous signal conditions, better suppressing structured low-frequency background.
en.result: Experiments on multiple cryo-EM datasets show that the method consistently improves downstream particle picking and produces more structure-consistent 3D reconstructions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a denoising tool for cryo-EM preprocessing that better preserves structural information, aiding the accuracy of particle picking and 3D reconstruction.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporating prior structural information (e.g., reference density) as guidance in weak-signal imaging can stabilize generative model training and enhance structural fidelity.
idea_spark.risk: The quality of the reference density directly affects guidance performance; biased prior information may introduce erroneous structural preferences.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining generative models (score matching) with domain priors (structural guidance) offers a new approach to address SNR bottlenecks in specific scientific imaging applications.

papers.title: Uniform Hyperbolicity and Symbolic Dynamics: Markov Partitions, Shadowing, and the Coding of Axiom A Systems
papers.summary: This paper establishes the geometric theory of uniformly hyperbolic sets with explicit quantitative bounds throughout, and contains five main theorems. The Stable Manifold Theorem is proved via the backward graph transform, with a complete fiber-contraction argument yielding $C^r$ regularity and Hölder dependence of the local stable and unstable manifolds on the base point, with explicit manifold-size estimate in terms of the contraction rate $λ$ and the second-derivative bound of the diffeomorphism. The Spectral Decomposition Theorem gives the unique decomposition of the nonwandering set into basic sets, with explicit mixing rates for the topologically mixing factors. The Shadowing Lemma provides explicit error bounds controlling how far a pseudo-orbit deviates from a tracking true orbit. The existence of Markov partitions of arbitrarily small diameter is established constructively, with explicit diameter bounds expressed in terms of the shadowing constants. Finally, the coding map from the subshift of finite type to the hyperbolic set is constructed and shown to be Hölder continuous with quantitative control on the exceptional set where it fails to be injective. Along the way we establish canonical coordinates through the bracket map with quantitative bounds. All constants are expressed in terms of the contraction rate, the Hölder exponent of the derivative, the manifold dimension, and the injectivity radius, providing the quantitative infrastructure required to transfer the symbolic spectral theory of Part I and the variational theory of Part II to the smooth setting. This paper constitutes Part III of a six-part series on the thermodynamic formalism for hyperbolic dynamical systems.

ai.tldr: 本文为一致双曲集建立了具有显式定量界的几何理论，包含五个主要定理，为将符号谱理论和变分理论转移到光滑环境提供了定量基础。
ai.motivation: 为双曲动力系统提供显式定量常数，以便将符号动力学和热力学形式主义应用于光滑系统。
ai.method: 使用后向图变换证明稳定流形定理，构造性建立马尔可夫分割，并通过影引理和括号映射获得定量控制。
ai.result: 证明了稳定/不稳定流形的C^r正则性和Hölder依赖性，给出了谱分解、影引理误差界、马尔可夫分割直径界，并构造了Hölder连续的编码映射。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了双曲动力系统定量分析的完整工具箱，所有常数均用收缩率、导数Hölder指数、流形维数和单射半径表示。

idea_spark.idea: 将符号动力学的谱理论和变分理论通过定量编码映射转移到光滑双曲系统
idea_spark.risk: 对系统光滑性和双曲性参数的显式依赖可能在高维或弱双曲情形中导致常数过大
idea_spark.inspiration: 为计算动力学和数值验证提供了严格的误差控制框架
