en.tldr: This paper establishes the geometric theory of uniformly hyperbolic sets with explicit quantitative bounds through five main theorems, providing the quantitative infrastructure to transfer symbolic spectral and variational theories to smooth settings.
en.motivation: To provide explicit quantitative constants for hyperbolic dynamical systems, enabling the application of symbolic dynamics and thermodynamic formalism to smooth systems.
en.method: Proves the Stable Manifold Theorem via backward graph transform, constructively establishes Markov partitions, and obtains quantitative control through Shadowing Lemma and bracket map.
en.result: Proves C^r regularity and Hölder dependence of stable/unstable manifolds, provides spectral decomposition, shadowing error bounds, Markov partition diameter bounds, and constructs a Hölder continuous coding map.
en.help_to_user: Provides a complete toolbox for quantitative analysis of hyperbolic dynamical systems, with all constants expressed in terms of contraction rate, derivative Hölder exponent, manifold dimension, and injectivity radius.

idea_spark.idea: Transfer symbolic spectral and variational theories to smooth hyperbolic systems via quantitative coding maps
idea_spark.risk: Explicit dependence on smoothness and hyperbolicity parameters may lead to large constants in high-dimensional or weakly hyperbolic scenarios
idea_spark.inspiration: Provides a rigorous error-control framework for computational dynamics and numerical verification

papers.title: FlashFPS: Efficient Farthest Point Sampling for Large-Scale Point Clouds via Pruning and Caching
papers.summary: Point-based Neural Networks (PNNs) have become a key approach for point cloud processing. However, a core operation in these models, Farthest Point Sampling (FPS), often introduces significant inference latency, especially for large-scale processing. Despite existing CUDA- and hardware-level optimizations, FPS remains a major bottleneck due to exhaustive computations across multiple network layers in PNNs, which hinders scalability. Through systematic analysis, we identify three substantial redundancies in FPS, including unnecessary full-cloud computations, redundant late-stage iterations, and predictable inter-layer outputs that make later FPS computations avoidable. To address these, we propose \textbf{\textit{FlashFPS}}, a hardware-agnostic, plug-and-play framework for FPS acceleration, composed of \textit{FPS-Prune} and \textit{FPS-Cache}. \textit{FPS-Prune} introduces candidate pruning and iteration pruning to reduce redundant computations in FPS while preserving sampling quality, and \textit{FPS-Cache} eliminates layer-wise redundancy via cache-and-reuse. Integrated into existing CUDA libraries and state-of-the-art PNN accelerators, \textit{FlashFPS} achieves 5.16$\times$ speedup over the standard CUDA baseline on GPU and 2.69$\times$ on PNN accelerators, with negligible accuracy loss, enabling efficient and scalable PNN inference. Codes are released at https://github.com/Yuzhe-Fu/FlashFPS.

ai.tldr: FlashFPS是一个通过剪枝和缓存技术，高效加速点云最远点采样的即插即用框架。
ai.motivation: 点云神经网络中的最远点采样操作在大规模处理时引入显著推理延迟，成为主要瓶颈。
ai.method: 提出FPS-Prune（候选剪枝和迭代剪枝）减少冗余计算，FPS-Cache（缓存重用）消除层间冗余。
ai.result: 在GPU上实现5.16倍加速，在PNN加速器上实现2.69倍加速，精度损失可忽略。
ai.help_to_user: 为大规模点云处理提供高效、可扩展的采样解决方案，可直接集成现有系统。

idea_spark.idea: 识别并消除算法中的计算冗余（全云计算、后期迭代、层间输出）。
idea_spark.risk: 剪枝可能影响采样质量，需严格保证近似精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过算法层优化而非仅硬件优化，实现跨平台加速。

en.tldr: FlashFPS is a plug-and-play framework for efficient Farthest Point Sampling acceleration via pruning and caching.
en.motivation: FPS introduces significant inference latency in point-based neural networks, especially for large-scale processing, becoming a major bottleneck.
en.method: Proposes FPS-Prune (candidate & iteration pruning) to reduce redundant computations, and FPS-Cache (cache-and-reuse) to eliminate inter-layer redundancy.
en.result: Achieves 5.16× speedup on GPU and 2.69× on PNN accelerators over baseline with negligible accuracy loss.

idea_spark.idea: Identify and eliminate computational redundancies (full-cloud computations, late-stage iterations, predictable inter-layer outputs).
idea_spark.risk: Pruning may affect sampling quality, requiring strict approximation guarantees.
idea_spark.inspiration: Achieve cross-platform acceleration through algorithmic optimization rather than hardware-only approaches.

papers.title: Kernel-Preserving Dynamics and Symmetry Classification for Synchronization Subspaces
papers.summary: We study the preservation and stability of synchronization subspaces in tensor products of finite-dimensional Hilbert spaces. Given self-adjoint operators $T_A$ and $T_B$ on local subsystems, the synchronization subspace is defined as the kernel of the difference operator $K = T_A \otimes I - I \otimes T_B$. We establish two main results: First for $ε$-compatible dynamics satisfying $||[H,K]|| \leq ε$, we prove a sharp drift bound where any initially synchronized state deviates from the kernel at a rate at most linear in time with slope $ε$. We show by explicit construction that this estimate is optimal to leading order. Second in the presence of finite group symmetry, we show that the synchronization subspace coincides with the diagonal isotypic component in the tensor product decomposition and we characterize the algebra of synchronization-preserving dynamics as the intersection of the commutants of the group action and synchronization operator.

ai.tldr: 研究张量积希尔伯特空间中同步子空间的保持与稳定性，建立了ε相容动力学的漂移界，并在有限群对称下刻画了同步保持动力学的代数结构。
ai.motivation: 理解局部子系统上自伴算子定义的同步子空间在动力学下的演化行为，特别是其保持条件和稳定性。
ai.method: 定义同步子空间为差算子K的核，分析满足对易子范数界的ε相容动力学，并利用有限群对称下的张量积分解理论。
ai.result: 证明了初始同步态的偏离速率至多为ε的线性函数且该界最优；在对称性下，同步子空间对应于对角等变分量，同步保持动力学代数由群作用与同步算子的交换子交集给出。
ai.help_to_user: 为量子同步、多体系统协调及对称性保护动力学提供了严格的数学框架与定量估计。

idea_spark.idea: 将同步稳定性问题转化为算子代数中的交换子控制问题。
idea_spark.risk: 结论依赖于有限维与特定算子结构，向无限维或非线性推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对量子网络同步、误差抑制及对称性保护门设计的进一步研究。

en.tldr: Studies preservation and stability of synchronization subspaces in tensor product Hilbert spaces, establishes a sharp drift bound for ε-compatible dynamics, and characterizes the algebra of synchronization-preserving dynamics under finite group symmetry.
en.motivation: To understand the evolution of synchronization subspaces defined by self-adjoint operators on local subsystems under dynamics, particularly their preservation conditions and stability.
en.method: Defines synchronization subspace as kernel of difference operator K, analyzes ε-compatible dynamics satisfying commutator norm bound, and employs tensor product decomposition theory under finite group symmetry.
en.result: Proves that initially synchronized states deviate from kernel at rate at most linear in time with slope ε, and shows bound is optimal; under symmetry, synchronization subspace coincides with diagonal isotypic component, and synchronization-preserving algebra is intersection of commutants of group action and synchronization operator.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical framework and quantitative estimates for quantum synchronization, coordinated many-body systems, and symmetry-protected dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Transforms synchronization stability problem into commutator control in operator algebras.
idea_spark.risk: Conclusions rely on finite dimensionality and specific operator structures; extension to infinite dimensions or nonlinearities requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires further research on quantum network synchronization, error suppression, and symmetry-protected gate design.

papers.title: One-Step Diffusion with Inverse Residual Fields for Unsupervised Industrial Anomaly Detection
papers.summary: Diffusion models have achieved outstanding performance in unsupervised industrial anomaly detection (uIAD) by learning a manifold of normal data under the common assumption that off-manifold anomalies are harder to generate, resulting in larger reconstruction errors in data space or lower probability densities in the tractable latent space. However, their iterative denoising and noising nature leads to slow inference. In this paper, we propose OSD-IRF, a novel one-step diffusion with inverse residual fields, to address this limitation for uIAD task. We first train a deep diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) on normal data without any conditioning. Then, for a test sample, we predict its inverse residual fields (IRF) based on the noise estimated by the well-trained parametric noise function of the DDPM. Finally, uIAD is performed by evaluating the probability density of the IRF under a Gaussian distribution and comparing it with a threshold. Our key observation is that anomalies become distinguishable in this IRF space, a finding that has seldom been reported in prior works. Moreover, OSD-IRF requires only single step diffusion for uIAD, thanks to the property that IRF holds for any neighboring time step in the denoising process. Extensive experiments on three widely used uIAD benchmarks show that our model achieves SOTA or competitive performance across six metrics, along with roughly a 2X inference speedup without distillation.

ai.tldr: 提出OSD-IRF，一种基于逆残差场的单步扩散模型，用于无监督工业异常检测，在保持SOTA性能的同时实现约2倍推理加速。
ai.motivation: 扩散模型在无监督工业异常检测中表现出色，但其迭代去噪/加噪特性导致推理速度慢。
ai.method: 首先在正常数据上训练无条件DDPM；对于测试样本，基于DDPM估计的噪声预测其逆残差场；最后通过评估逆残差场在高斯分布下的概率密度并与阈值比较进行异常检测。
ai.result: 在三个广泛使用的uIAD基准测试中，在六项指标上达到SOTA或竞争性性能，推理速度提升约2倍。
ai.help_to_user: 为工业异常检测提供了一种高性能且快速的单步扩散解决方案，显著降低了计算成本。

idea_spark.idea: 利用扩散模型估计的噪声直接推导出区分异常的特征空间（逆残差场），而非在数据或潜空间中进行耗时重建。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于扩散模型对正常数据建模的质量；逆残差场在复杂异常模式下的普适性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将迭代推理过程压缩为单步的关键在于发现并利用扩散过程中相邻时间步的稳定数学属性（逆残差场）。

idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于扩散模型对正常数据建模的质量；逆残差场在复杂异常模式下的普适性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将迭代推理过程压缩为单步的关键在于发现并利用扩散过程中相邻时间步的稳定数学属性（逆残差场）。

en.tldr: Proposes OSD-IRF, a one-step diffusion model with inverse residual fields for unsupervised industrial anomaly detection, achieving ~2x inference speedup while maintaining SOTA performance.
en.motivation: Diffusion models excel in unsupervised industrial anomaly detection, but their iterative denoising/noising nature leads to slow inference.
en.method: First train an unconditional DDPM on normal data; for a test sample, predict its inverse residual fields based on the noise estimated by the DDPM; finally perform anomaly detection by evaluating the probability density of the IRF under a Gaussian distribution and comparing with a threshold.
en.result: Achieves SOTA or competitive performance across six metrics on three widely used uIAD benchmarks, with roughly 2x inference speedup.
en.help_to_user: Provides a high-performance and fast one-step diffusion solution for industrial anomaly detection, significantly reducing computational cost.

idea_spark.idea: Utilize the noise estimated by the diffusion model to directly derive a discriminative feature space (inverse residual fields) for anomalies, instead of performing time-consuming reconstruction in data or latent space.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on the quality of the diffusion model's modeling of normal data; the universality of IRF for complex anomaly patterns needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The key to compressing iterative inference into a single step lies in discovering and leveraging a stable mathematical property (inverse residual fields) that holds across neighboring time steps in the diffusion process.

papers.title: Functional correlation bound for random Lasota--Yorke maps with holes and its applications to conditional normal approximations
papers.summary: This paper investigates the statistical properties of random open dynamical systems generated by families of Lasota--Yorke maps. Open systems, in which trajectories may escape through `holes', model transient phenomena and present additional difficulties for statistical analysis because the underlying ensemble loses mass over time. We show that the framework of functional correlation bounds (FCB), originally developed for closed systems, can also be adapted to this random open setting. The extension requires new ingredients based on Lasota--Yorke type inequalities in order to control the effect of escaping trajectories. We establish an FCB with exponential decay and combine it with the abstract normal-approximation results of \cite{LNN25,LS20} to obtain a conditional CLT with rates in Wasserstein distance and a conditional functional CLT with a rate in an integral distance over Barbour's class of smooth test functions. Additionally, we adapt Tikhomirov's method to obtain a bound in Kolmogorov distance for the conditional CLT.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了由Lasota-Yorke映射族生成的随机开动力系统的统计性质，将闭系统的函数相关界框架扩展到含逃逸轨迹的开系统，并获得了条件中心极限定理的收敛速率。
ai.motivation: 开动力系统中轨迹可通过'洞'逃逸，模拟瞬态现象，但质量随时间损失给统计分析带来困难。需要将闭系统的分析工具扩展到随机开系统。
ai.method: 基于Lasota-Yorke型不等式控制逃逸轨迹的影响，建立指数衰减的函数相关界，结合抽象正态逼近结果，获得条件CLT的Wasserstein距离和Kolmogorov距离收敛速率。
ai.result: 建立了指数衰减的函数相关界，得到了条件CLT在Wasserstein距离和Barbour光滑检验函数积分距离下的收敛速率，并采用Tikhomirov方法获得了Kolmogorov距离界。
ai.help_to_user: 为分析含逃逸的随机动力系统提供了系统的相关衰减框架和条件极限定理的定量收敛结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将Lasota-Yorke不等式与逃逸轨迹控制结合，构建适用于开系统的相关衰减估计
idea_spark.risk: 逃逸轨迹导致的系统质量损失可能破坏相关衰减结构
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可应用于其他具有质量损失的随机动力系统，如带吸收边界的扩散过程

zh.tldr: 本文研究了由Lasota-Yorke映射族生成的随机开动力系统的统计性质，将闭系统的函数相关界框架扩展到含逃逸轨迹的开系统，并获得了条件中心极限定理的收敛速率。
zh.motivation: 开动力系统中轨迹可通过'洞'逃逸，模拟瞬态现象，但质量随时间损失给统计分析带来困难。需要将闭系统的分析工具扩展到随机开系统。
zh.method: 基于Lasota-Yorke型不等式控制逃逸轨迹的影响，建立指数衰减的函数相关界，结合抽象正态逼近结果，获得条件CLT的Wasserstein距离和Kolmogorov距离收敛速率。
zh.result: 建立了指数衰减的函数相关界，得到了条件CLT在Wasserstein距离和Barbour光滑检验函数积分距离下的收敛速率，并采用Tikhomirov方法获得了Kolmogorov距离界。
zh.help_to_user: 为分析含逃逸的随机动力系统提供了系统的相关衰减框架和条件极限定理的定量收敛结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将Lasota-Yorke不等式与逃逸轨迹控制结合，构建适用于开系统的相关衰减估计
idea_spark.risk: 逃逸轨迹导致的系统质量损失可能破坏相关衰减结构
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可应用于其他具有质量损失的随机动力系统，如带吸收边界的扩散过程

en.tldr: This paper studies statistical properties of random open dynamical systems generated by families of Lasota-Yorke maps, extending the functional correlation bound framework from closed to open systems with escaping trajectories, and obtains convergence rates for conditional central limit theorems.
en.motivation: Open dynamical systems where trajectories may escape through 'holes' model transient phenomena but present analytical difficulties due to mass loss over time. Tools from closed systems need adaptation to this random open setting.
en.method: Using Lasota-Yorke type inequalities to control the effect of escaping trajectories, establishing an exponential functional correlation bound, and combining it with abstract normal-approximation results to obtain convergence rates for conditional CLTs in Wasserstein and Kolmogorov distances.
en.result: Established an exponential functional correlation bound and obtained convergence rates for conditional CLTs in Wasserstein distance and an integral distance over Barbour's class, with Kolmogorov distance bounds via Tikhomirov's method.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic correlation decay framework for analyzing random open systems with escape and quantitative convergence results for conditional limit theorems.

idea_spark.idea: Combining Lasota-Yorke inequalities with escape trajectory control to construct correlation decay estimates for open systems
idea_spark.risk: Mass loss from escaping trajectories may disrupt correlation decay structures
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach could be applied to other random dynamical systems with mass loss, such as diffusion processes with absorbing boundaries

papers.title: CrossFlowDG: Bridging the Modality Gap with Cross-modal Flow Matching for Domain Generalization
papers.summary: Domain generalization (DG) aims to maintain performance under domain shift, which in computer vision appears primarily as stylistic variations that cause models to overfit to domain-specific appearance cues rather than class semantics. To overcome this, recent methods use textual representations as stable, domain-invariant anchors. However, multimodal approaches that rely on cosine similarity-based contrastive alignment leave a modality gap where image and text embeddings remain geometrically separated despite semantic correspondence. We propose CrossFlowDG, a novel DG framework that addresses this residual gap using noise-free, cross-modal flow matching. By learning a continuous transformation in the joint Euclidean latent space, our framework explicitly transports domain-biased image embeddings toward domain-invariant text embeddings of the correct class. Using the efficient VMamba image encoder and CLIP's text encoder, CrossFlowDG is tested against four common DG benchmarks, and achieves competitive performance on several benchmarks and state-of-the-art on TerraIncognita. Code is available at: https://github.com/ajkrit/CrossFlowDG

ai.tldr: CrossFlowDG 提出了一种基于跨模态流匹配的域泛化框架，通过将图像嵌入向文本嵌入对齐来减小模态间隙，提升模型在未见域上的性能。
ai.motivation: 现有基于余弦相似度的多模态对齐方法存在模态间隙，导致图像和文本嵌入在几何上分离，限制了域泛化性能。
ai.method: 使用无噪声的跨模态流匹配，在联合欧几里得潜在空间中学习连续变换，将具有域偏见的图像嵌入向域不变的文本嵌入对齐。采用 VMamba 图像编码器和 CLIP 文本编码器。
ai.result: 在四个常见域泛化基准上测试，在 TerraIncognita 上达到最先进性能，在其他基准上具有竞争力。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种通过流匹配减小模态间隙来提升跨域泛化能力的方法，适用于需要鲁棒视觉识别的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将流匹配的连续变换思想应用于特征正则化或数据增强，以生成更平滑的域不变特征流形。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于预训练的多模态编码器（如 CLIP）的质量和领域覆盖度。在模态差异极大或文本描述稀缺的任务中可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们思考如何利用几何变换（如流）来弥合其他类型的表示差距，例如不同传感器数据或不同分辨率图像之间的差距。

en.tldr: CrossFlowDG proposes a domain generalization framework using cross-modal flow matching to bridge the modality gap by aligning image embeddings to text embeddings, improving performance on unseen domains.
en.motivation: Existing multimodal alignment methods based on cosine similarity leave a modality gap, causing geometric separation between image and text embeddings despite semantic correspondence, limiting domain generalization performance.
en.method: Employs noise-free cross-modal flow matching to learn a continuous transformation in a joint Euclidean latent space, transporting domain-biased image embeddings toward domain-invariant text embeddings of the correct class. Uses VMamba image encoder and CLIP text encoder.
en.result: Tested on four common DG benchmarks, achieves state-of-the-art performance on TerraIncognita and competitive results on others.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method to improve cross-domain generalization by reducing the modality gap via flow matching, applicable to scenarios requiring robust visual recognition.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the continuous transformation concept of flow matching to feature regularization or data augmentation to generate smoother domain-invariant feature manifolds.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on the quality and domain coverage of pre-trained multimodal encoders (e.g., CLIP). May be limited in tasks with extreme modality differences or scarce textual descriptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires thinking about using geometric transformations (e.g., flows) to bridge other types of representation gaps, such as between different sensor data or images of varying resolutions.

papers.title: LiquidTAD: An Efficient Method for Temporal Action Detection via Liquid Neural Dynamics
papers.summary: Temporal Action Detection (TAD) in untrimmed videos is currently dominated by Transformer-based architectures. While high-performing, their quadratic computational complexity and substantial parameter redundancy limit deployment in resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we propose LiquidTAD, a novel parameter-efficient framework that replaces cumbersome self-attention layers with parallelized ActionLiquid blocks. Unlike traditional Liquid Neural Networks (LNNs) that suffer from sequential execution bottlenecks, LiquidTAD leverages a closed-form continuous-time (CfC) formulation, allowing the model to be reformulated as a parallelizable operator while preserving the intrinsic physical prior of continuous-time dynamics. This architecture captures complex temporal dependencies with $O(N)$ linear complexity and adaptively modulates temporal sensitivity through learned time-constants ($τ$), providing a robust mechanism for handling varying action durations. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to introduce a parallelized LNN-based architecture to the TAD domain. Experimental results on the THUMOS-14 dataset demonstrate that LiquidTAD achieves a highly competitive Average mAP of 69.46\% with only 10.82M parameters -- a 63\% reduction compared to the ActionFormer baseline. Further evaluations on ActivityNet-1.3 and Ego4D benchmarks confirm that LiquidTAD achieves an optimal accuracy-efficiency trade-off and exhibits superior robustness to temporal sampling variations, advancing the Pareto frontier of modern TAD frameworks.

ai.tldr: LiquidTAD是一种基于并行化液态神经网络的时序动作检测方法，用线性复杂度替代Transformer的二次复杂度，显著减少参数量并保持高性能。
ai.motivation: 当前基于Transformer的时序动作检测方法计算复杂度高、参数冗余大，难以部署在资源受限环境中。
ai.method: 提出LiquidTAD框架，用并行化的ActionLiquid块替代自注意力层，采用闭式连续时间公式实现并行计算，通过可学习时间常数自适应调节时序敏感性。
ai.result: 在THUMOS-14数据集上达到69.46%的平均mAP，仅需10.82M参数（比基线减少63%），在多个基准测试中实现了精度与效率的最佳权衡。
ai.help_to_user: 为资源受限环境下的视频动作检测提供了高效解决方案，显著降低计算开销和存储需求。

idea_spark.idea: 将连续时间动力学先验与并行计算结合，突破传统液态网络的顺序执行瓶颈
idea_spark.risk: 在新数据集上的泛化能力需进一步验证，时间常数学习机制可能对超参数敏感
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将物理启发的连续时间模型应用于更多视频理解任务，探索计算效率与模型性能的新平衡点

en.tldr: LiquidTAD is an efficient temporal action detection method using parallelized liquid neural networks, replacing quadratic Transformer complexity with linear complexity while significantly reducing parameters and maintaining high performance.
en.motivation: Current Transformer-based temporal action detection methods suffer from high computational complexity and parameter redundancy, limiting deployment in resource-constrained environments.
en.method: Proposes LiquidTAD framework that replaces self-attention layers with parallelized ActionLiquid blocks, employs closed-form continuous-time formulation for parallel computation, and adaptively modulates temporal sensitivity through learned time constants.
en.result: Achieves 69.46% average mAP on THUMOS-14 with only 10.82M parameters (63% reduction from baseline), demonstrating optimal accuracy-efficiency trade-off across multiple benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient solution for video action detection in resource-constrained settings, significantly reducing computational overhead and storage requirements.

idea_spark.idea: Combining continuous-time dynamics priors with parallel computation to overcome sequential execution bottlenecks of traditional liquid networks
idea_spark.risk: Generalization to new datasets requires further validation; time constant learning mechanism may be sensitive to hyperparameters
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires applying physics-inspired continuous-time models to more video understanding tasks, exploring new balances between computational efficiency and model performance

papers.title: Forget What Matters, Keep the Rest: Selective Unlearning of Informative Tokens
papers.summary: Unlearning in large language models (LLMs) has emerged as a promising safeguard against adversarial behaviors. When the forgetting loss is applied uniformly without considering token-level semantic importance, model utility can be unnecessarily degraded. Recent studies have explored token-wise loss regularizers that prioritize informative tokens, but largely rely on ground-truth confidence or external linguistic parsers, which limits their ability to capture contextual information or the model's overall predictive state. Intuitively, function words like "the" primarily serve syntactic roles and are highly predictable with little ambiguity, but informative words admit multiple plausible alternatives with greater uncertainty. Based on this intuition, we propose Entropy-guided Token Weighting (ETW), a token-level unlearning regularizer that uses entropy of the predictive distribution as a proxy for token informativeness. We demonstrate that informative tokens tend to have higher entropy, whereas structural tokens tend to have lower entropy. This behavior enables ETW to achieve more effective unlearning while better preserving model utility than existing token-level approaches.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于熵的令牌加权方法（ETW），用于大语言模型的选择性遗忘，通过预测分布的熵来识别信息性令牌，在有效遗忘的同时更好地保持模型效用。
ai.motivation: 现有令牌级遗忘损失正则化方法依赖真实置信度或外部语言解析器，难以捕捉上下文信息或模型的整体预测状态，可能导致模型效用不必要的下降。
ai.method: 基于信息性词语通常具有更高预测不确定性的直觉，使用预测分布的熵作为令牌信息性的代理，设计熵引导的令牌加权正则化器（ETW），对高熵信息性令牌施加更强遗忘损失。
ai.result: 证明信息性令牌倾向于具有更高熵，而结构令牌熵较低。ETW比现有令牌级方法实现了更有效的遗忘，同时更好地保持了模型效用。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需外部工具、基于模型自身预测不确定性的选择性遗忘框架，可用于安全移除模型中的不良知识。

idea_spark.idea: 利用模型自身预测分布的特性（如熵、置信度）自动区分不同语义重要性的输入单元，指导差异化的处理策略。
idea_spark.risk: 预测熵与语义重要性在某些领域（如专业术语）可能不完全对应，需结合领域知识验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 模型内部预测不确定性可能反映其“认知”状态，可用于构建更精细的模型干预机制。

en.tldr: Proposes Entropy-guided Token Weighting (ETW), a selective unlearning method for LLMs that uses entropy of the predictive distribution to identify informative tokens, achieving effective unlearning while better preserving model utility.
en.motivation: Existing token-level unlearning regularizers rely on ground-truth confidence or external parsers, limiting their ability to capture contextual information or the model's predictive state, potentially degrading model utility unnecessarily.
en.method: Based on the intuition that informative words admit greater predictive uncertainty, ETW uses the entropy of the model's predictive distribution as a proxy for token informativeness, applying stronger unlearning loss to high-entropy informative tokens.
en.result: Shows that informative tokens tend to have higher entropy while structural tokens have lower entropy. ETW achieves more effective unlearning and better utility preservation than existing token-level approaches.
en.help_to_user: Provides a selective unlearning framework that uses the model's own predictive uncertainty—without external tools—to safely remove undesirable knowledge.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage intrinsic properties of the model's predictive distribution (e.g., entropy, confidence) to automatically distinguish input units by semantic importance for differentiated processing.
idea_spark.risk: Predictive entropy may not always align perfectly with semantic importance in certain domains (e.g., technical jargon), requiring domain-knowledge validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: A model's internal predictive uncertainty may reflect its 'cognitive' state, enabling finer-grained intervention mechanisms.

papers.title: Understanding and Enforcing Weight Disentanglement in Task Arithmetic
papers.summary: Task arithmetic provides an efficient, training-free way to edit pre-trained models, yet lacks a fundamental theoretical explanation for its success. The existing concept of ``weight disentanglement" describes the ideal outcome of non-interfering task composition but does not reveal its underlying cause. Crucially, what intrinsic properties of the pre-trained model ($θ_0$) or the task vectors ($τ_t$) enable this disentanglement remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce Task-Feature Specialization (TFS), a model's ability to allocate distinct internal features to different tasks, as the fundamental principle. We first prove that TFS is a sufficient condition for weight disentanglement. More importantly, we find that TFS also gives rise to an observable geometric consequence: weight vector orthogonality. This positions TFS as the common cause for both the desired functional outcome (disentanglement) and a measurable geometric property (orthogonality). This relationship provides the key insight for our method: since the abstract TFS property is intractable to enforce directly, we can instead promote weight disentanglement by shaping its concrete geometric consequence, orthogonality. Therefore, we propose OrthoReg, a simple and effective regularization method that actively enforces an internal orthogonal structure on weight updates ($ΔW$) that constitute $τ_t$ during fine-tuning. And we theoretically prove that OrthoReg promotes disentanglement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OrthoReg consistently and significantly enhances the performance of various task arithmetic methods. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/RL-MIND/OrthoReg}{https://github.com/RL-MIND/OrthoReg}.

ai.tldr: 本文提出任务特征专业化（TFS）是权重解缠的根本原理，并证明其会导致权重向量正交性。基于此，我们提出OrthoReg正则化方法，通过强制权重更新正交来主动促进解缠，从而提升任务算术方法的性能。
ai.motivation: 任务算术提供了一种无需训练即可编辑预训练模型的高效方法，但缺乏对其成功的基本理论解释。现有的“权重解缠”概念描述了理想结果，但未揭示其根本原因。
ai.method: 引入任务特征专业化（TFS）作为根本原理，并证明其会导致权重向量正交性。提出OrthoReg正则化方法，在微调过程中对构成任务向量的权重更新施加内部正交结构。
ai.result: 理论证明OrthoReg能促进解缠。大量实验表明，OrthoReg能一致且显著地提升各种任务算术方法的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 为任务算术的成功提供了理论解释（TFS），并提供了一个简单有效的正则化方法（OrthoReg）来主动提升其性能。

idea_spark.idea: 对于其他涉及模型编辑、组合或多任务学习的场景，是否可以识别出类似的“抽象属性-具体几何表现”对，并通过优化几何表现来间接实现功能目标？
idea_spark.risk: 正交性约束可能过于严格，限制模型表达能力，或与某些任务的内在结构不符。需要验证其普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将理论分析与实用算法设计紧密结合。从“原因”推导出“可操作的后果”，并据此设计干预方法。

idea_spark.idea: 对于其他涉及模型编辑、组合或多任务学习的场景，是否可以识别出类似的“抽象属性-具体几何表现”对，并通过优化几何表现来间接实现功能目标？
idea_spark.risk: 正交性约束可能过于严格，限制模型表达能力，或与某些任务的内在结构不符。需要验证其普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将理论分析与实用算法设计紧密结合。从“原因”推导出“可操作的后果”，并据此设计干预方法。

en.tldr: This paper introduces Task-Feature Specialization (TFS) as the fundamental principle for weight disentanglement and proves it leads to weight vector orthogonality. Based on this, we propose OrthoReg, a regularization method that actively promotes disentanglement by enforcing orthogonality on weight updates, thereby enhancing the performance of task arithmetic methods.
en.motivation: Task arithmetic provides an efficient, training-free way to edit pre-trained models but lacks a fundamental theoretical explanation for its success. The existing concept of 'weight disentanglement' describes the ideal outcome but does not reveal its underlying cause.
en.method: Introduce Task-Feature Specialization (TFS) as the fundamental principle and prove it gives rise to weight vector orthogonality. Propose OrthoReg, a regularization method that enforces an internal orthogonal structure on the weight updates that constitute task vectors during fine-tuning.
en.result: Theoretically prove that OrthoReg promotes disentanglement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OrthoReg consistently and significantly enhances the performance of various task arithmetic methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical explanation (TFS) for the success of task arithmetic and offers a simple yet effective regularization method (OrthoReg) to actively improve its performance.

idea_spark.idea: For other scenarios involving model editing, composition, or multi-task learning, can similar pairs of 'abstract property–concrete geometric manifestation' be identified, and can the functional goal be indirectly achieved by optimizing the geometric manifestation?
idea_spark.risk: The orthogonality constraint might be too restrictive, limiting model expressivity, or may not align with the intrinsic structure of certain tasks. Its generalizability needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Tightly integrating theoretical analysis with practical algorithm design. Deriving an 'actionable consequence' from the 'cause' and designing an intervention method based on it.

papers.title: Spectral theory of plasmonic resonances in the nonlocal regime
papers.summary: We present a rigorous spectral analysis of plasmonic resonances in the nonlocal regime of spatially dispersive media. We adopt the quasi-static approximation of the hydrodynamic Drude model, which provides an analytically tractable setting to account for nonlocal effects. By reformulating the governing equations as a boundary integral system, we obtain an analytic Fredholm operator pencil that characterizes resonant behaviour. This framework enables the study of nonlocal plasmonic eigenvalues in general bounded Lipschitz domains, together with a corresponding resonant expansion of the scattered field. Our main result reveals a fundamental change in spectral structure: in contrast to the local theory -- which exhibits infinitely many surface plasmon modes and field singularities in domains with corners -- the nonlocal model admits a discrete real spectrum with a single accumulation point at a strictly positive value. Consequently, only finitely many surface plasmon modes exist, and the singular behaviour associated with sharp geometries is regularized. As such, our results show that nonlocality does not merely shift plasmonic resonances but completely reshapes the spectral landscape in a way that provides a mathematically transparent explanation for several nonlocal phenomena previously observed in numerical studies.

ai.tldr: 本文对非局域空间色散介质中的等离子体共振进行了严格的谱分析，揭示了非局域性如何从根本上改变共振谱结构。
ai.motivation: 局部理论在尖锐几何中会产生无限多表面等离子体模式和场奇异性，而非局域模型有望正则化这些行为，但其严格的谱结构尚不清楚。
ai.method: 采用流体动力学Drude模型的准静态近似，将控制方程重构为边界积分系统，得到解析的Fredholm算子铅笔来表征共振行为。
ai.result: 非局域模型具有离散实谱，仅存在有限个表面等离子体模式，尖锐几何相关的奇异性被正则化，谱结构发生根本性改变。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解非局域等离子体共振的数学本质提供了严格框架，解释了数值研究中观察到的非局域现象。

idea_spark.idea: 将非局域效应纳入其他波动物理模型（如声子极化激元），研究其谱结构变化。
idea_spark.risk: 准静态近似可能忽略高频动力学效应，需验证全波模型的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 非局域性作为正则化机制，可能应用于其他具有几何奇异性问题的数学处理。

en.tldr: This paper presents a rigorous spectral analysis of plasmonic resonances in the nonlocal regime, revealing how nonlocality fundamentally alters the resonance spectrum structure.
en.motivation: Local theory produces infinitely many surface plasmon modes and field singularities in sharp geometries, while nonlocal models are expected to regularize these behaviors, but their precise spectral structure remains unclear.
en.method: Adopting the quasi-static approximation of the hydrodynamic Drude model, the governing equations are reformulated as a boundary integral system, yielding an analytic Fredholm operator pencil that characterizes resonant behavior.
en.result: The nonlocal model admits a discrete real spectrum with only finitely many surface plasmon modes, regularizing singularities associated with sharp geometries and fundamentally changing the spectral landscape.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for understanding nonlocal plasmonic resonances, explaining previously observed nonlocal phenomena in numerical studies.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate nonlocal effects into other wave physics models (e.g., phonon polaritons) to study spectral structure changes.
idea_spark.risk: The quasi-static approximation may neglect high-frequency dynamic effects; validation with full-wave models is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Nonlocality as a regularization mechanism could be applied to mathematical treatment of other problems with geometric singularities.

papers.title: PA-TCNet: Pathology-Aware Temporal Calibration with Physiology-Guided Target Refinement for Cross-Subject Motor Imagery EEG Decoding in Stroke Patients
papers.summary: Stroke patient cross-subject electroencephalography (EEG) decoding of motor imagery (MI) brain-computer interface (BCI) is essential for motor rehabilitation, yet lesion-related abnormal temporal dynamics and pronounced inter-patient heterogeneity often undermine generalization. Existing adaptation methods are easily misled by pathological slow-wave activity and unstable target-domain pseudo-labels. To address this challenge, we propose PA-TCNet, a pathology-aware temporal calibration framework with physiology-guided target refinement for stroke motor imagery decoding. PA-TCNet integrates two coordinated components. The Pathology-aware Rhythmic State Mamba (PRSM) module decomposes EEG spatiotemporal features into slowly varying rhythmic context and fast transient perturbations, injecting the fused pathological context into selective state propagation to more effectively capture abnormal temporal dynamics. The Physiology-Guided Target Calibration (PGTC) module constructs source-domain sensorimotor region-of-interest templates, imposing physiological consistency constraints and dynamically refining target-domain pseudo-labels, thereby improving adaptation reliability. Leave-one-subject-out experiments on two independent stroke EEG datasets, XW-Stroke and 2019-Stroke, yielded mean accuracies of 66.56\% and 72.75\%, respectively, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. These results indicate that jointly modeling pathological temporal dynamics and physiology-constrained pseudo-supervision can provide more robust cross-subject initialization for personalized post-stroke MI-BCI rehabilitation. The implemented code is available at https://github.com/wxk1224/PA-TCNet.

ai.tldr: PA-TCNet：一种用于脑卒中患者跨被试运动想象脑电解码的病理感知时序校准框架，通过生理学引导的目标域伪标签优化提升模型泛化能力。
ai.motivation: 脑卒中患者的脑电信号存在病灶相关的异常时序动态和显著的被试间异质性，现有跨被试适应方法易受病理慢波活动和不稳定伪标签误导，导致解码性能下降。
ai.method: 提出PA-TCNet框架，包含两个协同模块：病理感知节律状态Mamba模块分解脑电时空特征为慢变节律上下文与快变瞬态扰动，融合病理上下文进行选择性状态传播；生理引导目标校准模块构建源域感觉运动区模板，施加生理一致性约束并动态优化目标域伪标签。
ai.result: 在两个独立脑卒中脑电数据集上进行的留一被试实验显示，平均准确率分别达到66.56%和72.75%，优于现有先进基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为脑卒中患者的个性化运动想象脑机接口康复提供了更鲁棒的跨被试初始化模型，通过联合建模病理时序动态和生理约束伪监督提升解码稳定性。

idea_spark.idea: 将异常生理状态建模为可分离的时序上下文成分，并与领域自适应中的伪标签可靠性问题协同优化。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于源域感觉运动区模板的构建质量，且对重度异质性患者的泛化能力仍需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将临床病理知识显式嵌入深度学习框架，通过多模态生理约束提升模型在医疗场景中的可信度。

en.tldr: PA-TCNet: A pathology-aware temporal calibration framework with physiology-guided target refinement for cross-subject motor imagery EEG decoding in stroke patients, improving generalization through optimized pseudo-labels.
en.motivation: Stroke patients' EEG signals exhibit lesion-related abnormal temporal dynamics and pronounced inter-subject heterogeneity. Existing cross-subject adaptation methods are easily misled by pathological slow-wave activity and unstable pseudo-labels, degrading decoding performance.
en.method: Proposes the PA-TCNet framework with two coordinated components: The Pathology-aware Rhythmic State Mamba module decomposes EEG spatiotemporal features into slowly varying rhythmic context and fast transient perturbations, injecting fused pathological context into selective state propagation. The Physiology-Guided Target Calibration module constructs source-domain sensorimotor region templates, imposes physiological consistency constraints, and dynamically refines target-domain pseudo-labels.
en.result: Leave-one-subject-out experiments on two independent stroke EEG datasets achieved mean accuracies of 66.56% and 72.75%, respectively, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more robust cross-subject initialization model for personalized post-stroke MI-BCI rehabilitation by jointly modeling pathological temporal dynamics and physiology-constrained pseudo-supervision.

idea_spark.idea: Model abnormal physiological states as separable temporal context components and co-optimize them with pseudo-label reliability in domain adaptation.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on the quality of source-domain sensorimotor region templates, and generalization to patients with severe heterogeneity requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the explicit embedding of clinical pathological knowledge into deep learning frameworks to enhance model trustworthiness in medical applications through multimodal physiological constraints.

papers.title: Beyond the Bellman Fixed Point: Geometry and Fast Policy Identification in Value Iteration
papers.summary: Dynamic programming is one of the most fundamental methodologies for solving Markov decision problems. Among its many variants, Q-value iteration (Q-VI) is particularly important due to its conceptual simplicity and its classical contraction-based convergence guarantee. Despite the central role of this contraction property, it does not fully reveal the geometric structure of the Q-VI trajectory. In particular, when one is interested not only in the final limit $Q^*$ but also in when the induced greedy policy becomes effectively optimal, the standard contraction argument provides only a coarse characterization. To formalize this notion, we denote by $\mathcal X^*$ the set of $Q$-functions whose corresponding tie-broken greedy policies are optimal, referred to as the practically optimal solution set (POS). In this paper, we revisit discounted Q-VI through the lens of switching system theory and derive new geometric insights into its behavior. In particular, we show that although Q-VI does not reach $Q^*$ in finite time in general, it identifies the optimal action class in finite time. Furthermore, we prove that the distance from the iterate to a particular subset of $\mathcal X^*$ decays exponentially at a rate governed by the joint spectral radius (JSR) of a restricted switching family. This rate can be strictly faster than the standard $γ$ rate when the restricted JSR is strictly smaller than $γ$, while the convergence of the entire $Q$-function to $Q^*$ can still be dominated by the slower $γ$ mode, where $γ$ denotes the discount factor. These results reveal a two-stage geometric behavior of Q-VI: a fast convergence toward $\mathcal X_1$, followed by a slower convergence toward $Q^*$ in general.

ai.tldr: 本文通过切换系统理论重新审视折扣Q值迭代，揭示了其几何结构：Q-VI在有限时间内识别最优动作类，且到特定最优解子集的距离以受限切换族的联合谱半径决定的指数速率衰减，该速率可能快于标准折扣因子γ。
ai.motivation: 标准的收缩性论证仅能粗略刻画Q值迭代轨迹的几何结构，尤其当关注点不仅是最终极限Q*，还包括诱导的贪婪策略何时变得有效最优时。
ai.method: 采用切换系统理论分析折扣Q值迭代，引入实际最优解集概念，并利用联合谱半径分析收敛速率。
ai.result: 证明了Q-VI在有限时间内识别最优动作类，且到实际最优解集特定子集的距离以由受限联合谱半径决定的指数速率衰减，该速率可能严格快于γ，揭示了Q-VI的两阶段几何行为。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解Q值迭代的收敛几何提供了新视角，表明策略识别可能比Q函数收敛更快，这对设计早期停止准则或策略提取有启示。

idea_spark.idea: 探索不同MDP结构（如确定性转移、稀疏奖励）下受限联合谱半径的上界，以量化策略识别的加速效果。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于对实际最优解集和受限切换族的精确刻画，在复杂或连续状态空间中可能难以计算或验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对强化学习算法“隐式正则化”或“早期学习阶段”的几何研究，例如策略梯度方法中策略空间的快速收敛模式。

en.tldr: This paper revisits discounted Q-value iteration through switching system theory, revealing its geometric structure: Q-VI identifies the optimal action class in finite time, and the distance to a particular subset of the practically optimal solution set decays exponentially at a rate governed by the joint spectral radius of a restricted switching family, which can be faster than the standard discount factor γ.
en.motivation: The standard contraction argument provides only a coarse characterization of the geometric structure of the Q-VI trajectory, especially when one is interested in when the induced greedy policy becomes effectively optimal, not just the final limit Q*.
en.method: Employ switching system theory to analyze discounted Q-value iteration, introduce the concept of the practically optimal solution set, and analyze convergence rates using the joint spectral radius.
en.result: Proved that Q-VI identifies the optimal action class in finite time, and the distance to a particular subset of the practically optimal solution set decays exponentially at a rate determined by the restricted joint spectral radius, which can be strictly faster than γ, revealing a two-stage geometric behavior of Q-VI.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new perspective for understanding the convergence geometry of Q-value iteration, indicating that policy identification can be faster than Q-function convergence, with implications for designing early stopping criteria or policy extraction.

idea_spark.idea: Explore upper bounds on the restricted joint spectral radius under different MDP structures (e.g., deterministic transitions, sparse rewards) to quantify the acceleration of policy identification.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on precise characterization of the practically optimal solution set and restricted switching family, which may be difficult to compute or verify in complex or continuous state spaces.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires geometric studies of 'implicit regularization' or 'early learning phases' in reinforcement learning algorithms, such as fast convergence patterns in policy space for policy gradient methods.

papers.title: The Topological Dual of a Dataset: A Logic-to-Topology Encoding for AlphaGeometry-Style Data
papers.summary: AlphaGeometry represents a milestone in neuro-symbolic reasoning, yet its architecture faces a log-linear scaling bottleneck within its symbolic deduction engine that limits its efficiency as problem complexity increases. Recent technical reports suggest that current domain-specific languages may be isomorphic as input representations to natural language, interchanging them acts as a performance-invariant transformation, implying that current neural guidance relies on superficial encodings rather than structural understanding. This paper addresses this representation bottleneck by proposing a logic-to-topology encoding designed to reveal the structural invariants of a model's latent space under a transformation of its input space. By leveraging the Logic of Observation, we utilize the duality between provability in observable theories and topologies to propose a logic-to-topology encoder for the input space. We introduce the concept of the "topological dual of a dataset", a transformation that bridges formal logic, topology, and neural processing. This framework serves as a Rosetta Stone for neuro-symbolic AI, providing a principled pathway for the mechanistic interpretability of how models navigate complex discovery paths.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一种逻辑到拓扑的编码方法，通过构建数据集的'拓扑对偶'来揭示神经符号AI中模型潜在空间的结构不变量，旨在解决AlphaGeometry等系统中符号推理引擎的扩展瓶颈问题。
ai.motivation: AlphaGeometry等神经符号推理系统面临符号演绎引擎的扩展瓶颈，且现有领域特定语言与自然语言在输入表示上可能同构，导致神经引导依赖表层编码而非结构理解。
ai.method: 利用'观察逻辑'，基于可观测理论中可证明性与拓扑之间的对偶性，提出一种逻辑到拓扑编码器，将输入空间转换为拓扑结构，从而定义数据集的'拓扑对偶'。
ai.result: 该框架为神经符号AI提供了一种原则性方法，能够解释模型在复杂发现路径中的工作机制，相当于该领域的'罗塞塔石碑'。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解神经符号模型中输入表示的结构本质提供了新视角，并提出了缓解符号推理扩展瓶颈的潜在编码方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将数据集视为逻辑命题的集合，通过拓扑对偶变换揭示其内在结构，可能引导模型学习更本质的推理模式。
idea_spark.risk: 逻辑到拓扑的映射可能高度抽象，其具体实现与计算效率尚不明确，且对复杂现实世界问题的泛化能力有待验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发从数学对偶性（如逻辑与拓扑）的角度重新思考数据表示，可能为构建更具结构理解能力的AI系统开辟新路径。

zh.tldr: 本文提出一种逻辑到拓扑的编码方法，通过构建数据集的'拓扑对偶'来揭示神经符号AI中模型潜在空间的结构不变量，旨在解决AlphaGeometry等系统中符号推理引擎的扩展瓶颈问题。
zh.motivation: AlphaGeometry等神经符号推理系统面临符号演绎引擎的扩展瓶颈，且现有领域特定语言与自然语言在输入表示上可能同构，导致神经引导依赖表层编码而非结构理解。
zh.method: 利用'观察逻辑'，基于可观测理论中可证明性与拓扑之间的对偶性，提出一种逻辑到拓扑编码器，将输入空间转换为拓扑结构，从而定义数据集的'拓扑对偶'。
zh.result: 该框架为神经符号AI提供了一种原则性方法，能够解释模型在复杂发现路径中的工作机制，相当于该领域的'罗塞塔石碑'。
zh.help_to_user: 为理解神经符号模型中输入表示的结构本质提供了新视角，并提出了缓解符号推理扩展瓶颈的潜在编码方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将数据集视为逻辑命题的集合，通过拓扑对偶变换揭示其内在结构，可能引导模型学习更本质的推理模式。
idea_spark.risk: 逻辑到拓扑的映射可能高度抽象，其具体实现与计算效率尚不明确，且对复杂现实世界问题的泛化能力有待验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发从数学对偶性（如逻辑与拓扑）的角度重新思考数据表示，可能为构建更具结构理解能力的AI系统开辟新路径。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a logic-to-topology encoding method that constructs the 'topological dual of a dataset' to reveal structural invariants in the latent space of neuro-symbolic AI models, aiming to address the scaling bottleneck in symbolic deduction engines like AlphaGeometry.
en.motivation: Neuro-symbolic reasoning systems like AlphaGeometry face a scaling bottleneck in their symbolic deduction engines, and current domain-specific languages may be isomorphic to natural language as input representations, leading neural guidance to rely on superficial encodings rather than structural understanding.
en.method: Leveraging the Logic of Observation and the duality between provability in observable theories and topologies, a logic-to-topology encoder is proposed to transform the input space into a topological structure, thereby defining the 'topological dual of a dataset'.
en.result: This framework provides a principled pathway for the mechanistic interpretability of how models navigate complex discovery paths in neuro-symbolic AI, serving as a 'Rosetta Stone' for the field.
en.help_to_user: Offers a new perspective for understanding the structural essence of input representations in neuro-symbolic models and proposes a potential encoding scheme to mitigate the scaling bottleneck in symbolic reasoning.

idea_spark.idea: Treating a dataset as a collection of logical propositions and revealing its intrinsic structure through topological dual transformation may guide models to learn more fundamental reasoning patterns.
idea_spark.risk: The mapping from logic to topology may be highly abstract, with unclear concrete implementation and computational efficiency, and its generalization to complex real-world problems remains to be verified.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires rethinking data representation from the perspective of mathematical dualities (e.g., logic and topology), potentially opening new avenues for building AI systems with deeper structural understanding.

papers.title: Structure-Adaptive Sparse Diffusion in Voxel Space for 3D Medical Image Enhancement
papers.summary: Three-dimensional (3D) medical image enhancement, including denoising and super-resolution, is critical for clinical diagnosis in CT, PET, and MRI. Although diffusion models have shown remarkable success in 2D medical imaging, scaling them to high-resolution 3D volumes remains computationally prohibitive due to lengthy diffusion trajectories over high-dimensional volumetric data. We observe that in conditional enhancement, strong anatomical priors in the degraded input render dense noise schedules largely redundant. Leveraging this insight, we propose a sparse voxel-space diffusion framework that trains and samples on a compact set of uniformly subsampled timesteps. The network predicts clean data directly on the data manifold, supervised in velocity space for stable gradient scaling. A lightweight Structure-aware Trajectory Modulation (STM) module recalibrates time embeddings at each network block based on local anatomical content, enabling structure-adaptive denoising over the shared sparse schedule. Operating directly in voxel space, our framework preserves fine anatomical detail without lossy compression while achieving up to $10\times$ training acceleration. Experiments on four datasets spanning CT, PET, and MRI demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both denoising and super-resolution tasks. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/mirthAI/sparse-3d-diffusion.

ai.tldr: 提出一种用于3D医学图像增强的稀疏体素空间扩散框架，通过结构感知轨迹调制和稀疏时间步采样，在保持解剖细节的同时实现10倍训练加速。
ai.motivation: 传统扩散模型应用于高分辨率3D医学图像时计算成本过高，而退化输入中的强解剖先验使得密集噪声调度变得冗余。
ai.method: 在均匀下采样的紧凑时间步集上进行训练和采样，网络在速度空间中监督以直接预测干净数据，并引入轻量级STM模块根据局部解剖内容重新校准时间嵌入。
ai.result: 在CT、PET、MRI四个数据集上的实验表明，在去噪和超分辨率任务上达到最先进性能，同时实现高达10倍的训练加速。
ai.help_to_user: 为高分辨率3D医学图像增强提供了一种计算高效且性能优异的解决方案，可直接应用于临床CT、PET、MRI图像的增强处理。

idea_spark.idea: 利用解剖先验简化扩散轨迹，在冗余的噪声调度中识别并保留关键时间步。
idea_spark.risk: 稀疏采样可能丢失某些重要中间状态信息，需仔细设计采样策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将领域知识（如医学图像中的解剖结构）显式融入扩散过程，实现任务特定的效率优化。

en.tldr: Proposes a sparse voxel-space diffusion framework for 3D medical image enhancement, achieving 10× training acceleration while preserving anatomical details via structure-aware trajectory modulation and sparse timestep sampling.
en.motivation: Scaling diffusion models to high-resolution 3D medical volumes is computationally prohibitive, while strong anatomical priors in degraded inputs make dense noise schedules largely redundant.
en.method: Trains and samples on a compact set of uniformly subsampled timesteps, with network supervised in velocity space to predict clean data directly, plus a lightweight STM module that recalibrates time embeddings based on local anatomical content.
en.result: Experiments on four CT, PET, and MRI datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on denoising and super-resolution tasks with up to 10× training acceleration.
en.help_to_user: Provides a computationally efficient and high-performance solution for enhancing high-resolution 3D medical images, directly applicable to clinical CT, PET, and MRI image enhancement.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage anatomical priors to simplify diffusion trajectories by identifying and preserving critical timesteps within redundant noise schedules.
idea_spark.risk: Sparse sampling might discard important intermediate state information, requiring careful sampling strategy design.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explicitly incorporate domain knowledge (e.g., anatomical structures in medical images) into the diffusion process for task-specific efficiency optimization.

papers.title: The Geometry of Thermodynamic Equilibrium: Pressure, Tangent Functionals, and Phase Transitions
papers.summary: We develop the convex-analytic structure of the thermodynamic formalism for continuous maps on compact metric spaces. The pressure functional is the Legendre-Fenchel transform of the negative entropy, and the biconjugate recovery of the entropy from the pressure establishes a complete duality. Equilibrium states are elements of the subdifferential of the pressure, uniqueness of equilibrium states corresponds to Gâteaux differentiability, and first-order phase transitions correspond to non-differentiability. For systems with specification and Hölder potentials, the pressure is Fréchet differentiable in the Hölder norm, and the second derivative of the pressure equals the asymptotic variance of the Birkhoff sums. We prove a universal variational principle that unifies the classical additive, the subadditive, and the relative variational principles through a single theorem on convex functionals satisfying convexity, lower semi-continuity, coercivity, and cocycle invariance. Extensions to systems with the specification property and to non-compact spaces under coercivity conditions are included, with applications to countable Markov shifts via Sarig's recurrence classification. This paper constitutes Part II of a six-part series on the thermodynamic formalism for hyperbolic dynamical systems.

ai.tldr: 本文建立了紧致度量空间上连续映射的热力学形式主义的凸分析结构，揭示了压力泛函与熵的勒让德-芬切尔对偶关系，将平衡态、相变与压力泛函的次微分、可微性联系起来，并提出了统一加性、次加性和相对变分原理的普适变分原理。
ai.motivation: 为连续动力系统的热力学形式主义提供系统的凸分析框架，统一处理平衡态、相变和变分原理。
ai.method: 采用凸分析工具（勒让德-芬切尔变换、次微分、可微性），结合动力系统的规范性质和Hölder势函数，建立压力与熵的对偶理论，并推广到非紧空间和可数马尔可夫移位。
ai.result: 证明了压力是熵的勒让德-芬切尔变换，平衡态对应压力的次微分，相变对应不可微点；对于具有规范性和Hölder势的系统，压力在Hölder范数下弗雷歇可微，其二阶导数等于Birkhoff和的渐近方差；提出了统一的变分原理。
ai.help_to_user: 为分析动力系统中的平衡态和相变提供了严格的凸分析框架，统一了多种变分原理，适用于双曲动力系统的热力学形式主义研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将动力系统的热力学量（压力、熵）嵌入凸分析框架，用泛函的可微性刻画物理相变。
idea_spark.risk: 对非紧空间和更一般的动力系统，强制条件可能难以验证；实际计算压力泛函的次微分和可微性可能复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将几何、凸分析工具应用于统计力学和动力系统的交叉研究；为相变分类提供泛函分析视角。

en.tldr: This paper develops the convex-analytic structure of thermodynamic formalism for continuous maps on compact metric spaces, establishing a Legendre-Fenchel duality between pressure and entropy, linking equilibrium states and phase transitions to subdifferentials and differentiability of the pressure functional, and proving a universal variational principle unifying additive, subadditive, and relative principles.
en.motivation: To provide a systematic convex-analytic framework for the thermodynamic formalism of continuous dynamical systems, unifying the treatment of equilibrium states, phase transitions, and variational principles.
en.method: Using convex analysis tools (Legendre-Fenchel transform, subdifferentials, differentiability) combined with dynamical systems properties (specification, Hölder potentials) to establish duality between pressure and entropy, with extensions to non-compact spaces and countable Markov shifts.
en.result: Proved pressure is the Legendre-Fenchel transform of negative entropy; equilibrium states correspond to subdifferentials of pressure; phase transitions correspond to non-differentiability; for systems with specification and Hölder potentials, pressure is Fréchet differentiable in Hölder norm with second derivative equal to asymptotic variance of Birkhoff sums; established a universal variational principle.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous convex-analytic framework for analyzing equilibrium states and phase transitions in dynamical systems, unifies multiple variational principles, and applies to thermodynamic formalism of hyperbolic dynamical systems.

idea_spark.idea: Embed thermodynamic quantities (pressure, entropy) of dynamical systems into convex analysis framework, characterizing physical phase transitions via functional differentiability.
idea_spark.risk: Coercivity conditions may be difficult to verify for non-compact spaces and more general systems; practical computation of subdifferentials and differentiability of pressure functional can be complex.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires application of geometric and convex analysis tools to interdisciplinary studies of statistical mechanics and dynamical systems; provides functional-analytic perspective on phase transition classification.

papers.title: The Consensus Trap: Rescuing Multi-Agent LLMs from Adversarial Majorities via Token-Level Collaboration
papers.summary: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) architectures increasingly rely on response-level aggregation, such as Majority Voting (MAJ), to raise reasoning ceilings. However, in open environments, agents are highly susceptible to stealthy contextual corruption, such as targeted prompt injections. We reveal a critical structural vulnerability in current multi-agent systems: response-level aggregation collapses when corrupted agents form a local majority. Because voting aggregates fully-formed conclusions, it is blind to flawed intermediate logic. To overcome this systematic limitation, we propose the Token-Level Round-Robin (RR) Collaboration, where agents sequentially interleave generation within a shared auto-regressive context. We formalize this process as a discrete-time dynamical system, proving that token-level interleaving transitions aggregation from a brittle counting of final votes (a linear sum) to a dynamic, interwoven chain of logic (a non-linear operator product). Through this theoretical lens, we prove that the honest model's restorative pull can overpower adversarial corruptions, even when corrupted agents form a majority. We conduct an exhaustive empirical evaluation across diverse reasoning benchmarks and demonstrate that while MAJ collapses when corrupted agents reach a majority, RR maintains robust accuracy well beyond this critical threshold.

ai.tldr: 本文揭示了多智能体大语言模型在响应级聚合（如多数投票）中的结构性漏洞：当被污染的智能体形成局部多数时，系统会崩溃。为此，提出了令牌级轮转协作方法，通过顺序交错生成来抵御对抗性多数攻击。
ai.motivation: 当前多智能体LLM系统依赖响应级聚合（如多数投票）来提升推理能力，但在开放环境中，智能体容易受到隐蔽的上下文污染（如针对性提示注入）。当被污染的智能体形成局部多数时，现有聚合方法会完全失效。
ai.method: 提出令牌级轮转协作方法：智能体在共享的自回归上下文中顺序交错生成令牌。该方法被形式化为离散时间动力系统，将聚合从脆弱的最终投票计数（线性求和）转变为动态、交织的逻辑链（非线性算子积）。
ai.result: 理论证明，即使被污染的智能体占多数，诚实模型的恢复力也能压倒对抗性污染。大量实验表明，当被污染智能体达到多数时，多数投票方法崩溃，而轮转协作方法在超过该临界阈值后仍能保持稳健的准确性。
ai.help_to_user: 为您提供了一种抵御多智能体系统中对抗性多数攻击的新范式，将聚合粒度从响应级细化到令牌级，增强了系统在开放环境中的鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 将聚合操作从决策结果层面下沉到生成过程层面，利用生成过程中的局部交互来稀释全局恶意影响。
idea_spark.risk: 令牌级交互可能增加计算开销和延迟，在生成长文本时效率问题需要权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们思考：在协作系统中，是否可以通过更细粒度的信息交换来打破恶意节点的合谋？是否可将此动态系统视角应用于其他形式的模型集成或委员会方法？

en.tldr: This paper reveals a structural vulnerability in multi-agent LLMs using response-level aggregation (e.g., majority voting): systems collapse when corrupted agents form a local majority. It proposes Token-Level Round-Robin Collaboration, where agents interleave generation sequentially to resist adversarial majority attacks.
en.motivation: Current multi-agent LLM systems rely on response-level aggregation (e.g., majority voting) to enhance reasoning, but in open environments, agents are susceptible to stealthy contextual corruption (e.g., targeted prompt injections). When corrupted agents form a local majority, existing aggregation methods fail completely.
en.method: Proposes Token-Level Round-Robin Collaboration: agents sequentially interleave token generation within a shared auto-regressive context. This is formalized as a discrete-time dynamical system, transforming aggregation from brittle final-vote counting (linear sum) to a dynamic, interwoven chain of logic (non-linear operator product).
en.result: Theoretically proves that the honest model's restorative pull can overpower adversarial corruptions even when corrupted agents are in the majority. Extensive experiments show that while majority voting collapses when corrupted agents reach a majority, round-robin collaboration maintains robust accuracy well beyond this critical threshold.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new paradigm for resisting adversarial majority attacks in multi-agent systems by refining aggregation granularity from response-level to token-level, enhancing system robustness in open environments.

idea_spark.idea: Sink aggregation operations from the decision-result level to the generation-process level, using local interactions during generation to dilute global malicious influence.
idea_spark.risk: Token-level interaction may increase computational overhead and latency; efficiency trade-offs need consideration for long-text generation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires consideration: In collaborative systems, can finer-grained information exchange break malicious node collusion? Can this dynamical system perspective be applied to other forms of model ensembling or committee methods?

papers.title: Global Well-Posedness of Classical Solutions to the Multi-Dimensional Degenerate Compressible Navier-Stokes Equations with Large Spherically Symmetric Initial Data
papers.summary: This paper is concerned with the global existence and uniqueness of classical solutions to the barotropic compressible Navier-Stokes equations with degenerate viscosity coefficients in three-dimensional bounded domains or in the whole space $\mathbb{R}^N$ $(N=2,3)$ with non-vacuum far-field density. Specifically, we assume that the shear viscosity coefficient $μ(ρ)=ρ^α$ and the bulk viscosity coefficient $λ(ρ)=(α-1)ρ^α$, which satisfy the BD entropy relation. For arbitrarily large spherically symmetric initial data, we establish the global existence and uniqueness of spherically symmetric classical solutions under the following conditions: for $N=2$, $α\in (0.54369,1)$ and $γ\in (1,\infty)$; for $N=3$ (both in bounded domains and in the whole space), $α\in (0.67661,1)$ and $γ\in (1,6α-3)$. Moreover, we show that the solution will not exhibit vacuum in any finite time provided that no vacuum is present initially.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了具有退化粘性系数的可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在三维有界域或全空间中，对于任意大的球对称初值，存在全局经典解且唯一，且不会在有限时间内出现真空。
ai.motivation: 研究具有退化粘性系数的可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的全局适定性，特别是对于大初值情形，以深化对流体动力学中数学理论的理解。
ai.method: 假设剪切粘性系数μ(ρ)=ρ^α，体积粘性系数λ(ρ)=(α-1)ρ^α，满足BD熵关系。针对球对称初值，在特定参数范围内（如N=3时α∈(0.67661,1)，γ∈(1,6α-3)）建立全局经典解。
ai.result: 证明了在二维和三维情况下，对于任意大的球对称初值，方程存在全局唯一的球对称经典解，且若初始无真空，则解在任意有限时间内也不会出现真空。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有退化粘性的可压缩Navier-Stokes方程提供了大初值全局解的存在唯一性理论，支持相关数学物理问题的分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将参数范围精确化以处理退化粘性项，可能启发对更一般粘性依赖关系的分析。
idea_spark.risk: 结论依赖于特定的粘性系数形式和对称性假设，推广到非对称或一般粘性需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索类似方法在非牛顿流体或多相流模型中的应用，或考虑不同边界条件的影响。

en.tldr: This paper proves the global existence and uniqueness of classical solutions to the compressible Navier-Stokes equations with degenerate viscosity coefficients for arbitrarily large spherically symmetric initial data in 3D bounded domains or whole space, with no vacuum formation in finite time.
en.motivation: To investigate the global well-posedness of compressible Navier-Stokes equations with degenerate viscosity coefficients, especially for large initial data, advancing the mathematical theory of fluid dynamics.
en.method: Assuming shear viscosity μ(ρ)=ρ^α and bulk viscosity λ(ρ)=(α-1)ρ^α satisfying the BD entropy relation. For spherically symmetric initial data, global classical solutions are established within specific parameter ranges (e.g., for N=3: α∈(0.67661,1), γ∈(1,6α-3)).
en.result: Proves global existence and uniqueness of spherically symmetric classical solutions for arbitrarily large initial data in 2D and 3D, with no vacuum appearing in finite time if initially absent.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for the global well-posedness of compressible Navier-Stokes equations with degenerate viscosity under large initial data, aiding analysis of related mathematical physics problems.

idea_spark.idea: Precise parameter range identification for handling degenerate viscosity terms may inspire analysis of more general viscosity dependencies.
idea_spark.risk: Results rely on specific viscosity coefficient forms and symmetry assumptions; generalization to non-symmetric or general viscosity requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore similar methods in non-Newtonian fluid or multiphase flow models, or consider effects of different boundary conditions.

papers.title: Self-Supervised Super-Resolution for Sentinel-5P Hyperspectral Images
papers.summary: Sentinel-5P (S5P) plays a critical role in atmospheric monitoring; however, its spatial resolution limits fine-scale analysis. Existing super-resolution (SR) approaches rely on supervised learning with synthetic low-resolution (LR) data, since true high-resolution (HR) data do not exist, limiting their applicability to real observations. We propose a self-supervised hyperspectral SR framework for S5P that enables training without HR ground truth. The method combines Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimator (SURE) with an equivariant imaging constraint, incorporating the S5P degradation operator and noise statistics derived from signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) metadata. We also introduce depthwise separable convolution U-Net architectures designed for efficiency and spectral fidelity. The framework is evaluated in two settings: (i) LR-HR, where synthetic LR data are used for direct comparison with supervised learning, and (ii) GT-SHR, where super-resolved images surpass the native spatial resolution without HR reference. Results across multiple bands show that self-supervised models achieve performance comparable to supervised methods while maintaining strong consistency. Qualitative analysis shows improved spatial detail over bicubic interpolation, and validation with EMIT data confirms that reconstructed structures are physically meaningful. Code is available at https://github.com/hyamomar/Sentinel-5P-Super-Resolution/tree/main/self_supervised

ai.tldr: 提出一种用于Sentinel-5P高光谱图像的自监督超分辨率框架，无需高分辨率真值即可训练，结合SURE损失和等变成像约束，在合成和真实场景下均取得与监督方法相当的性能。
ai.motivation: Sentinel-5P卫星对大气监测至关重要，但其空间分辨率限制了精细分析。现有超分辨率方法依赖合成低分辨率数据的监督学习，缺乏真实高分辨率数据，限制了在实际观测中的应用。
ai.method: 结合Stein无偏风险估计器（SURE）与等变成像约束，融入Sentinel-5P退化算子和从信噪比元数据推导的噪声统计。采用为效率和光谱保真度设计的深度可分离卷积U-Net架构。
ai.result: 在合成低分辨率-高分辨率场景中，自监督模型性能与监督方法相当；在无高分辨率参考的真实场景中，超分辨率图像超越了原生空间分辨率。多波段结果保持强一致性，定性分析显示比双三次插值细节更丰富，EMIT数据验证重建结构具有物理意义。
ai.help_to_user: 为Sentinel-5P高光谱图像提供无需高分辨率真值的超分辨率解决方案，可直接应用于真实观测数据，提升大气监测的精细分析能力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用SURE损失和成像系统先验（退化算子、噪声统计）实现无真值训练，结合等变约束提升重建稳定性。
idea_spark.risk: 对噪声统计和退化模型的准确性依赖较强，模型在未知成像条件下的泛化能力需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将物理成像模型与自监督学习结合，为缺乏真值数据的成像任务提供新思路，可探索更多成像先验的融入方式。

en.tldr: Proposes a self-supervised super-resolution framework for Sentinel-5P hyperspectral images that enables training without high-resolution ground truth, combining SURE loss with equivariant imaging constraints, achieving performance comparable to supervised methods in both synthetic and real-world scenarios.
en.motivation: Sentinel-5P plays a critical role in atmospheric monitoring, but its spatial resolution limits fine-scale analysis. Existing super-resolution approaches rely on supervised learning with synthetic low-resolution data, and the absence of true high-resolution data limits their applicability to real observations.
en.method: Combines Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimator (SURE) with an equivariant imaging constraint, incorporating the S5P degradation operator and noise statistics derived from signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) metadata. Employs depthwise separable convolution U-Net architectures designed for efficiency and spectral fidelity.
en.result: In the synthetic LR-HR setting, self-supervised models achieve performance comparable to supervised methods. In the GT-SHR setting without HR reference, super-resolved images surpass the native spatial resolution. Results across multiple bands show strong consistency, qualitative analysis reveals improved spatial detail over bicubic interpolation, and validation with EMIT data confirms physically meaningful reconstructed structures.
en.help_to_user: Provides a super-resolution solution for Sentinel-5P hyperspectral images that does not require high-resolution ground truth, enabling direct application to real observational data and enhancing fine-scale analysis capabilities for atmospheric monitoring.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage SURE loss and imaging system priors (degradation operator, noise statistics) for training without ground truth, combined with equivariant constraints to improve reconstruction stability.
idea_spark.risk: Strong dependence on the accuracy of noise statistics and degradation models; generalization to unknown imaging conditions requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining physical imaging models with self-supervised learning offers a new direction for imaging tasks lacking ground truth data, encouraging exploration of more ways to incorporate imaging priors.

papers.title: Kill-Probability-Maximization Guidance: Breaking from the Miss-Distance-Minimization Paradigm
papers.summary: Classical guidance laws aim at minimizing the miss distance, thus implicitly determining the minimum warhead lethality radius required against nominal targets. However, nonnominal targets or scenarios might render the designed warhead insufficient, causing a significant degradation in the single-shot kill probability (SSKP). We propose a guidance methodology that shifts the interceptor's objective from minimizing the miss distance to directly maximizing the SSKP, while taking into account the warhead's probabilistic lethality model. Complying with the generalized separation theorem, the new paradigm is based on modifying deterministic differential-game-based guidance laws using Bayesian decision theory. Extensive Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate consistent SSKP improvement over the standard and recently introduced estimation-aware guidance laws, when tested against nominal and nonnominal evasively maneuvering targets.

ai.tldr: 提出一种新的制导方法，将拦截目标从最小化脱靶距离转变为直接最大化单发杀伤概率，考虑战斗部概率杀伤模型，显著提升对抗非标机动目标的杀伤效能。
ai.motivation: 传统制导律以最小化脱靶距离为目标，隐含确定了对抗标称目标所需的最小战斗部杀伤半径。但非标目标或场景可能导致设计的战斗部效能不足，显著降低单发杀伤概率。
ai.method: 基于广义分离定理，通过贝叶斯决策理论修改确定性微分博弈制导律，将目标函数从脱靶距离最小化转为单发杀伤概率最大化。
ai.result: 大量蒙特卡洛仿真表明，相比标准及近期提出的估计感知制导律，新方法在对抗标称和非标规避机动目标时，能一致提升单发杀伤概率。
ai.help_to_user: 为制导系统设计提供了从脱靶距离最小化到杀伤概率最大化的范式转变，适用于需要提升对抗非标目标效能的拦截场景。

idea_spark.idea: 在制导问题中直接优化终端杀伤概率而非中间几何指标
idea_spark.risk: 需要精确的概率杀伤模型，计算复杂度可能较高
idea_spark.inspiration: 可将类似思路用于其他需要优化终端成功概率的制导、控制或决策问题

en.tldr: Proposes a new guidance methodology that shifts the interceptor's objective from minimizing miss distance to directly maximizing single-shot kill probability, accounting for the warhead's probabilistic lethality model, significantly improving effectiveness against nonnominal maneuvering targets.
en.motivation: Classical guidance laws aim at minimizing miss distance, implicitly determining the minimum required warhead lethality radius against nominal targets. Nonnominal targets or scenarios may render the designed warhead insufficient, causing significant degradation in single-shot kill probability.
en.method: Based on the generalized separation theorem, modifies deterministic differential-game-based guidance laws using Bayesian decision theory to shift the objective from miss-distance minimization to SSKP maximization.
en.result: Extensive Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate consistent SSKP improvement over standard and recently introduced estimation-aware guidance laws when tested against nominal and nonnominal evasively maneuvering targets.
en.help_to_user: Provides a paradigm shift from miss-distance minimization to kill-probability maximization for guidance system design, applicable to interception scenarios requiring improved effectiveness against nonnominal targets.

idea_spark.idea: Directly optimizing terminal kill probability rather than intermediate geometric metrics in guidance problems
idea_spark.risk: Requires accurate probabilistic lethality models; computational complexity may be high
idea_spark.inspiration: Similar approach could be applied to other guidance, control, or decision problems where terminal success probability needs optimization

papers.title: Weak solutions and weak-strong uniqueness for a Cahn-Hilliard type model with chemotaxis
papers.summary: We prove existence of weak solutions and weak-strong uniqueness for a mathematical model which couples the evolution of a phase-parameter $\varphi$ satisfying a Cahn-Hilliard type relation with the one of an additional variable $σ$ influencing the phase separation process. The main application of the model refers to cancer growth processes, where $σ$ may represent the concentration of a chemical substance affecting the evolution of the tumor, and is governed by a nonlinear parabolic equation characterized by a cross-diffusion term alike that occurring in the Keller-Segel model for chemotaxis. This term is also responsible for the most relevant difficulties in the mathematical analysis of the system. Complementing previous results on the model, we prove here global in time existence for a very weak notion of solution to which a suitable energy imbalance and a logarithmic inequality for the nutrient are added. Noting that the system also admits local in time "strong" solutions, we can also exhibit a weak-strong uniqueness result whose proof exploits in an essential way the entropy-type inequality satisfied by weak solutions.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了一个耦合相场参数与化学物质浓度的Cahn-Hilliard型模型的弱解存在性与弱-强唯一性。
ai.motivation: 该模型主要应用于癌症生长过程，其中化学物质浓度影响肿瘤演化，其非线性抛物方程包含类似Keller-Segel趋化模型的交叉扩散项，这给数学分析带来主要困难。
ai.method: 证明了全局时间上非常弱解的存在性，并补充了合适的能量不等式和对数不等式；同时利用弱解满足的熵型不等式，结合局部时间强解的存在性，证明了弱-强唯一性。
ai.result: 获得了模型的全局弱解存在性证明，并建立了弱解与强解之间的唯一性关系。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有交叉扩散项的相场-趋化耦合系统提供了系统的弱解理论框架和唯一性分析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将Cahn-Hilliard相分离动力学与Keller-Segel型趋化机制结合，构建生物组织生长模型。
idea_spark.risk: 交叉扩散项导致正则性损失，需要非常弱的解概念和精细的不等式处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 弱-强唯一性证明中熵不等式的使用，可能推广到其他具有类似耗散结构的生物物理系统。

en.tldr: This paper proves existence of weak solutions and weak-strong uniqueness for a Cahn-Hilliard type model coupled with a chemical concentration field.
en.motivation: The model primarily applies to cancer growth processes, where chemical concentration affects tumor evolution. The nonlinear parabolic equation contains a cross-diffusion term similar to the Keller-Segel chemotaxis model, posing the main mathematical difficulties.
en.method: Proves global-in-time existence for a very weak solution concept supplemented with suitable energy imbalance and logarithmic inequalities. Exploits the entropy-type inequality satisfied by weak solutions to establish weak-strong uniqueness, given the existence of local strong solutions.
en.result: Establishes global existence of weak solutions and demonstrates a weak-strong uniqueness result for the coupled system.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic weak solution theory and uniqueness analysis framework for phase-field-chemotaxis systems with cross-diffusion.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Cahn-Hilliard phase separation dynamics with Keller-Segel type chemotaxis mechanisms to model biological tissue growth.
idea_spark.risk: Cross-diffusion terms cause regularity loss, requiring very weak solution concepts and delicate inequality handling.
idea_spark.inspiration: The use of entropy inequalities in weak-strong uniqueness proofs may generalize to other biophysical systems with similar dissipative structures.

papers.title: Bucket Brigades: Uniqueness of the Fixed Point and Three-Worker Asymptotics
papers.summary: A standard organization of production lines exhibiting self-balancing behavior is given by bucket brigades. Their study in operations research was initiated by the foundational work of Bartholdi and Eisenstein ({\em Operations Research}, 1996), where a simplified version of the model is considered. Their main result shows that when workers are ordered from the slowest to the fastest, the system is stable and converges to a ``fixed point,'' where each worker oscillates between two limiting positions. They also observe that the dynamics can become highly complex when this ordering condition is not satisfied. The {\em no-station} setting, in which work is distributed continuously and uniformly along the production line, is given special attention in their work. In a subsequent paper with Bunimovich ({\em Operations Research}, 1999), they characterize all stable behaviors of this setting for up to three workers.   In this work, we extend their analysis for three workers beyond the stable regime, providing a complete description when workers are ordered from the fastest to the slowest. We also show that, due to their restrictive notion of stability, some of their conclusions must be revisited. Finally, for an arbitrary number of workers, we prove that the fixed point is always unique in the no-station setting.

ai.tldr: 本研究扩展了桶队生产线的分析，证明了无站点设置下固定点的唯一性，并完整描述了三个工人从最快到最慢排序时的动力学行为。
ai.motivation: Bartholdi和Eisenstein的开创性工作表明，当工人从最慢到最快排序时，桶队系统稳定并收敛到固定点，但违反该排序时动力学变得复杂。后续研究仅描述了三个工人在稳定状态下的行为。
ai.method: 扩展对三个工人的分析至非稳定状态，特别关注工人从最快到最慢排序的情况。同时，针对任意数量工人，在无站点设置下证明固定点的唯一性。
ai.result: 1. 完整描述了三个工人从最快到最慢排序时的动力学行为；2. 发现先前研究中因稳定性定义限制而需修正的结论；3. 证明了无站点设置下固定点对任意数量工人总是唯一的。
ai.help_to_user: 为生产系统设计者提供了更完整的桶队动力学理解，特别是在非标准工人排序下的行为预测，以及固定点唯一性的理论保证。

idea_spark.idea: 将桶队模型中的工人排序条件松弛，研究混合能力团队在动态任务分配中的涌现行为。
idea_spark.risk: 实际生产线存在离散工作站、随机处理时间等复杂因素，可能影响理论结论的直接应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对多智能体系统中基于简单局部规则产生的全局稳定模式的研究，如机器人协作或分布式计算任务分配。
